**_QUOTE OF THE DAY_** _**The first lady is, and always has been, an unpaid public servant elected by one person, her husband.**_ **― Lady Bird Johnson

[**July 11, 1804:** Founding father and first Secretary of the Treasury Alexander Hamilton was mortally wounded by Vice President Aaron Burr during a duel in Weehawken, New Jersey. The longtime political rivals were unable to resolve their dispute amicably, leading to the pair meeting on the dueling ground. Alexander Hamilton died the following day, and Aaron Burr, charged with two counts of murder, would never hold political office again. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJIZQRgSywrfeXfdfegGXmbdPvY9VvN9jbs6q5aVkICLkybXrP6ThqCCpzfFe8BsX0WtbNzEbJovpFu6g7CiRNx0RXcNAWQPD29wLbB_lQI9fntNYaOrrEhe88LbFNIN8e7F4j_TQk_QFNzTTg47GPghn6FdSD-xZL8viV9XUNUbAmOPoHomKy1DOF_dlyp-Wbs%3D) **Source -[pbs.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJIZQRgSywrfeXfdfegGXmbdPvY9VvN9jbs6q5aVkICLk9nsmnhjn3CYlhFGuwxM8gTaKMs5Ljdkhl9q_vP9jxqXCGC9Mx9zZAoZvHmUd3DS656BDhEG1jagK2OffEZvKCrWEuGb_0nET9a0ZUcdv2Dbeyfvzp98mx-fCpOkoxuGipfcVPmlSKkKkgmaQraijJU%3D)**

[**July 11, 1914:** After throwing a no-hitter in a semi pro game, Babe Ruth was signed by the Baltimore Orioles owner-manager Jack Dunn. After a stellar spring showcase with the Orioles, Dunn sold Ruth, along with two other players, to the Boston Red Sox for $30,000. Babe Ruth started for the Red Sox the day after he arrived in a game against the Cleveland Naps. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJL7_RjOejWYzE7MMdMmEvhfvGHJBYilaFaD6TPkBpMKsvvRG4ZDUQGhZdRTP-3ai7DV4JBbJFYdcaICc_oceWkg3smLZlDVEe-4p0kwtKGDk73hgwTM7ee1TTdA-z4qCjRXrF6uvxyuJbOxtKJ2rgad3ZLpvRX9HagQKIQKa3eMbE8Y2AMrGfNlkFGrD7JOowNAvBO1zCvRRRomv7iW65IJuydd1ap1WxGefK4f2J8iTA%3D%3D) **Source -[sabr.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJL7_RjOejWYzE7MMdMmEvhfvGHJBYilaFaD6TPkBpMKsvvRG4ZDUQGhZdRTP-3ai7BHx4PeM231EIWevobARyiGxHLEsETuiCtQjJRxLR1KEcNTaIwFMZUd6hAYAe3GQo7qSLCb34ZtWw6u7iNb7wneZCzHTUaSkqPLOPpIk9H_9BnEZghpBj6ihNp3FaOVZbFtu-8-hvJcGeITX5fU8xT7ncM5WASvBPMvK1AXL8_Qow%3D%3D)**

[**July 11, 2007:** Former Second Lady and First Lady of the United States, Claudia Alta “Lady Bird” Johnson, passed away in West Lake Hills, Texas, at the age of 94 after a series of health problems. Lady Bird Johnson served as Second Lady from 1961 to 1963 and as First Lady from 1963 to 1969. She is remembered for her beautification work and has consistently ranked as one of the most popular First Ladies throughout American history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJKjiLS3_Lkk-Hna-BjO4nQoIo77djaG_laS24cVeqEhO_mzYJ4qnjIG5IrNrRRfrEreTVzX9i2-soLFvIzEngIDY-NeGOUGEXTCwUn81yyuCBV8P1-n9z_iQz9wijlFMATLuxEodFyJzAFY3HE5I4u_lJn0gEMZ_8ok6VknyDdWjLycSClr0ztg169sAgNN87RtT0ouG-MucP0MP5vexzL3jI-OLyVGEWdy25JRkgWp3Q%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=15e0d87992074a6db9e88aaf160b5fd7&_e=kzSbbG957BbJLEPqNGFjmi-LQDeejqnOEZy5B6GHzJKjiLS3_Lkk-Hna-BjO4nQoIo77djaG_laS24cVeqEhO_mzYJ4qnjIG5IrNrRRfrEpeIE476ZSX4jjr9Evia1XDB6yj1tfKIRDpN_gcKKTyvRFsJYaiZyvU3q1rPpyfk4tASRKo1misHdORhHtb50I1yTPmJYlcf-kLWizIoPZ7XF8wajSMMCcTaG5RzXQbxgLJmCDZaVw8ALz3XZmkEtvp6krHMIfXa_obC-Q6KBCd1A%3D%3D)**

name: Debra
subject: About my son Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66358247/416060942/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230711_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzUwNjYwYi00NzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Luce8RSfIkNpcmrrEhSfGypWubsi9Xn-OyncHgYTIN0=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66358248/416060948/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230711_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzUwNjYwYi00NzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Luce8RSfIkNpcmrrEhSfGypWubsi9Xn-OyncHgYTIN0=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. clean_body: | Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. = I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress. As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | = I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House. His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage. Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter. And I know that those experiences drive him every single time he walks into his office in D.C. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Debra | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.

---
| I needed to reach out directly, Peter: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.**

Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his rubber stamp in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban**. I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. [**_Will you chip in $10 or more now to split between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help me keep Nevada blue?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66358293/416061462/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230711-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2Y2E4ODRhLTQ3MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Whl5Ut6jiJSOfAgj94W3eTUk-kKuziEVVFxDRcbxnng=)

Now, The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – **and a recent poll shows me 2 points down.**

**This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter.**

body:

| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/abolish-filibuster/?source=VPP_20230711_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9099%2E878179%2ExpZXpl) Senate Republicans have been using the filibuster to block ANY chance of codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.

name: Katie Porter
subject: March 5, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)
Derek, I just took a look at our ActBlue. We had a strong end of quarter push (thank you to everyone who pitched in!) but this month, things have really slowed down. [**Can you make a contribution today to help us get back on track to win this race?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-2?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-2?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-2?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)
It’s pretty normal for fundraising to slow down in the summer months when we’re not in an election year. **But our competitive primary is on March 5, 2024.** That’s less than eight months away.
[**That means we can’t afford a summer slow-down if we’re going to start running ads, knocking doors, and campaigning aggressively up and down the state in the not so distant future.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-2?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230711-2?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)**
Thanks for being on Team Porter,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ11_2_ABL_20230711_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26350_3422442_Yyvk1g&akid=26350%2E3422442%2EYyvk1g)**
---

name: Team Rosen
subject: BREAKING: McConnell’s handpicked candidate jumps into Nevada’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Democrats simply cannot defend this battleground seat without immediate grassroots support.

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, Tucker Carlson made a big prediction - and I completely agree with it! " I think we're going to see Trump's emergence as the most significant thing that happened in American politics in 100 years because he reoriented the Republican Party against the wishes of Republican leaders." But I'm humble enough to know that the TRUE significance of our movement is YOU. The reason our movement has such historic significance is because it took power away from the corrupt ruling class and returned it to YOU , the American people. As I said at my Inauguration, "What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people." And that 's exactly why the disloyal Republicans known as RINOs are pledging to spend $370 MILLION to try and sabotage us in the GOP primary. These RINOs hate the idea of YOU being in control of your own government so much that they'd rather see Joe Biden win in 2024 than watch me return to the White House and put America First again. But in 2024, we're going to prove Tucker Carlson right and ensure that the MAGA movement goes down in history books as the most significant thing in American politics in 100 YEARS. | Thank you, | Donald J. clean_body: | = | = “Moms for America” sounds like a harmless organization, right? It’s not. In fact, its work goes against the core values this nation was founded on: → They helped organize rallies promoting the Big Lie and pushing for recounts in all 50 states. → Their “Election Security Specialist” has proposed getting rid of voting machines, automatic voter registration, and most absentee voting. → They launched Mom Force, a group dedicated to hosting trainings for right-wing moms on how to disrupt their local school boards. → And they’ve taken in millions from dark money groups, including a group chaired by Michael Flynn, that called on Trump to declare martial law and halt the certification of the 2020 election. = = = | = = = = = = ** Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=289%2E552475%2EhXT6Ym)
**BREAKING NEWS:**
A multi-millionaire hedge fund executive in Pennsylvania who sold out PA workers to enrich himself and his Wall Street friends is **“the key to the GOP's 2024 senate plan.”** [HuffPost] [**We need to respond and fight back NOW. Will you rush a donation to defend PA’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230711-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230711-2&refcode2=289_552475_hXT6Ym&akid=289%2E552475%2EhXT6Ym) **[Rush a Donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230711-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230711-2&refcode2=289_552475_hXT6Ym&akid=289%2E552475%2EhXT6Ym)**
---
Peter,
This is HUGE news: HuffPost just confirmed that top Republicans are “aggressively recruiting” a multi-millionaire hedge fund executive to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — which could decide control of the Senate.
**This would-be GOP opponent could easily self-fund his campaign and outspend us.** Not only that, Mitch McConnell named PA as one of his top targets for 2024 — so we’ll be up against immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to support our campaign, this is it, Peter. We can’t let ourselves be outspent — will you rush $5 or anything you can chip in today so we can raise early resources and compete?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230711-2?refcode=em20230711-2&refcode2=289_552475_hXT6Ym&akid=289%2E552475%2EhXT6Ym)

It only gets worse, Peter. This hedge fund executive and GOP hopeful has ties to foreign governments that pose a direct threat to the United States.
Pennsylvanians deserve someone fighting every day for their bottom line — not for billionaire royal families or the wealthy governments of other countries.
[**We need your urgent support to ensure this GOP hopeful cannot buy PA’s Senate seat with the support of Mitch McConnell and the national Republican establishment. Please, we’ll ask one more time: will you rush a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230711-2?refcode=em20230711-2&refcode2=289_552475_hXT6Ym&akid=289%2E552475%2EhXT6Ym)

Bob Casey for Senate

body:
I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation

| | | **Protect Your Money Before
It's Too Late**
---
**Protect Your Money Before It's Too Late**
---
|
---
Chuck Norris here... I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren.
---
| | **Just take a look around ...**
---
* We’re **$31 Trillion** in debt
* Inflation is running **over 8%**
* A recession is on our doorstep
* And the people in charge keep spending our money.

---
| | In my humble opinion... enough is enough! It’s time for all of us to think carefully about the dollars we hold. I’m not just talking about the money in your checking or savings account - I’m talking about your nest egg and retirement accounts. That’s why I’d like to give you a [_**FREE Wealth Protection Kit**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vD82SauYZAU3a9eSeqn5IA&sysid=1) today, where you can learn how to protect everything you’ve worked for! # **Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**
---
**Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**

### **...This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**

**...This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**

| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here.
What's the best way to **stop Biden's agenda?**
No, it's not voting Republican. Although that might help, there is something much better:
__**It's called voting with your wallet!**__
Here's what I mean...
Democrats get easy votes by giving away newly printed money.
But this cheapens our money supply. And it hurts Americans by forcing them to pay extra for food, rent, and gas.
So what happens when the people start demanding REAL MONEY?
I predict...
---
| | **Biden's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---
| **Biden's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---
| | Which is why I'm asking _all patriotic Americans_ to diversify into PHYSICAL precious metals.
We need to help this process along, and demanding real money protects the country from moral and financial corruption.
_But that's not all it does._
Gold and silver also **safeguard YOUR savings from inflation better than anything else available.**
So it's a win-win for both you and America.
Fortunately, we have a lot of options for investing in precious metals.
One of the best is a **["Self-Directed" gold IRA](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkzLTZlMTY4ODExNmQ3ZDQ5NDM4ZGNlYjAxMGVhNGYzYWZjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2ZyZWVraXQuYmlyY2hnb2xkLmNvbS9yb24tcGF1bC1nb2xkLWlyYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmF2JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmbXNpZD00NzAxMyZzcGxpdD1iJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWV4X3JwYmVfdjAxYV9qdWx5MjMmcGxhY2VtZW50PXJwYmUmY2lkPWJnZ19hZCJ9/TrOAMCKm8jzATNzPIJD04Q)**.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Blue Letter: MAGA Grandma tells Trump to stuff it
body:
Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T376f69a7-8e24-4bdf-88e0-5f9a728fff5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Letter 7/12/23_** _**The latest edition of our award winning (not really, I just l like to say that because it sounds cool) Blue Letter!**_
MAGA Grandma tells Trump to stuff it, accepts responsibility for her role in Jan 6th & calls MAGA a "cult." Maybe there's hope folks. MUST SEE! [bit.ly/3XQTZbp](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26eba8d6-91bd-4ead-adda-64910cd723b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We thought CHATGPT's AI might give us a better answer than Trump about why he stole classified secrets. It didn't disappoint! [bit.ly/3PSKiaG](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5227c78-8bbb-49d0-a904-410ac5d3811f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) America's ultimate political insider shares the 4 types of voters Dems need to win next year. CHECK THIS OUT! This week the **_MI GOP GOT INTO A BRAWL. Really. With each other!_** We were ahead of the curve with a video on near-brawl at a meeting, w/ screaming, pushing & threats, a few months ago. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3331fa5e-ffa9-4838-b4a4-5f7867ae9dfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: CPT Sam Brown Digital Team
subject: “Top recruit,” “One ofRepublicans’ best pickupopportunities”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
See what people are saying about Sam Brown’s campaign!

| | |
---
_[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqo01eicp6hol9grmkvq0gd9p5nps5s8lbmcho8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)_Did you hear the news, Friend? “[**Top Recruit**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhu7p091n398eu0e6sviqdac9s01cnqk5708s1f0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)” - Politico “[**One of Republicans’ best pickup opportunities**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoo3nub1ebddreht81tgsh2ctfav7g10vatkh88o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)” - The Hill “[**Front runner for the Republican nomination**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrluuqn673vo70bg333km9ibn4digkc8dvr2o8n0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)” - Fox News Retired Army Captain Sam Brown has **OFFICIALLY** declared his run as the Republican candidate for United States Senate in Nevada. Nevada has narrowly gone for Democrats for the last decade. Last year, a Democrat Senator won the state by **LESS THAN ONE POINT.**
---
[**Send an Army Captain to the Senate!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zre6n26vdifm1t72evatfpvr4qotfpvu18oh1i4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)
---
**Let me tell you why I chose to work on Captain Brown’s campaign.** Candidates like Sam don’t come around often. In a world of selfish, spineless politicians, Sam has been putting service before self for his entire life. From serving in the Army, to helping veterans get access to critical medications, Sam knows that serving and sacrificing for our country is one of the greatest honors on earth. [**That’s why it’s my honor to manage his campaign from DAY ONE.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuvgotffdp6fe2agrqmhegjhcbpur6vluagqua1g_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs) But, this isn’t going to be a cakewalk, Friend. [**We’re going to have to give this everything we have if we want to win.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpm7dip5b9ehh30e2n9iqiv24n2nhads3vdmlk18_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs) Sam and I can’t do this alone. We need support from every patriot we can get. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Friend. [**Can you chip in any amount to send Captain Sam Brown to the Senate?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5q0018kknvb88g58drubcjvdpsp72pnmn6gik0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs) Your support means everything to us. Sincerely, CPT Sam Brown Digital Team
---
[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdkkmso6g6nvffms92h00uusmbacs0kh243ando_rp22sh2s8i66o74shhm8ob4cdh2bs)

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Re: Pete Buttigieg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | _**DO YOU AGREE?**_
---
Pete Buttigieg is one of the biggest failures of the Biden Administration.

While he’s using his position as Secretary of Transportation to ban gas stoves, our planes are grounded, our supply chain is suffering, trains are derailing, and roads are collapsing.

**Americans deserve better than Pete Buttigieg.**

[**Stand with me now and help me continue to DEMAND Pete Buttigieg be held accountable for his failures.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=91f04a670ff6411c9b9c454c46a302e9&_e=6qoUsRmjkR5-AxwdBft-2Qn9Cluapvkp9QIZnXfOeKnQaga34upj7-mEB2lcb7haYSxerEEJqLRIeG9JTpOxtD1XQ5nFSJ5axhrGDB1Ew2kfPr_PUQcRgku898xz2LmpERN3Tb7-3Y_YJgS9WguhPRITrq5FxhqFNv9Q3_A0KSQ5i4ZQNk-bOxfmgKE9K5EglLHshkbveCUy3YbQzrZdIveGGH-iXT-RDpgnLNcbzDSOMW4JBIIIHVAGequslJAZEH3t_6933SFgZuPBWWwvBaGdIO68rqU0-JyrJDx_YlqzqgC35FU01G_4z2qR-VdShQ8S_i4Oy0TDu4I0vSr7GHZUIXvyB_h0Cn3Wh9YZSpTaocJmnNdzjCl-TL4pBfT5)
---
[**HOLD SECRETARY PETE ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=91f04a670ff6411c9b9c454c46a302e9&_e=6qoUsRmjkR5-AxwdBft-2Qn9Cluapvkp9QIZnXfOeKnQaga34upj7-mEB2lcb7haYSxerEEJqLRIeG9JTpOxtD1XQ5nFSJ5axhrGDB1Ew2kfPr_PUQcRgku898xz2LmpERN3Tb7-3Y_YJgS9WguhPRITrq5FxhqFNv9Q3_A0KSQ5i4ZQNk-bOxfmgKE9K5EglLHshkbveCUy3YbQzrZdIveGGH-iXT-RDpgnLNcbzDQwXesuL1HCtk15FvO3DBIN4KsWrLPpkL_0dythQD92Kwt8IhovVduN-kXz73cyvEtu1TwZCrOzMcZTduzCKm4zDhLUsitT-s4jqJaBjrDyY5mVD1krSDEVDIWwyHQDTrZNcxE-uM5XgEpHw97lYgTf)
---
America’s infrastructure is in dire need of an overhaul.

As Transportation Secretary, Pete Buttigieg is supposed to keep America moving.

_But instead, he’s slowing us down behind Green Extremist nonsense while he ignores his duties._

I’ve had enough.

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES 2023 CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT PROGRAM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, JULY 12
GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES 2023 CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT PROGRAM
(ATLANTA) - Today, Greater Georgia announced its first-ever candidate recruitment program ahead of the November 2023 municipal election. The program will focus on identifying and recruiting a class of qualified conservatives to run for local office in cities across the state, as well as equipping candidates with the resources and training to run winning campaigns. Georgia's 2023 municipal election will be held Tuesday, November 7th. The candidate qualifying period begins Monday, August 21st.
"In Georgia and across the country, the Left is [organizing](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013DUkCmgT5-2nzrMJbf67S6TwRfEiydym4bKkNiVr0-dImRJcN037LOErqmJLudh7-6oZ4irpI6Cz1OqPLNWc28fMMJRn49Kq6YDKyZpSahjh5mZYt3n-QWN-tE-EcevMXDXydTpiz_Q2K2ZMRnPP5-vL6UczEnsB4e1rhaxj-HbrRg-NbdW8qHQvNay4nBbCbmcT8m7VPzun1xSsKvAPejBdvQII5peetM9bqxCBpw9bD6FffQTpz9vId15qXBKrhlwRHHTqcd638ByHD40vkF9i-9hP9SCQNTknNo08CFvqTWXb9e56gg==&c=d2fWl6d7h34QmgWOz7KFCt-a6dKfk3JPJ666tvsOhMiyiaIWiLBe7w==&ch=VaQx4Jan3EZ9byhL3D3BphIJOswI5z5fHaQTx2ASwOyRVak03JNkCw==) to take control of cities and counties by recruiting candidates to carry out a dangerous progressive agenda that fundamentally upends public safety, education, and our way of life at the local level," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman and former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler. "This year, Greater Georgia is going on offense with a program designed to recruit top-tier candidates and empower them with the tools to run and win. By building a strong bench, we'll be better prepared to take back our communities - and deliver strong conservative leadership where it matters most."
Greater Georgia will focus on recruiting a class of conservatives to run in open and toss-up seats in cities across the state, for positions including mayor and city council. Those interested in running for local office can learn more about the Greater Georgia Candidate Recruitment Program by signing up [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013DUkCmgT5-2nzrMJbf67S6TwRfEiydym4bKkNiVr0-dImRJcN037LOErqmJLudh745ZXaqXiH-7iY5Z4eHA4DOJiJt7UluJdcmCNQfaHsJcxJOLCo0ecVo6GwONZhADHaLYAG-jH_QrbNxmQJytT3-aDi0vhwKVHJRxRNvkmVTw=&c=d2fWl6d7h34QmgWOz7KFCt-a6dKfk3JPJ666tvsOhMiyiaIWiLBe7w==&ch=VaQx4Jan3EZ9byhL3D3BphIJOswI5z5fHaQTx2ASwOyRVak03JNkCw==).
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c)(4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)

body:
I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation

| | | **Protect Your Money Before
It's Too Late**
---
**Protect Your Money Before It's Too Late**
---
|
---
Chuck Norris here... I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren.
---
| | **Just take a look around ...**
---
* We're **$31 Trillion** in debt
* Inflation is running **over 8%**
* A recession is on our doorstep
* And the people in charge keep spending our money.

---
| | In my humble opinion... enough is enough! It's time for all of us to think carefully about the dollars we hold. I'm not just talking about the money in your checking or savings account - I'm talking about your nest egg and retirement accounts. That's why I'd like to give you a [_**FREE Wealth Protection Kit**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcb9e8b5dbe746cd9348cb6d3e2070d2&_e=P8xZ0yb4nuQ8q8hWlUHIEfOfinVabSZ58US6dXeMJQ1tCg4sNjCmByShDvqz2Psu4_eHEgkNnZalz-gG-Xo4TcEdmXFnb6lEsySFDtpSC-wEgbfVDaxzaRjry9-Y68tjIj7nIANLJTrB5b4iKNGSj-Ms3jApW8cZb-ZDpzugdC9mIJ-n-WLrBSNsvfQNv41DWUiDi68IO81wOtON0aEvpNNo3P2LaLtEkhoWDriIM4oQtLBjJQka9GocMmopNmpA_a2Fl5T-urGjQx1FMMX-eBQsfCVqNq9M80hJgWsuzGzoKww8eT5b5v--qDxQCfPzZrBGtRDVEuqmuBydYgF7i_TUHDJiy6QeTC75cIWBmM-g74yQ0GbvbpZGkt65-zGaXad6X7_vv4OrGb2ekAC_Nm_L7gIzsj5IzFqX3tlh3SdcgLvmfiVOAhfgDw-t6BMTlJkoOutrj3Nnnqs37-AISa2AAYNDVNyjmD50ZwRSi5ZydHxUdWLeIRcPqSXVif87yox7Cvx4lAd1ZPTIHwek2Q%3D%3D) today, where you can learn how to protect everything you've worked for! * * *
# **CRITICAL: How the Fed's Digital Dollar Steals Your Privacy**
The Digital Dollar, rolling out soon, is the Fed's sinister attempt to end
privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial
move.

**The Fed will have the power to control your bank account and, worse, seize your assets** \- much like the notorious FTX cryptocurrency exchange founder who stole billions of dollars from his own clients.
**The outlook is not good.** The Digital Dollar would allow the government to **track every purchase you make** , decide how you spend your money, and prevent you from accessing your savings just like the Canadian government did last year when they froze the assets of all protesting truckers.**Imagine a world** where Biden caps your supermarket purchases, prevents you from buying needed medication, decides the books you're allowed to read, and what weapons you can purchase to protect your home. name: Terri Sewell
subject: I’m looking forward to your feedback, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/eifIB-d6IOm-h09CKD0egjvEkv-AEOLPPPNQhuc1hbU=/jKI_ofJUlCXgJ1tsk6d5Ci-JOyxJmB1QKEtPKiVdQXI=)
---

| |
---
Growing up in Alabama's rural Black Belt and now serving the civil rights district of our state in Congress, I'm committed to making sure every American has a voice in our democracy.

**But first, I want to hear from you: what issues do you want to see Congress addressing right now.**

[**Can you take a moment to complete my quick survey and share your top priorities with me >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eifIB-d6IOm-h09CKD0egjvEkv-AEOLPPPNQhuc1hbU=/ZBz6ouSVA4D9xK6LzdFBse6C4u7NKpLQeObYbMEclQM=?source=EM_NBI_TS_20230708_SV_WelcomeSeries_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_Welcome)

| [Take the Survey->](https://act.myngp.com/el/eifIB-d6IOm-h09CKD0egjvEkv-AEOLPPPNQhuc1hbU=/ZBz6ouSVA4D9xK6LzdFBse6C4u7NKpLQeObYbMEclQM=?source=EM_NBI_TS_20230708_SV_WelcomeSeries_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_Welcome)
---

Your feedback is crucial to help my team and I continue to prioritize what desperately needs to be addressed in our communities.

Whether that means bringing back funding to expand broadband in the state of Alabama or awarding grants to improve and strengthen our infrastructure - we want to know!

[**Let me know what 's important to you by taking my quick priorities survey.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eifIB-d6IOm-h09CKD0egjvEkv-AEOLPPPNQhuc1hbU=/ZBz6ouSVA4D9xK6LzdFBse6C4u7NKpLQeObYbMEclQM=?source=EM_NBI_TS_20230708_SV_WelcomeSeries_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_Welcome)

I look forward to hearing from you,

Terri

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Sen. Jacky Rosen & Hillary’s VP pick are coming after me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
They know that patriots like you and I could change the D.C. power structure for good.

| | |
---
Friend, **My opponent just teamed up with Hillary’s 2016 VP candidate to smear me and drag my name through the mud.** Monday morning, before I even finished formally announcing my candidacy, an email from Liberal Democrat Sen. Jacky Rosen hit the inboxes of millions of democrat activists. Her plan is to build an unstoppable war chest to end my candidacy before it even begins. [**Friend, I need your help to make sure her plan fails. Can you chip in $10, $15, or even $25 RIGHT AWAY to ensure that our team has the resources necessary to fend off these absurd attacks?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zams8hr1n1i5fe7eh77n9e5ajn2p6qbqra868mco_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm2o31cph2bs)
---
[**STAND WITH ME**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpqevqa0fdl41v8l17ka7ov6jneu1us74vdlnsko_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm2o31cph2bs)
---
In her shameless attack message**she claimed that I’m an extremist**. In reality - Sen. Rosen is the true extremist. She’s received resounding endorsements from radical pro-abortion groups like NARAL and Planned Parenthood. She’s rubber stamped Joe Biden’s reckless $6.2 Trillion spending spree. And she’s done everything in her power to help create the ongoing crisis at our southern border. Friend, Nevada deserves better than Sen. Jacky Rosen. America deserves better. YOU deserve better. [**Please, join me in the fight to win in Nevada and help Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate! >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkmkha4ua07r4423nkt7ndvmevrnq116mvsrrk48_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm2o31cph2bs) Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, U.S Army (Ret.)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: People and sea turtles are both eating plastic
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1871558?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A baby sea turtle CHOKES TO DEATH after mistaking a drifting plastic bag for a tasty jellyfish. Before the mama turtle can help, she becomes TRAPPED and ENTANGLED in other plastic waste.** This tragic tale is the inevitable result of our planet’s accelerating plastics crisis, Friend. And it’s greedy fossil fuel corporations that are the source of most single-use plastics. They and other _**profit-seeking companies are polluting our air, water, and food**_ and drowning our oceans in **enough plastic to fill a garbage truck every minute!** Scientists predict there will be _**MORE PLASTIC THAN FISH**_ in the ocean by 2050! But it’s not just the marine critters who suffer -- people are unknowingly consuming plastic too. In fact, **the average person consumes a credit card’s worth of plastic EVERY WEEK![Please, Friend, tell President Biden to save our oceans from the plastics apocalypse and to protect people and wildlife before it’s too late!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1871559?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***142 SIGNATURES MISSING FROM YOUR STATE*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1871560?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The reality gets even uglier when you go back to how these plastics are created in the first place. Giant plastic production facilities **spew pollution onto nearby communities** \-- largely low-wealth communities and communities of color. The people who live here face _**increased risk of cancer, respiratory diseases, and other illnesses**_ while plastic corporation executives**RAKE in the profits!**
The plastics crisis is getting worse every minute we fail to act, Friend. More waste is being dumped into our oceans. More tiny plastics break down and infect our food and water.**But if you help us send a powerful message to President Biden RIGHT NOW, we can help make a difference.[Fight the PLASTICS APOCALYPSE: add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1871561?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1871560?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Michelle Chan
Vice president of programs,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
See what people are saying about Sam Brown’s campaign!

Nevada has narrowly gone for Democrats for the last decade. Last year, a Democrat Senator won the state by **LESS THAN ONE POINT.**
---
[**Send an Army Captain to the Senate!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z80il2qskp3j73d0q3hsn9hr08msnp5tsllv2q60_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjmao72c1h2bs)
---
**Let me tell you why I chose to work on Captain Brown’s campaign.** Candidates like Sam don’t come around often. In a world of selfish, spineless politicians, Sam has been putting service before self for his entire life. From serving in the Army, to helping veterans get access to critical medications, Sam knows that serving and sacrificing for our country is one of the greatest honors on earth. [**That’s why it’s my honor to manage his campaign from DAY ONE.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zreh132otpmk61fckjepctv42lblm5n30p3vamdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjmao72c1h2bs) But, this isn’t going to be a cakewalk, Friend. We need support from every patriot we can get. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Friend. [**Can you chip in any amount to send Captain Sam Brown to the Senate?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2t2d38ihtqte8nkj6s4lgd9gh686tj3gq0mndrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjmao72c1h2bs) Your support means everything to us. | **“Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28706%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lpavD%2bmrDixLBeX%2fMEPrOQ&sysid=1) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the “Amazon secret royalty program...” And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It’s available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

name: Katy Personette
subject: Quick Update from the Desk of Katy Personette, Director of Development and Policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
Good Afternoon ,
I hope you are having a wonderful summer and staying cool in this heat wave! Happy to provide you a quick update from my desk as the Director of Development and Policy for the New Pennsylvania Project (NPP).
For those who are new to work work, NPP a voting rights organization with a primary focus of year-round voter registration, civic eduction and mobilization centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth.
Save the Date
New Pennsylvania Project's Quarterly Donor Briefing Call
When: Thursday, September 7th 6:30pm
Where: Zoom
News You Can Use
How the Steel City became a vanguard of the progressive movement [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/steel-city-became-vanguard-progressive-movement-rcna90410?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
“Pittsburgh is becoming known as a powerhouse of progressive politics after progressive candidates notched a string of victories over the city’s more moderate Democratic establishment...
What’s more, progressives here say their efforts to drive turnout among younger voters and voters of color could play a critical role in delivering battleground Pennsylvania to President Joe Biden and Democratic Sen. Bob Casey next year, pointing to advances they’ve made in recent years — but particularly in 2022 — as evidence.
Last fall, turnout in Allegheny County increased by more than 30,000 votes compared with the 2018 midterms — a cycle that saw staggering turnout across the country midway through Trump’s term in office.”
Early 2024 Congressional Vulnerability Ratings [https://www.politicspa.com/early-2024-congressional-vulnerability-ratings/123196/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
“U.S. Reps. Susan Wild, Matt Cartwright and Chris Deluzio are each in districts that could make them vulnerable to a challenge in 2024, while other members of the state’s congressional delegation are also being targeted in upcoming elections...
As these races take shape, Pennsylvania will be a major presidential battleground. It remains to be seen which party could benefit from the presidential contest down-ballot”
In Closing
NPP’s work of consistent voter registration and civic education in Allegheny county can be seen as a northstar for our work across the Commonwealth. Not only expanding the electorate to include the increasing population of the youth; but also, electing leaders who represent the values of their communities. When we elect leaders that deliver on true progress, voters can witness the fruits of their labors through the democratic process and participate in every election - twice a year.
As we pass the halfway mark through 2023, we look to the general election in November and know that we are only six months away from 2024. Our work of year-round voter registration and civic education is paramount as we understand the vulnerabilities the 2024 election cycle brings.
Invest in our work today to be prepared for 2024 and continue expanding the electorate to include Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth.
Donate to the New Pennsylvania Project! [https://bit.ly/NPPDonate]
In Solidarity,
Katy Personette
Director of Development and Policy
New Pennsylvania Project
Mobile: 610-416-8792
Email: kathryn@newpaproject.org [kathryn@newpaproject.org]
Working hard to transform and expand the electorate in the Commonwealth
Website: https://www.newpaproject.org/ [https://www.newpaproject.org/]
Twitter: https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania]
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject/ [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject/]
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/newpennsylvania/ [https://www.instagram.com/newpennsylvania/]
Donate here: https://bit.ly/NPPDonate [https://bit.ly/NPPDonate]
Register to vote, update your registration or check your status here:
bit.ly/NPPVotePA [https://l.instagram.com/?u=http%3A%2F%2Fbit.ly%2FNPPVotePA&e=ATM_gbRz64Wk8svRTBU0NhjfGj_5Q8XQcuJzFNcTGptEZ8a85mocs1R9gMulxZQMvPTPsiNyFldYbMkA8KAvYRwLu8HGgrtk&s=1]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/hv49NkLeaEqRKBF0Enr9lA2?unsubscribedata=RvdUS5qIWy6CovTYjBjc7nG9liApMj8elfrsegrkUKWsmN8w0pNe5ic%2BIDg0ymHt%2Bh%2FwcR4IDY5KFGXLKmbmiCgnlMuwGNyqFOMWUzj8RMzyk%2BDSadVvVxS%2BEr%2FncFqJXFVEe9CPVeT2WT%2BVXRWmNTil3NVlDpwznhbMNpWxPgV%2ByRjNx%2FBD4xBvdc858eT3hH38WfQ0BeqD6hFS7fAosk3g7pNU6IbZlTNna17L%2FDjArAmAyO9eDaUqzHmbRNdcnITkDAlnbr351qeqpDHDukGsy67TqvVueAdEHQztAdeyBIZqVICm%2FcEl1J1dls%2FQuKZY%2Fqs5bKNcuShXWeyIdYUZSqxrveu4ctfBzZXChfrpoULfZ72AL%2B4%2F7qquvmItjDaOedWmcavYGlFcKbmB%2B5Fp%2FAGJlbrAwofl7IKkh44%3D .

name: Jon Tester
subject: Mitch McConnell’s self-funding recruit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, you know I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick.

This past month was incredibly busy for Team Tester. From public
fundraising deadlines to a new Mitch McConnell recruit jumping in the race
to run against me, we’re at a vital turning point.

That’s why I need your support now more than ever in this campaign.

The coming months will be critical. We need the resources to respond to
any incoming attacks from opponents and national Republicans like Mitch
McConnell. McConnell is desperate to buy this Senate seat in Montana, so
they’re pulling out all the stops—including recruiting a millionaire
self-funder to run against me.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18994?t=1001&akid=3391%2E346206%2E2JXR86 ]Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today --
split with Charles Booker -- to help fuel our movement to help keep me in
the Senate fighting to protect the Montana way of life?

CHIP IN →

Thanks for stepping up today. When we win this race, it will be because of
folks like you.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18994?t=1002&akid=3391%2E346206%2E2JXR86 ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230712-3391-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3391_346206_2JXR86&akid=3391%2E346206%2E2JXR86

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3391%2E346206%2E2JXR86

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:

Can you chip in $10, $15, or even $25 RIGHT AWAY to ensure that our team has the resources necessary to fend off these absurd attacks?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7o4vh5nbp80a32mgtah2rbbp4vuio4c7kl7gv90_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjmeor2c1h2bs)

name: Team Eugene
subject: the USPS is issuing layoffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for Attorney General
body:
| **USPS begins issuing layoff notices to some employees**
_The Postal Service hopes to find new jobs for those impacted, but it has not detailed the reasons for the cuts.[1]_

Team, our mail is slower, postage is more expensive, and despite the impacts on mail delivery, the Postal Service wants to cut more workers.

Folks across Pennsylvania, and our nation, rely on USPS. We need to take action to protect it.

[**Join us and sign our petition to protect the USPS →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66363047/416104598/-2004705345?refcode=email_071223_protectusps_t1&utm_campaign=email_071223_protectusps_t1&source=email_071223_protectusps_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgwYTljZi1hZjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2vnYE5MDKjUb8wUHl6hyniwg6HZ6Ib73UzWUe9QSjQ=&emci=d91c873d-4b1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9080a9cf-af20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) | | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66363048/416104599/-2004705345?refcode=email_071223_protectusps_t1&utm_campaign=email_071223_protectusps_t1&source=email_071223_protectusps_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgwYTljZi1hZjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2vnYE5MDKjUb8wUHl6hyniwg6HZ6Ib73UzWUe9QSjQ=&emci=d91c873d-4b1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9080a9cf-af20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249)
---
Team,

The United States Postal Service is one of our country’s oldest and most critically important institutions – but it’s under attack.

USPS saw a severe decline in on-time mail delivery after Trump’s appointee Louis DeJoy took over as Postmaster General – a decline that continues to this day.

Team, Americans – especially our seniors and vets – rely on the USPS for delivery of prescriptions and Social Security checks, not to mention mail-in voting! Thousands of small businesses rely on the USPS to deliver critical goods and services. We must fight to protect this vital institution.
[**Sign your name to show voters in Cresco want to protect the USPS →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66363049/416104600/-2004705345?refcode=email_071223_protectusps_t1&utm_campaign=email_071223_protectusps_t1&source=email_071223_protectusps_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgwYTljZi1hZjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2vnYE5MDKjUb8wUHl6hyniwg6HZ6Ib73UzWUe9QSjQ=&emci=d91c873d-4b1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9080a9cf-af20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249)

In the past, when Congress or the President failed to act, it was state Attorneys General who filed complaints or sued the USPS for their reckless leadership and actions–proving once again they are our last line of defense against corruption and government waste, fraud and abuse.

When Postmaster DeJoy tried to slow the mail before the 2020 election – Attorneys General took action. When DeJoy tried to push an egregious plan to cripple the Postal Service–Attorneys General took action. When the USPS tried to impose service cuts and increase costs – Attorneys General took action.

Our next Attorney General will play a key role in protecting the USPS. We need to elect someone who will fight for it, not stand by while it falls further into debt and leaves millions of Pennsylvanians without the reliable mail service they need to live and run their businesses.

[**Click here to show voters want to protect the USPS →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66363051/416104602/-2004705345?refcode=email_071223_protectusps_t1&utm_campaign=email_071223_protectusps_t1&source=email_071223_protectusps_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDgwYTljZi1hZjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2vnYE5MDKjUb8wUHl6hyniwg6HZ6Ib73UzWUe9QSjQ=&emci=d91c873d-4b1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9080a9cf-af20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249)

body:
A 1000-year rainstorm has caused catastrophic flooding in Vermont.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Wednesday, JULY 12, 2023
---|---
**Good morning! **On this day in 1962, the Rolling Stones gave their [first public performance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsULGOqzAQ_BrTgex1YqCgiF5El3fllcjBC-zJ4MjehEtz337C9TW7s6PRjmY-b8PNkqdt_m9X7HgKgx2ZXjjIulRQgh6gcN2ECKgL7JRpWmXaWqli6WRzNjC6ph5By8mezqaRaJyTDhp3R11QBxK0rBUo0EbV1YSIRkOr7pNtsbHiJNERh1h9Bdp4wcm_wwtjNYa18N3C_EhCXwT0Avp936unozQeivWZaDxkAvrEIRImAX0M_shSJg4bpnKimLjEF8Zypjl_0UJffoS-MH6z0NePTcAZpM1zCZx3eq4rRgF1yudG88IC_j28faPLFC9IMaNscaDrYZOpmeaqiJ177OQ9JVOLk5xXSz6n4r9L_g0AAP__As57cQ) at Marquee Club in London. After securing the gig, Mick Jagger said, "I hope they don't think we're a Rock 'n Roll outfit."

In today's edition, we're covering the devastating rainstorm that's causing chaos in Vermont, the sharp decline in American trust in institutions, and Aretha Franklin's hand-written will discovered under couch cushions.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljcHQEzMFSqvKVrRwvMEVPhELk0Vv--aubM7-lJ7_MyX0Kp5Xb9CBv7ntscll4ePCt7AjwhzSiTz8zIJNmDGR0YZwHk6smamNOoOcZzItQuGGUXRDtqFSKcZfGokJQFBCQDdsjMbAgdxBwcj0Foxan0tg9frdz6yrn-tgfvw9I2Wf3a-13Qm8BJ4HQcxwvrn9H00zdB71rJ3af7UWot38YKra5bKPUZ66_f_gIAAP__-4JPdw) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). ## Vermont Deals With Intense Flooding
A 1000-year rainstorm has caused [catastrophic flooding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnsTcs7nAhHhi6ZEvXjha2j3AVBgufEuXtq3Tu_C2__u_bfAucudy_wk5eYp3DKvygWTsFqNDM2G8-EiGZnjzYywR2cgB98qNeLNKyuI9tBb0ZsJc40jQacmEBsj171Gi0AwQ0FtwQicganGCJYaJL6EZNG0ttw0_lIoliftUHtWGte599EjnOznx2eO3wWuh5Dq-Qan1zh9cHtb0WUTHXunG5qzVIOKXVI_Gq3kQHZaamuFEhdSTO6lyriAILk9ZW2yHJnvvmt-PJOfNpXTfq-x44_zXI_0t-AwAA__92V2Sy) in Vermont.

Flash floods have trapped hundreds of residents, and swelling rivers have wiped out roads, destroyed [track trains](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyqzAQAL9GdMegE0imUPEaOr82JSOjk1EiOI-QkfP3mUlSpt3ZYmffrvPVxRT3-3-3kS2BZ7eUeNLcGZAIqGZsvA1ESKohK_VllHo0UjardWiGfkSll14qlGZAP3gcwy0M2oQbNtFih6ozEiUqLU0biEgrHOUtuJEuTvQd-Vg4t-8c97JSSJ98Um4X3ppk11Ieh1D_BE4Cp1prG_hVyZX1RxE40atk2gh-qcDJZ94JzuiJIbuYMjsPJbvl44BEocDxPB60e_IQd0hPn7jCSXnjvUBI7lghJGbfZOsfNaYUD21E3903F9N3WPn701cAAAD__-4ebW8), and pushed a major dam to the brink. Water levels at the Wrightsville Dam, about 6 miles upstream from the state capitol, have reached one foot from maximum capacity. ([See drone footage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdWvrPrP4MHljAVsTFG1-bcHnKaKjla8fZIsDJ_w6ffx3E8knS5Xd5o5qptGems8uDRpR3gDv2IdqqNGdlbrhBzgVgSgL3WxOVw8FwwT9mHltBlBykTx0Cn1s5WKjr0LgEC-ghp35g5eixwalQ4kwmOJ9Fl3X8uctMrt_69PHjdn5fZ9npVvW_GvxgcDA76FNW_ZnB4ZVaid-mdxOCwKenXZnCAmHIO4EsIPoKPJYJd63R_Su-yxWSCu8wk_Xeh_4t_AgAA___DF1UB)).

Parts of Montpelier have already been [submerged](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS0WdzgcDAxdvCVrRovaR0yFTWRfE_XtK7Vr5n_49d0u4yWVWrb7Na0cJbcxTVKePBo6AZ7QjqjnmJmRreYIzgdwgQD0EtPk6UzZBesZQqY5u4xhsmwDmkygS0SD1hAgoHVAXWZmZzHAZ06BfVK94blI27uvVjZZONef9uS9m9qqa1xEHoeyHwoHhYO8ish_UzjcOMnC-zVJaZvC4ZAk34fCARz50BN6CgHOZHqLeo_z41VqLYcj1Zv7mkr9e8h78m8AAAD__0mWVa4) in several feet of water, prompting residents to shelter in upper levels or rooftops. In the downtown area, people have been forced to transit in kayaks, and the first floors of many businesses are underwater.

President Biden has declared a national emergency in the state and authorized FEMA to begin relief efforts. No deaths have been reported.
## Ukraine Kills Russian General
A British Storm Shadow missile [killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHOmzAQAOCnMZsRPgiOB4Z2YEtVNUNHdMFHuOawkW2C8vZd_vF_g0_f39t0QxYOz1-40VCWOOFc-E1TY7UBDe0ElR8WIqC2osH0V2d6Z42p1qHxM_r54jprTPdwiLZDcta4Ge3SL1DxAA20jTVgoO2NrRci6ltw5rGgoyuqriHPJab6X-RQVlrkE9-U6jlulQxrKXtW7Q8Fo4LxPM_aI8tnQ5Z6jvXxUjAGOrOCEVPhWUgbgKvtLhcF458jZ8agnxQooehXiGfQO6UcA4p89O-jcNAvFiGvfyYunFedj30XJq_vJaZN31f08dQb58xC9Vo2qdLg95NFOPdWdc3zy7NV5fvA_wEAAP__ErF1pg) the highest-ranking Russian general yet to die in the war in Ukraine.

Petro Andriushchenko died in an attack on the occupied city of Berdyansk. He was the ninth Russian general to die in the conflict, and he was known personally by Vladimir Putin.

Russian military channels [confirmed the kill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd1jMkAdxQfEaumy7pTUbj2M2GCzAsbJfv0rqba90dY7O52W8UIgh3T5oZdfmPNK1hQePykpAiXrEbnIzM7Lu2IE5D2AGC9AtDknTPLBF5H88oIXzZMicgLVViIa64FChVhYQUBuw_czMRuMAXzMNfCZxUjyFlkv_nUNqC8_xmR9c-mteu-iW1rYq9H-BXqA_jqNvHPlWaFv6a-73-2vNJU4y8VEF-hdOoFdWoAcQ6MteayC53wuFxPKgIiM1ru39kIlalj8cOdX7U257C0mg74qbtiPEGKqx4qRuK4X4Vmp_F_oNAAD___PNZ40) after Ukrainian officials said the general had been "liquidated" by Kyiv's armed forces.

Berdyansk is a strategically-located city on the Sea of Azov, and it's been under constant attack from the Ukrainian-launched Storm Shadows--the longest range missiles available to the Ukrainians.
## Americans are Down on Institutions
A Gallop poll shows that the percentage of Americans confident in the higher education system [has dropped](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy6yAQQNGvQR0aWGwJFRSvUefXptSsxSJtBoEGsB3_fSapU9_mzvm4LTfkyGn7jwe5FvKCa-MnLWqUGiSYBTrvAhGQ6cjpwU56mEatu92B9eiBgJDCVY8etJ0MWrpbdacAoWMHCowaNWgwgx77QESDgUnfA05kUVwUeW659J-ZU9spxHd-UunXfHTR7a2dVZh_AmYBc6JX7TeM8XH-dAHzmWMUMF-VNVcQMONBhVdMVa45BfaUVpI7bzsVSf6xYuOcpM-vJOuO5YzvHuv51RXnzxfHyHUYxUVtB3L8XWh_i3wHAAD____hZHI) to a dismal 36%.

That number was 48% in 2018 and 57% in 2015. The findings match the larger trend found by Gallop's polling; Americans are[ far less trusting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGnwZ0tMzhgCopr3OXaKy2Ch3hOE7DMJLm8_Wm33vovfun7c12vkZjK_Xd8YJBc15iEXriOrtfQg1mh20JGBDQdBm1nr613Wnd7cODB4G3OabtdTJwmnbRGvMDk_Gzn1FGAEczoNGgwVrshI6I14PUtR49zVNOIG0k9h7-ViuyY-VNfeA6pPjoOu8jRlPmlYFGwFHy34R6Zn8dXV7AclVnBchlnbb2CZacm9aQUmT8913efI8neU2lC8hSqpfWpFqHyxDbEdvzrzrAdb2KmZp2axvsjEn_f5WeM_wEAAP__ZZRiPg) of institutions as a whole--including the police force, the church, and the presidency.

Of all the institutions tracked, Congress has the poorest confidence scores. In a poll taken last month, only eight percent of respondents said they had confidence in Congress's ability to function.

clean_body: A 1000-year rainstorm has caused catastrophic flooding in Vermont. | | | | | | Wednesday, JULY 12, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1962, the Rolling Stones gave their at Marquee Club in London. After securing the gig, Mick Jagger said, "I hope they don't think we're a Rock 'n Roll outfit." In today's edition, we're covering the devastating rainstorm that's causing chaos in Vermont, the sharp decline in American trust in institutions, and Aretha Franklin's hand-written will discovered under couch cushions. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Vermont Deals With Intense Flooding A 1000-year rainstorm has caused in Vermont. Flash floods have trapped hundreds of residents, and swelling rivers have wiped out roads, destroyed , and pushed a major dam to the brink. Water levels at the Wrightsville Dam, about 6 miles upstream from the state capitol, have reached one foot from maximum capacity. (). Parts of Montpelier have already been in several feet of water, prompting residents to shelter in upper levels or rooftops. In the downtown area, people have been forced to transit in kayaks, and the first floors of many businesses are underwater. President Biden has declared a national emergency in the state and authorized FEMA to begin relief efforts. No deaths have been reported. Ukraine Kills Russian General A British Storm Shadow missile the highest-ranking Russian general yet to die in the war in Ukraine. Petro Andriushchenko died in an attack on the occupied city of Berdyansk. He was the ninth Russian general to die in the conflict, and he was known personally by Vladimir Putin. Russian military channels after Ukrainian officials said the general had been "liquidated" by Kyiv's armed forces. Berdyansk is a strategically-located city on the Sea of Azov, and it's been under constant attack from the Ukrainian-launched Storm Shadows--the longest range missiles available to the Ukrainians. Americans are Down on Institutions A Gallop poll shows that the percentage of Americans confident in the higher education system to a dismal 36%. That number was 48% in 2018 and 57% in 2015. The findings match the larger trend found by Gallop's polling; Americans are of institutions as a whole--including the police force, the church, and the presidency. Of all the institutions tracked, Congress has the poorest confidence scores. In a poll taken last month, only eight percent of respondents said they had confidence in Congress's ability to function. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhd2kdlvlfhunq0ha01eu2qkvqav0v09mm311kng_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm9ob4c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zugpk0lmu4kbse3k29kg0nfmv4k6ssehn0nagj2o_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm9ob4c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z49aincpclg456r5u4ud9c337sc7tn1p90f4e5a8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shjm9ob4c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Caldwell?=
subject: Let’s talk about Ukraine
body:
Two recent developments threaten to drastically escalate the conflict and pull the U.S. further into this foreign war. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10381619?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

We’re long overdue for a frank national conversation about U.S. support for the endless war in Ukraine.

As I write this email, the war in Ukraine has cost Americans _$113 billion_ in military and economic aid packages thanks to Congress.

With recent reports indicating the U.S. is literally [running out](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2f1a82aa4b&e=17913c7d6d) of ammunition to send to Ukraine, Americans are left wondering: how did we get to this place?

**Two words: Incremental. Escalation.**

Month after month, Congress approves another “limited” aid package, Biden commits new deadly weapons, and other lines we were promised the U.S. would not cross in the war are stepped over with _zero accountability_.

Now two recent developments threaten to drastically escalate the conflict and pull the U.S. further into this foreign war.

**1\. War-mongers in the U.S. and Europe are pushing for Ukraine membership into NATO**

Six months ago the prospect of admitting Ukraine into the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) would have been virtually unthinkable. Why? Because NATO membership means “that an armed attack against one or more of them in Europe or North America shall be considered an attack against them all.”

Translation: _If Ukraine were formally admitted into NATO while the current conflict was ongoing, the U.S. would be forced into an armed conflict with Russia_.

As of this week, NATO leaders meeting in Lithuania are openly debating the proposition of Ukrainian membership into the organization. And war-mongers back home are working to pass a Congressional resolution urging admission of Ukraine into NATO.

We cannot let this happen.

**2\. The U.S. to send deadly cluster bombs to Ukraine**

Last week the Administration confirmed that it will send controversial cluster munitions to Ukraine.

These munitions have high dud rates that leave vast swaths of land littered with live explosives and virtually uninhabitable. In Laos for example, where ordinances [are still being cleared](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3163dca4c4&e=17913c7d6d), more than 25,000 people have been killed or injured by these deadly munitions since the U.S. bombing campaign in the 1970s as part of the broader Vietnam War. They also pose a risk to Ukrainian forces advancing across landscapes riddled with cluster bombs provided by the U.S.

But, the tragedy of committing deadly weapons to this conflict aside, as I said on [Twitter](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b80f34d66c&e=17913c7d6d), the broader U.S. foreign policy debate is essentially a math problem.
---
|
---
| We simply don’t have the industrial, financial, or military capacity to do everything that the foreign policy elite wants the U.S. to do. _That reality can’t be willed away_.

Fortunately, there are members of Congress like Senator J.D. Vance, Rep. Bob Good, Rep. Chip Roy and others who are challenging both the Biden Administration and Congress's endless aid packages to Ukraine and escalatory moves like admission to NATO.

**CRA Primer:[How Congress Should Approach Future Aid Requests for Ukraine](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d83882b644&e=17913c7d6d)**

Friends, we’re working 24/7 at the Center for Renewing America to build a coalition in Congress and wage a public media campaign to oppose further escalation and entanglement in the war in Ukraine.

**It’s an uphill battle but we’re winning support and changing hearts and minds along the way.**

[Your support will go a long way](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6048f1b779&e=17913c7d6d) in helping us stop sending endless aid packages to Ukraine and change America’s course away from potential deadly involvement in yet another foreign war.
---
| Sincerely,

Dan Caldwell
Vice President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=098c0279ed&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7023c71d3f&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f1cc7ed86e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=1d13b7455a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=1d13b7455a).

Kevin McCarthy says George Santos ‘shouldn’t run for re-election’ Peter, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy went on tv yesterday morning for an interview with Fox & Friends. When asked if he was supporting George Santos’ re-election campaign, McCarthy laughed and said Santos “should not” run for re-election. In the same breath, McCarthy proudly announced that the GOP would hold onto New York’s 3rd Congressional District with another Republican candidate. But despite McCarthy’s calls for him not to run for re-election, George Santos has defiantly tweeted that he is still pressing ahead: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92e25cae-5f0d-43f7-8164-5306ca88c7aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Santos’ stubborn refusal to resign means we need to fight harder to defeat him. That’s why we’re supporting Anna Kaplan, a Democratic NY Senator with a track record of flipping seats from red to blue. [Will you pitch in $25 or more – spit with Blue Amp Action – to help Anna Kaplan send George Santos into political retirement?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac9bb911-fa20-4144-af0f-a534861b6b09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T229202ff-6696-4f08-8f83-c0d12f76678c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) George Santos is an embarrassment to our district, country, and the entire U.S. Congress. We need to defeat him once and for all. Thanks for your help, Team Anna Kaplan for New York P.S. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Andy Kim
subject: Kids on summer break shouldn’t wonder where their next meal will come from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
For many children and teens, summer break means pool parties, outdoor adventures, camp, and family vacations. However, 9 million children across the country face a different reality during this season — a reality where no school means no access to breakfast or lunch.

A lot of children rely on school meals. When school is out, and there's no cafeteria serving up breakfast and lunch, these kids can face uncertainty about when and where they'll get their next meal.

In the wealthiest, most powerful country in the world, no child should have to worry about where their next meal will come from.

It's time to rise and meet the challenge that child hunger presents and ensure kids across New Jersey and the country are able to get nutritious meals all year round, including when school is closed. That's why I've introduced legislation to help expand free summer meals to ensure that children have access to nutritious meals during summer break.

By expanding access to free summer meals, we can make a real difference in the lives of these children and teens. It's not just about making sure they have enough to eat; it's about giving them the chance to grow, learn, and enjoy their summer just like any other kid.

I hope we can come together and work towards a brighter future where no child has to worry about summer meals again.

More soon,

Andy

name: David Trone
subject: Plugging my social media accounts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

Running for the U.S. Senate has been an inspiring experience so far. I’ve enjoyed talking to voters and hearing thoughts on what we can do here in Maryland to improve people’s lives.

Whether it's talking to you through these emails, on the phone, at events, or even on the street, I'm reminded of our shared mission to make Maryland a better place for ALL.

I want to keep you in the loop and let you know about opportunities to get involved with my campaign. Emails like these are a great way to stay in touch, and we hope you'll also follow along on social media.

Hope to see you on your favorite platforms!

name: Angela
subject: chat over coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230712_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1006&akid=254%2E52803%2Ee7GSv8 ][IMG]

Hey Peter, it’s Angela.

I’m just sitting here enjoying my morning cup of coffee thinking about how
nice it would be if you and I were able to meet up for a cup of coffee
soon so I could get to know you better.

What’s the biggest concern facing your community right now?
How can I best serve your interests as Maryland’s next U.S. Senator?
And which binge-worthy TV show do you recommend my daughter and I watch
next?

These are just some of the important, hard-hitting questions I’d ask you
over a cup of coffee,
Peter. Unfortunately, I’m not sure
I’ll be able to meet with each one of you individually.

So instead, I asked my team to come up with the next-best solution.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230712_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=254%2E52803%2Ee7GSv8 ]Please, Peter,
will you take just one minute of your day to fill out our campaign’s
updated Issues Survey and let me know what’s on your mind? If I’m going to
represent you in the U.S. Senate, then it’s time you and I get to know
each other a little bit better.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230712_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1008&akid=254%2E52803%2Ee7GSv8 ]Take Our Survey →

Thanks for your input,

Angela

P.S. — I wasn’t kidding about the TV shows,
Peter. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230712_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1009&akid=254%2E52803%2Ee7GSv8 ]There’s a place at
the bottom of the survey to drop your recommendations. So come on, click
here and let’s hear them! →

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230712_EN_CoffeeSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1010&akid=254%2E52803%2Ee7GSv8 ]Take Our Survey →

body:

#

Kari Lake is running. It’s just a question of when.

subject: Hillary Clinton is calling on YOU:
body:
Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | |

That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?

body:
|

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**
