[**That’s why I’m reaching out today. Can you take a few moments to fill out our summer priorities survey? Your input is invaluable to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66373310/416131929/1402187941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjk2ZWE1Mi1iYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTS88YKwu7uluDTDld_0V2TYh2-zJr-vvE9AgkhUzFk=&emci=3b96ea52-bc20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3f96ea52-bc20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11037791)

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I shouldn’t be alive, Friend.

| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdkouv1vj1iqd66asjksre59ej0m1cfhnfhaa170_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs)
---
| | I shouldn't be alive, Friend. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvdi308n34aho82skfbhjpmvnc1dm4ekdhndlrs8_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there's no way I'm going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22nk322d88no7377npre3bl2q5f97fgncvpplg0_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs) -- not because it's easy. But because the reason I'm still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called "leaders" have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Friend, I've survived my fair share of challenges, and I'm willing to take this one head on -- because even though I'm no longer on active duty, I haven't given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who's proven that they'll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That's why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvlde1hotiapjfpf1gclqn8bn3br46837hkjpd30_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs) Friend, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmgmaqmn6b3sr569f6mjjgoj2ums713ke4svcd60_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs) This is our country and our fight. I won't back down. Duty First,
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafuag9ndgcrtb7clv9kn5mlrei7geopcektc3lg_rp22sh2s8i66o74shgecp72c9h2bs)
---
CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)
---

---

name: Bob
subject: Against all odds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
My mother was an orphan. My father suffered from alcoholism. Growing up, I lived in a low-income, rural home on the other side of the tracks.
But, w ith grit, determination, some help from the government, and quality union jobs, we had joy, laughter, and love in our home.
Against all odds, I became a family doctor, a public health medical director, an educator, and a diplomat.
Friend, with your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , I intend to get to Congress and be the leader I needed as a child , to create opportunities for families to thrive, just like mine did, against all odds .
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
In the face of adversity, my mother defied all odds as an orphan, rising to become a union nurse and essentially raising six children by herself.
My father was a Veteran, but battled with alcoholism. He, too, persevered against all odds , working two jobs to ensure our family's survival, and volunteered at the VFW to give back.
Growing up on the other side of the tracks, my family faced financial hardships, but our home was filled with an abundance of joy, laughter, and love. Against all odds, I found success.
Now, I am embarking on an audacious journey - running for Congress.
As I step into this new chapter, I carry with me the lessons of resilience, compassion, and the unwavering belief that anything is possible against all odds.
, with your help and contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , I hope my journey can inspire others to overcome their own obstacles and forge their own path towards a better tomorrow.
Join me. Join my movement in rural Michigan to move the heartland forward through Democratic principles and ideals.
I won't stop fighting for the little guy, for everyday hardworking families, for those facing overwhelming odds. As long as I know you're in my corner, I will fight like hell to create a better future that leaves no one behind.
Thank you!
Yours,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Proud Democrat, MI01

name: Mohona Chowdhury
subject: campaign update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I have a campaign update I need you to see. We now have a third new opponent in our race, and this one is reportedly receiving the support of the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC).

Here’s what I know about announcements like this: The NRCC fully stepping into this race is a signal to donors and dark money groups to start spending big on attack ads against Sharice.

Just last month, the Cook Political Report confirmed that the NRCC’s top strategy for holding the House starts here in KS-03. That’s why they’ve made Sharice a top target again in 2024, and why we’ve already seen them attack Sharice’s record of working for Kansas families.

Here’s why they especially want to defeat Sharice:

**Sharice will always fight back against the nationwide assault on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and life-saving benefits like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on.**

It’s crucial that we re-elect leaders like Sharice to keep fighting to protect our rights, strengthen our economy, and lower costs for working families. But now that our race is really heating up, we need to prepare for whatever comes next.

**[In the first 24 hours after this announcement, will you help us show our grassroots strength? clean_body: | I have a campaign update I need you to see. We now have a third new opponent in our race, and this one is reportedly receiving the support of the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC). Here’s what I know about announcements like this: The NRCC fully stepping into this race is a signal to donors and dark money groups to start spending big on attack ads against Sharice. Just last month, the Cook Political Report confirmed that the NRCC’s top strategy for holding the House starts here in KS-03. That’s why they’ve made Sharice a top target again in 2024, and why we’ve already seen them attack Sharice’s record of working for Kansas families. Here’s why they especially want to defeat Sharice: Sharice will always fight back against the nationwide assault on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and life-saving benefits like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on. It’s crucial that we re-elect leaders like Sharice to keep fighting to protect our rights, strengthen our economy, and lower costs for working families. subject: SCOTUS ruling is a win for democracy

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66377956/416144035/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmEwYzY4YzMtYzAyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l9AQmR0ia08scN1gk_JONtvm5k_VjBBcsm0DilqqmIw=) | | **Supreme Court rules against giving state legislatures unchecked control over federal elections - NBC News**

The Supreme Court (somewhat surprisingly) handed down a ruling that is a big victory for democracy and the integrity of our elections.
In a recent case from North Carolina, the Supreme Court rejected the fringe “independent state legislature” theory, which would have made partisan state legislatures unaccountable to state courts. Political actors could have imposed the harshest restrictions on voting without meaningful oversight by the justice system. It would have meant chaos. We avoided a serious crisis
But our work is far from over. Efforts to make voting unnecessarily harder are still rampant, and it's up to us to stand strong and push back.
[**I am fighting every day to ensure our democracy remains intact and I need your help. Your support is essential in our ongoing efforts to defend democracy, protect voting rights, and fight against those who seek to undermine the integrity of our elections. Will you chip in $5 or more this week to help us get our message out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66377957/416144036/1738122803?amount=15&refcode=ss_em_fr_30DO_230711&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmEwYzY4YzMtYzAyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l9AQmR0ia08scN1gk_JONtvm5k_VjBBcsm0DilqqmIw=)

body:
Donate $10 and help us run our new ad in Alabama
#
Good morning, Derek.
Tommy Tuberville continues to hold up hundreds of promotions for senior Military officers. And as of this Monday, the United States Marine Corps has no confirmed Commandant for the first time since 1859.
VoteVets decided to do something about that.
We just rolled out our newest ad, Situation. You can watch it here:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-july23-situation.exmy4t&refcode=em230712-1-15r&t=1&akid=10622%2E3013755%2EmdZ7fK)
And I have a critical request: **[Can you chip in $10 or more to help us get it on the air in Alabama? It costs about $160 to run this 60 second ad one time, and we need $40,000 to run the full campaign.](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-july23-situation.exmy4t&refcode=em230712-1-15r&t=2&akid=10622%2E3013755%2EmdZ7fK)**
VoteVets is one of the only organizations that can push this issue forward. We’ve been working hard on it for months now, with a lot of support from you.
And the truth is, we can only get this ad on the air — broadcasting to the people that Tuberville represents down in Alabama — if you make a donation right now.
The more we raise, the longer we can run the ad, the more people who can see it, and the more likely we are to get these promotions moving.
So, how about it, Derek:
**[A donation of $10, or anything you can afford, could make all the difference.](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-july23-situation.exmy4t&refcode=em230712-1-15r&t=3&akid=10622%2E3013755%2EmdZ7fK)**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We are ditching the Republican losing culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946085:6ryu1VINF:m:1:3299561967:C2FAEF83E723523991606D6C1EDCF8C3:r)
---
Patriot, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING Critical Race Theory and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946085:6ryu1VINF:m:1:3299561967:C2FAEF83E723523991606D6C1EDCF8C3:r "If you can, will you pitch in?")**

_The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now._ 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We **will** fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it.

In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
| | [STAND WITH TEAM DESANTIS: DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946085:6ryu1VINF:m:1:3299561967:C2FAEF83E723523991606D6C1EDCF8C3:r)

|
**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946085:6ryu1VINF:m:1:3299561967:C2FAEF83E723523991606D6C1EDCF8C3:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob: Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING Critical Race Theory and pornographic content for young kids STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. A ren 't you ? I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. "If you can, will you pitch in?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now. 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. | | | Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it. Peter, your support is unreal. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66380070/416151611/1746233935?refcode=AU_TNDP_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20230712_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTNkOGNhOS1jNDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6bVxSnntoWuSaWDE8deE0k_sn0BASM0sWJvvxykQ2o=) That’s a screenshot of just our grassroots fundraising last quarter, and I can’t thank you enough, Peter, for your support. Nearly $300,000 raised from small dollar donors over the last quarter with nearly 10,000 contributions. **But the part I’m most proud of? On average, folks are chipping in about $32 to help us stand up to the GOP and fight for Democrats across Tennessee.** Our team isn’t beholden to the special interests who write endless checks in order to enact an extremist agenda. Our contributions show that our team is fueled by everyday Tennesseans who are committed to protecting our democracy from right-wing extremists. The GOP wasn’t able to hide their hypocrisy behind closed doors and the world was able to see their bigotry and hypocrisy on full display. We’re not out of the woods yet, and it’ll take continued energy in order to fully reinstate Justin Jones and Justin Pearson next month and fight to take back the House majority and re-elect President Biden in 2024. We truly can’t do this work without you, Peter. Thanks again. Yours in justice, Hendrell Remus (he/him/his) Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66380073/416151618/1746233935?refcode=AU_TNDP_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20230712_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTNkOGNhOS1jNDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6bVxSnntoWuSaWDE8deE0k_sn0BASM0sWJvvxykQ2o=)

Amanda

body:

| | |
# [Add your name: Don't let Trump delay his trial](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0eb3f6d5-45ca-42ef-8f00-494d376ba5b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | _Breaking_ : Trump's lawyers are trying again to delay justice -- forever. Last night, they [asked the judge](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15e83cfb-d75c-4b1d-8eed-f03a91289ed6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in the documents trial to **delay the trial _indefinitely_.** The goal is clear -- keep pushing back the start until the election, with the hope that Trump wins so he can pardon himself. **Don't let this happen. Don't let Trump escape justice.** [**Add your name, and demand the trial not be delayed, and that Trump****finally**** face justice**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5389bc65-bc50-4575-8d84-3ea1d7d504bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: Schweikert’s America is less equal and less free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
The Republican assault on freedom has been in the works for 40 years

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381496/416157334/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=) Friends –

Equal protection under the law is a constitutional right. But in recent times, the landscape of reproductive health services has made our country feel increasingly unequal and uncertain. Because of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision last year, where you live and how much you earn can determine your access to essential reproductive healthcare.

**And the _Dobbs_ ruling was not an isolated incident. As I’ve said before, it was a culmination of a nearly half-century-long effort by the Republican Party to undermine women's rights. **Over the years, presidential candidates from the Republican Party have made it clear that they intend to appoint Supreme Court justices who would overturn _Roe v. Wade,_ and they delivered just that.

My opponent, David Schweikert, has made opposition to reproductive rights a core crusade during his time in Congress. He pushed a bill to ban abortion nationwide with no exceptions, voted against the right to contraception, and even voted to allow states to ban women from traveling out of state to receive an abortion.

**The majority of Arizonans and Americans stand in agreement that abortion should remain safe and legal. However, our democracy is falling short of ensuring this fundamental right for all.**

If elected to serve in Congress, I’ll take immediate action to enshrine the right to reproductive health care into law once and for all. However, I cannot achieve this alone. I need your support.

I believe how you run for Congress is just as important as what you do when you get there. That’s why, unlike anti-choice David Schweikert, I’m not taking contributions from corporate PACs.

[**Instead, I’m counting on you. Will you consider contributing $3, $33, $330, or any amount that you can afford at this moment? Your contribution will directly impact our ability to effect positive change and uphold reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381500/416157338/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.12_b1_ac_all&amount=33&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=)

Thank you for standing with us and supporting this vital cause.

All my best,

– Andrei | To learn more about Andrei, visit [**AndreiForArizona.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381504/416157341/-651367276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=&emci=aee2b93a-b620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb34e2e3-c620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381506/416157344/-786721108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=&emci=aee2b93a-b620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb34e2e3-c620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381509/416157347/674641626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=&emci=aee2b93a-b620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb34e2e3-c620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66381512/416157350/-127890224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzNGUyZTMtYzYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dx0JGT9DQrRX0BTbZotg9vnRwlL6RNSy72KB-TydTqI=&emci=aee2b93a-b620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb34e2e3-c620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922)

clean_body: The Republican assault on freedom has been in the works for 40 years = Friends – Equal protection under the law is a constitutional right. But in recent times, the landscape of reproductive health services has made our country feel increasingly unequal and uncertain. Because of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision last year, where you live and how much you earn can determine your access to essential reproductive healthcare. And the Dobbs ruling was not an isolated incident. As I’ve said before, it was a culmination of a nearly half-century-long effort by the Republican Party to undermine women's rights. Over the years, presidential candidates from the Republican Party have made it clear that they intend to appoint Supreme Court justices who would overturn Roe v. Wade, and they delivered just that. My opponent, David Schweikert, has made opposition to reproductive rights a core crusade during his time in Congress. He pushed a bill to ban abortion nationwide with no exceptions, voted against the right to contraception, and even voted to allow states to ban women from traveling out of state to receive an abortion. The majority of Arizonans and Americans stand in agreement that abortion should remain safe and legal. However, our democracy is falling short of ensuring this fundamental right for all. If elected to serve in Congress, I’ll take immediate action to enshrine the right to reproductive health care into law once and for all. However, I cannot achieve this alone. I need your support. I believe how you run for Congress is just as important as what you do when you get there. That’s why, unlike anti-choice David Schweikert, I’m not taking contributions from corporate PACs. = Thank you for standing with us and supporting this vital cause. All my best, – Andrei | To learn more about Andrei, visit | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: President Biden is Misleading the Public on Inflation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

| | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
July 12, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **President Biden is Misleading the Public on Inflation **
---
**Salem, NH -** State** ** Representative Joe Sweeney, Founder of Granite Solutions, issued the following statement regarding President Biden misleading the public while taking a victory lap on the inflation his policies have caused:

"President Biden's recent tweet about the state of our economy is a masterclass in misinformation. While he chooses to celebrate a statistic taken out of context, American families are feeling the true impact of 'Bidenomics' in their daily lives.

Let's not overlook the fact that costs have risen by a staggering 16.6% in the two and a half years since he took office. That's not a victory for American families; it's a harsh reality that is hitting them in their wallets every day.

What does this mean for the average American? It means you're paying more for groceries, more at the gas pump, more when you dine out, and more for goods. These increases are not mere statistics but real hardships for working families trying to make ends meet.

The President's assertion that this is 'Bidenomics in action' is correct, but not in the way he intends. 'Bidenomics' has resulted in inflated costs, strained family budgets, and a weaker economy. This is not a record to celebrate.

At Granite Solutions, we are committed to championing policies that truly serve and strengthen Granite State families."

###
---
---
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Joe Sweeney, Chairman., www.GraniteSolutions.org

You received this email because you subscribed to our list. name: Bill Spadea
subject: The REAL reparations
body:
Proposed "Reparations" are just as FLAWED as they are RIDICULOUS. They're nothing but a great talking point for radical leftists, who are u
|
---
| Peter, **Proposed "Reparations" are just as FLAWED as they are _RIDICULOUS_.** They're nothing but a great talking point for radical leftists, who are using past ills to create a current racial divide. They are hiding behind the horror of slavery to pick and choose winners and losers today. Should people whose ancestors have been wronged in the past be paid by those who had nothing to do with it today?!? Millions of people in our country have been wronged by so many things.
Why should only some people be paid? Based on history? Skin color? Who decides? At what point do you draw the line? Imagine Hollywood stars and rappers that are making millions of dollars a month. If they are descendants of slaves, are they entitled to checks as well? Tossing all logic aside, those who back reparations can't even answer this most simple question: **How will they even be paid for?** Don't be surprised if leftists try to get hardworking American taxpayers like you and me to cover all of the costs. **If you find reparations to be WILDLY INAPPROPRIATE, this is your chance to show your support for the Common Sense movement which believes that REAL REPARATIONS have to be in fixing our cities and providing law enforcement, education and economic opportunities to ALL Americans.**
---
| | [DO YOU OPPOSE LEFIST REPARATIONS? CLICK HERE TO SHOW YOUR SUPPORT.](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/59bf46eae70593353f096e46ebec7f4f/eJyNkE0LwjAMhv9LztOxqqC7iYiMzR1Ez1K7gMUtLW02_GD_3fqBJwWvyZMneXMDRpLEWQUpnPkqxAgicKi01Ui8MMRSPbtiMk5GSQS1ptPKmdZCevs6_AEe5UQkIgK-WAzIdjNf5Fm52hdZmQfSShd2_OWZzaYfzXI9zwro-59ebDQvu6D2kLJr8RGo0iEU71wd-COz9WkcK9M0hgYeyeNA1e1h6LDrhsrEDsNtkrUhH3zSWqTq_YscLy9rfwe9rmhY)
---
| **I recently spoke out about this topic on Newsmax,** [**which you can click here to watch now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/2a77885847cacd3dcb0156f01d42d940/eJyNkNFOwjAUht-lF14tznal0CXEIOKyDLkwyC0p60msbl3TnolI9u4WMVxp4u053_n-_OdIEKyyWGqSkw_8ZCwjCfFQG2fA4ryzqOrvLRtxmtGENMa-Fb7rHcmPvx5fgNOYMioSggcHEVk_zeZVuSq2y3JVRdIpHzP-5ZFyctEsHmflkgzDn15oDS7eozqQHH0Pp0LaxFL47JvIvyC6kKcp7g0i-Ou6a9OdaZrglAaVBlTYh5SK8YRLNhKS80wyKvnNbZhycYXT9nXD9ZjB3f3aCV3Iim6yh31MVs6B1T9fq-Bwzh--AA5ucoU=) On top of fixing cities, REAL REPARATIONS should fix education and help support ALL families. Throwing checks at descendants of slaves will not solve the biggest problems that plague our nation today. No one in their right mind is ever going to pass or pay for the type of reparations that the left keeps pushing, especially while our cities are in turmoil. They are nonsense, and nothing but a distraction. If you agree, and support REAL Common Sense Solutions that will actually make our country better (like fixing cities for a start), [**show your support here.**](https://xtz223.keap-link015.com/v2/click/5857f3fd59147507d4d0c25ef0654acc/eJyNkE0LwjAMhv9LzptjU8HtNkRkTD2InqV2AYtbWtps-MH-u52KJwWvyZMneXMHRhLERQUZXPiWJGMIwKJURiHxXBML-ewm00k8jgOoFZ2XVrcGsvvX4Q8wlOMkngTAV4Me2W3zeVlslodVsSk9aYT1O_7ypOnso1ms82IFff_Ti43iRefVDjK2LQ6BKuVD8d7Wnj8xG5dFkdRNoyl0SA5DWbfHkcWuG0kdWfS3CVaanPcJY5Cq9y9KvL6s_QO_YGha) Thanks for the support, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea

If you find reparations to be WILDLY INAPPROPRIATE, this is your chance to show your support for the Common Sense movement which believes that REAL REPARATIONS have to be in fixing our cities and providing law enforcement, education and economic opportunities to ALL Americans. | | | I recently spoke out about this topic on Newsmax, = On top of fixing cities, REAL REPARATIONS should fix education and help support ALL families. Throwing checks at descendants of slaves will not solve the biggest problems that plague our nation today. No one in their right mind is ever going to pass or pay for the type of reparations that the left keeps pushing, especially while our cities are in turmoil. They are nonsense, and nothing but a distraction. If you agree, and support REAL Common Sense Solutions that will actually make our country better (like fixing cities for a start), Thanks for the support, Bill | It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE! This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty. We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals. We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses. We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all. I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections. If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in! Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America. Thank you,Bill Spadea | | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50]
Hi Peter,
Thank you to everyone who took the time to fill out our Congressional Priorities Survey! By responding, you helped our campaign gain valuable information regarding the issues most relevant to you and what we should focus on.
In our survey, we asked you to name your top three concerns. It shouldn’t surprise you to learn that the climate crisis topped the list, with 75% of all respondents ranking it as one of their top concerns. With Arizona already facing record-breaking heat this summer, we know this issue has already had a major impact on our daily lives.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50]
53% of respondents rated far-right extremism as a top concern, followed closely by the cost of housing and the cost of healthcare respectively, both with 43% of respondents naming them top concerns.
There are so many pressing issues we need to solve, and we know that it is going to take bold, progressive leadership to get it done.
That’s why we need to elect Raquel Terán to Congress in 2024. She has a proven record of fighting and winning for working families. Chip in $7.50 to our grassroots campaign today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50]
A ganar,
Team Terán
P.S. We’d still love to know your top concerns as an Arizona voter. If you haven’t already, you can take our Congressional Priorities Survey here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071223_AZSurveyResults&amount=7.50]

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_subheader]

| | I won’t take up much of your time, Derek. I just wanted to give you a quick update from the campaign trail. I’ve been all over Virginia these days – from Richmond to Williamsburg all the way down to Virginia Beach, Suffolk, and Chesapeake – to help get as many Virginians as possible to the polls for this critical election in November. I’ve talked to lots of you about where abortion rights stand in VA, the security of our elections, access to health care, what infrastructure updates you’d like to see, and more. **A quick reminder: 140 seats will determine the future of these issues in Virginia. We’re the only state in the nation where we have a chance to flip the legislature blue. **__[**Can you chip in $5 to help Democrats win in the fall?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66382354/416160419/-62997900?refcode=mw_em_230712_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNkMDFmOC1jODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29bhcxOOxORcD4UyWI9uJVpwkga8v_c01x__k59rMys=)__ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66382355/416160420/-62997900?refcode=mw_em_230712_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWNkMDFmOC1jODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29bhcxOOxORcD4UyWI9uJVpwkga8v_c01x__k59rMys=) Traveling throughout the Commonwealth and meeting you all along the way is one of my favorite parts about my job. And since I’m not up for re-election, I’m pouring all of my energy into hitting every corner of Virginia to get out the vote for Democrats that are ready to turn VA blue and protect our progress. = I hope to see you on the road soon, Mark ****=** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Peter, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis will be in Carmel today for a fundraiser with Indiana Republicans from the statehouse who have banned abortion and restricted the right to vote. The Indiana GOP wants to copy DeSantis’ policies that have banned books, restricted freedoms, and handed out favors to special interests. [**We must stop them, and protect and restore our rights. Rush a donation to stop Ron DeSantis and help grow our movement against Republican extremism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66382629/416161284/405560545?refcode=230712-DeSantis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzE1YzFmMy1jOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_b9wW0kIbMS6zQC6Ls-oTtsd0Xg_AEOnQTOOK51ZWk=) We know that Hoosier families want common sense policies that respect their rights, support our schools, and expand opportunities for all. name: Winsome Sears
subject: Can you complete this assessment before it’s too late?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**Patriot, this is Winsome Sears, Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.**

I don't normally do this, but _Senate Republicans asked for my help._

Over the past month, Senate Republicans have been reaching out for you to take their **[2024 Senate Battleground Assessment,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r) **but you haven't responded.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r)

I cannot stress the importance of completing this assessment.

Republicans cannot possibly prioritize correctly without the input of our most LOYAL patriots. Unfortunately, time is running out. The deadline to complete this assessment is at MIDNIGHT.

Please, can you complete this assessment before it's too late? Here is your unique link:

**[BattlegroundAssessment/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r)

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r)
Winsome Sears
Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.

[RESPOND NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62946115:65CymVINy:m:1:3299561967:0961362A91BB75ED08C03F54735935E8:r)

**ICYMI: Chris Christie Makes The Conservative Case For President
**
Did you catch one of Governor Chris Christie’s interviews yesterday?
Bright and early, Governor Christie joined MSNBC’s Morning Joe, and then followed that up with an appearance on the radio with Brian Kilmeade and an appearance on Stephen A. Smith’s podcast. The night was capped with Governor Christie joining Piers Morgan on Fox News.
The governor stressed his conservative record of success, attacked Joe Biden’s horrific record, and made the case that in order to be successful, the Republican Party must move on from the drama and losing caused by Donald Trump.
He even made the argument that somebody would be a “coward” if they didn’t show up to the GOP debate. Find out who he is referring to by clicking [here](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a328503a50&e=d0a9afa930).
Watch some highlights from the interviews below:
**“Every Life Is Precious”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=dc306ac5a0&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Conservative Agenda”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d640d5874a&e=d0a9afa930)
**“The Truth And Results”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e95630b3a0&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Trump Abandoned Us”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=7b04cadb50&e=d0a9afa930)
As he mentioned in his interviews yesterday, Governor Christie is looking forward to the debates and is very close to meeting the RNC’s requirement of 40,000 individual donors.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: North Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I am writing today with an urgent request for you to make a $3 contribution — or whatever you can afford today — to Democrat Josh Stein's campaign for Governor of North Carolina.

Friends -
I am writing today with an urgent request for you to make a $3 contribution — or whatever you can afford today — to Democrat Josh Stein's campaign for Governor of North Carolina.
Josh is the current Attorney General of North Carolina, and he's running to protect abortion access and public education and expand voting rights in a key state, in what will be a very, very close race.
If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate directly to Josh's campaign:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Josh-Stein**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-stein/?refcode=em230712-1-f&refcode2=1493_4767699_-7rxQV&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV)
Need a few more reasons? Read this:
$3 because Josh's probable opponent, far-right Republican Lt. Governor Mark Robinson, is a wild conspiracy theorist who said COVID was a "globalist" plot to defeat Donald Trump.
$3 because Mark Robinson denies climate change, and says he wants to remove science and social studies in 1st through 5th grade curriculums.
$3 because Mark Robinson said if he wins, he would push for an abortion ban with no exception for ANYTHING.
Robinson is WILDLY popular among the MAGA-right and is getting lots of support in his campaign. That's why it's so important we help Josh. There are so many families — real people — impacted by the result of this race.
So please:
[**Can you contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to Josh Stein's campaign to become the next Governor of North Carolina? It all adds up fast when we're all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-stein/?refcode=em230712-1-f&refcode2=1493_4767699_-7rxQV&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your contribution to Josh Stein:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-stein/?express_lane=true&amount3&refcode=em230712-1-f&refcode2=1493_4767699_-7rxQV&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-stein/?express_lane=true&refcode=em230712-1-f&refcode2=1493_4767699_-7rxQV&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV)**
---
Thank you in advance for chipping in. The amount of the donation matters, of course, but just as important is the number of people contributing to help Josh today.
Thank you,
Gavin
[CONTRIBUTE TO JOSH STEIN FOR GOVERNOR OF NC](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-stein/?refcode=em230712-1-f&refcode2=1493_4767699_-7rxQV&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1493%2E4767699%2E-7rxQV).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

body:

Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw that our campaign’s first ad, “West Wing,” is now live. Click the video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em] below to watch!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em]

We need your help keeping this ad up and in front of Rhode Island voters. Our opponents are investing big money in their ads, and I need to make sure my team has the resources to keep up.

Lauren

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo]
Friend,
We want to give some context to how far Arizona has come.
Our organization was founded when the Democratic caucus was in the SUPER-MINORITY of the Arizona House and Senate. Today, we are just two seats away in both chambers from flipping our legislature from red to blue.
SIGN YOUR NAME TO FLIP THE LEG!
We were founded with one simple mission: deliver a Democratic majority. And today, we are closer than ever. Make no mistake, the GOP is fighting just as hard to hold onto the last shreds of control they have over Arizona. But with folks like you on our side, we can finally win the Democratic-majority legislature we’ve waited almost 60 years.
So, friend, we need to know. Are you all in on flipping the Arizona Legislature from Republican to Democrat? Share your commitment by signing your name today:
SIGN YOUR NAME TO FLIP THE LEG!
With your commitment – we know we can deliver a Democratic trifecta to Governor Katie Hobbs and finally ensure Arizonans get the government they deserve.
Together,
Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee

[**I’m running for my parents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66383754/416166221/1698358150?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzBhMmQyOS1jZDIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1b4pAOhFXBxoYjXufrcXuH9-JX0huBUimvQLlSFMSY=) They worked night and day on factory lines to give my brothers and me a shot at the American Dream. [**_Now I’m running to make sure all Americans -- our families, our workers, our small businesses -- can have the same opportunities I did. _My family!_ I want nothing more than for my children -- and every child -- to have the greatest opportunities possible. Donald J. Trump July 11th, 2023
On the anniversary of the July 11 protests in Cuba, Joe Biden has betrayed the Cuban people and surrendered Cuba to Communist China. By allowing China to sink their teeth into the island and establish military bases 90 miles off our shore, something unthinkable, Biden not only risks our own national security, but he abandons the dream of freedom for those many amazing Cuban Americans who under my administration, were going to get their wish.
Today, we also ask God to strengthen and watch over all the political prisoners and protestors being cruelly held captive by this evil regime. Three years ago, the Cuban nightmare was ready to end. The Biden administration has given it up - but I will get it back again. We pray for the day when all of Cuba will be free.

Donald J. Trump July 11th, 2023
Joe Biden should not be dragging us further toward World War III by sending cluster munitions to Ukraine—he should be trying to END the war and stop the horrific death and destruction being caused by an incompetent administration. These unexploded cluster munitions will be killing and maiming innocent Ukrainian men, women, and children for decades to come, long after the war—we pray—has ended. If, as Biden inadvertently admitted, the reason for sending cluster bombs now is that the United States is “running out of ammunition” (a great breach of classified information), that only further emphasizes the urgency of immediately deescalating this bloody, dangerous, and out of control conflict. It certainly means we should not be sending Ukraine our last stockpiles at a time when our own arsenals, according to Crooked Joe Biden, are so perilously diminished.

There could be no more vivid proof that Joe Biden’s policy of endless war in Ukraine has tremendously weakened the United States than the humiliating admission that the USA is now out of ammo, something our enemies are undoubtedly salivating over. This "admitted" weakness is an invitation to enemies all over the world. Joe Biden is needlessly and dangerously leading us into World War III, which would be a nightmare beyond imagination—obliteration!

We must stop this insanity, immediately end the bloodshed in Ukraine, and return to a focus on America’s vital interests. Most importantly, we must completely rebuild our depleted military so it is once again so strong—like it was just 3 years ago when I rebuilt it—that no nation would even think of threatening our people. We must have "PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH" and in a short time, the Presidential election of 2024 will produce that result.

**I love my family.**

**I love my country.**

_**So I can 't even begin to understand how my parents had the courage to immigrate to the United States, leaving what they considered home, behind. **_

**[What I do understand is the importance of freedom, which makes it a whole lot easier to comprehend how my parents got the strength to come to the US.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=405191fbeebb4ceeaf97a00a826ff685&_e=yZKKxD0y-zamwQ73x0fo2Mm_rqh-0K9U_NKzfVVh1NYvrxgpJ2UxQIJaRi-Ux2J7KREp4qypxlO1odxnSW3tG4WSS1xNfU7EHRoB0vDmkexZaeiyLOxfI7vdeeF67yG9F5J8c3j_t1dfVifBJMb-YP9vGyU5sVLkQLYcxSmu1TK9n9PN6-YMkXngADmTuUqiC3wH2_O57CMzeoGGRLRuyZmLven-xXZwIn3yTciw8UImtGAzDxWaGYLeOCuG5hR2qq4_81CLPbbHQSKZBFgNf-uBCFh2Du3JF_2JN0UzkNo6TKAh-t8bwB0LV6fTHSG6)**

My parents knew that for the sake of their future families, they would need basic freedoms to survive. My Cuban mother knew the horror that came with communism all her life, and my father experienced the lack of economic opportunities in Greece. They risked it all to come to a new country, with a foreign language and culture all for the smallest hope of freedom.

Now, when I see my Democrat counterparts introducing policies and promoting an ideology that threatens this freedom that people like my parents fought so hard to find, I feel so discouraged. I'm scared for the future of this country. I'm scared of what may happen if the Democratic agenda becomes a reality. But I try to hold out hope because I know patriots like you are out there. I know you're defending conservative values in your community and hopefully, there are many more like you.

**I need to know that I should still hold out hope. I need to know that I 'm not alone. If you support freedom, please consider clicking the link below. **

**[Please, send in your response if you agree with me, as soon as you can.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=405191fbeebb4ceeaf97a00a826ff685&_e=yZKKxD0y-zamwQ73x0fo2Mm_rqh-0K9U_NKzfVVh1NYvrxgpJ2UxQIJaRi-Ux2J7KREp4qypxlO1odxnSW3tG4WSS1xNfU7EHRoB0vDmkexZaeiyLOxfI7vdeeF67yG9F5J8c3j_t1dfVifBJMb-YLRgvD1QfTK1RWBYYHBk7uYaPmYrmRL08QwKoUmhnV5rx2dXhxw4uUnpfGU8PsMJxpg26cdfqPld-8tBZNHe-T21pnOgkivzvqOeFD9UeDpiWzx9A6jTwCA1CCKEJi1oIihqEAQbbGuyD4XArApYiaCJbx-5eywLDL4sh6MJynYS)**

_Thank you,_

Rep. Nicole Malliotakis

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d39139812ca641f58923595b91662cb9&_e=5EiSbV9Wh-PhOiniT7d6izpILDxBs5Mm0xx8kOOGK20Rk1KJM-1l3B2PylVKL1Lq5niCc6L-6snj67o-vd7VGucSICkTcLuGA813AJiavU0xvHZXQOBX4JciHuNnUfwMG1YmDFYsAJJfpGPrSYY2p5lwMkuz0bHWDaAVwfFVB7afJ3fdwbsF29ZEhBTRC0BJul1wJOyR0wQYzOWxDp-xLoY1PDs8vBChzfUXZXAADYicy3_NvXFLz_INYzp4x09PLxj7NIUyxsaDc0nD8C2uY2z-pSQjK5FmBkkoXdG1p-jTjrwx_7k04cvdbBfMBW0voG_qLqQY8-AlmtKrfe-GaYg_wAfC_tMCfZ566kTDnTvR7VZtOKFkUzYGfXLrLyTrbNVMVBXsqTZvaUceyxYazw%3D%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d39139812ca641f58923595b91662cb9&_e=5EiSbV9Wh-PhOiniT7d6izpILDxBs5Mm0xx8kOOGK20Rk1KJM-1l3B2PylVKL1Lq5niCc6L-6snj67o-vd7VGucSICkTcLuGA813AJiavU0xvHZXQOBX4JciHuNnUfwMG1YmDFYsAJJfpGPrSYY2p5lwMkuz0bHWDaAVwfFVB7afJ3fdwbsF29ZEhBTRC0BJul1wJOyR0wQYzOWxDp-xLoY1PDs8vBChzfUXZXAADYicy3_NvXFLz_INYzp4x09PxHkl_72NQEzcGxtJDY-RQ-0SoT-Qu1gGIO6nJvpBb6E0NVo56NrYCOCgsBpPtcjQxhrtQXAPOHO9EkVnO6R193vR-IUwkmRrIPqIocmz31s8Y4M-DMYq_myIyPMYfFUOgY-p-rmdOzX46zatNFRFXA%3D%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d39139812ca641f58923595b91662cb9&_e=5EiSbV9Wh-PhOiniT7d6izpILDxBs5Mm0xx8kOOGK20Rk1KJM-1l3B2PylVKL1Lq5niCc6L-6snj67o-vd7VGucSICkTcLuGA813AJiavU0xvHZXQOBX4JciHuNnUfwMG1YmDFYsAJJfpGPrSYY2p5lwMkuz0bHWDaAVwfFVB7afJ3fdwbsF29ZEhBTRC0BJul1wJOyR0wQYzOWxDp-xLoY1PDs8vBChzfUXZXAADYicy3_NvXFLz_INYzp4x09Pv7vSfXQaZMuHnDryverZA_14AeuLRXfbZFy-2-1iqdfJgmqEN3A4s9Zt38yoX8gZCfZ4ZOMPdzpupfDm580P5pVOPnK4jALEA3L0uvceezqw6bIgMwsqeWV2jlvQkOWbnxhYza6zJPP6Iee8w0Nhkw%3D%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d39139812ca641f58923595b91662cb9&_e=5EiSbV9Wh-PhOiniT7d6izpILDxBs5Mm0xx8kOOGK20Rk1KJM-1l3B2PylVKL1Lq5niCc6L-6snj67o-vd7VGucSICkTcLuGA813AJiavU0xvHZXQOBX4JciHuNnUfwMG1YmDFYsAJJfpGPrSYY2p5lwMkuz0bHWDaAVwfFVB7afJ3fdwbsF29ZEhBTRC0BJul1wJOyR0wQYzOWxDp-xLoY1PDs8vBChzfUXZXAADYicy3_NvXFLz_INYzp4x09Puey2PXpgYFOBUBJkondVKKG47UTlzyHA_7t7jD7l0EU_DY0DptUl1CHRAiwi3fRPVP26R7QPT192Hp1DPzuJUU2-_pYaiVDwHyUSNdhvtkN0vF2r_wOGK_sSU7YpNJhXUhIJvBIep1Bb8k1QrHc6dQ%3D%3D)
Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d39139812ca641f58923595b91662cb9&_e=5EiSbV9Wh-PhOiniT7d6izpILDxBs5Mm0xx8kOOGK20Rk1KJM-1l3B2PylVKL1Lq5niCc6L-6snj67o-vd7VGucSICkTcLuGA813AJiavU0xvHZXQOBX4JciHuNnUfwMG1YmDFYsAJJfpGPrSYY2p5lwMkuz0bHWDaAVwfFVB7afJ3fdwbsF29ZEhBTRC0BJul1wJOyR0wQYzOWxDp-xLoY1PDs8vBChzfUXZXAADYicy3_NvXFLz_INYzp4x09P9duTvtff9fz70kXxQbWiFnuZ0wyNJbhW2GOrY3m_Hj_lROR7s2DDxaOU72PgwbMjynLemqzwy-v-0reMwnYqdPQ9LSVTSlb8UphqiNDG07jLmg45k1WRtjSPKz-les_MmO6LIv4c0BTTZYyVAfj0BQ%3D%3D)

name: Will Rollins
subject: It’s official. I’m running for Congress again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
_Mandela Barnes' The Long Run is proud to endorse Will Rollins Congress. Will is running to unseat extremist Ken Calvert in California’s 41st district and to fight back against corruption in Washington. Please read a message from Will below and support his campaign if you can:_

[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.PWb8Jv&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=1&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
Friend -
**I wanted you to know that I recently launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.**
Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote.
Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to split a $5 donation between my campaign and The Long Run to become a Founding Donor of our effort to flip CA-41. We set an ambitious goal of bringing in 2,500 contributions to launch with grassroots momentum, and your support today will go a long way.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.PWb8Jv&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=2&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Will Rollins and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.YQ3Kau&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=21&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.6eHXMW&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=22&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.h4hPzm&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=23&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.zou-3V&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=24&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split._So_1E&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=25&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.PWb8Jv&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=26&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race:
After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home.
More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda.
**This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it.**
My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power — even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk.
The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot — and control of the House and Senate at stake — reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance.
**We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**
[**Split a $5 donation between me and The Long Run today to become a Founding Donor of our campaign. Winning is going to take widespread, grassroots support, and I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.PWb8Jv&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=27&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
Thanks for your support,
Will Rollins
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rollins-split.PWb8Jv&refcode=em230712-1-tt&t=28&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=4637_196590_lMBZRs&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=4637%2E196590%2ElMBZRs)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: one trillion dollars?!
body:
This is spiraling out of control... |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, I came out against the swamp's debt "deal" last month because of one inconvenient truth: _it suspended the debt ceiling while doing absolutely nothing to actually reduce the debt. _

The career politicians declared it a big victory. **In fact, I was the _only_ candidate in the race for the 47th District to speak out against it. **Well, I just read a story that confirmed my worst fears:
****FOX NEWS: Federal debt explodes by $1 trillion in five weeks since deal suspending limit became law****
[_**I just posted a video with my thoughts on this jaw-dropping news. I hope you can take a moment to WATCH, LIKE, and SHARE it.**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=48fbc54b78&e=86e91e802d)

Our national debt is spiraling out of control, Peter. It's showing no signs of slowing down, and my generation is going to get hit with the bill.

The good news is that there is still time to turn things around...but we have to get serious. We can't let career politicians keep kicking the can down the road.

I'm not running for Congress to play games. I'm running to get serious about **cutting spending**. About **reducing the debt**. About **balancing**** the budget.**

Orange County families deserve more than just lip service from their representative in Washington. They deserve a principled conservative leader who isn't afraid to stand up against the status quo and say ENOUGH.

[_That's why I posted this video - I'll always let the people of Orange County know where I stand._](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0734e66427&e=86e91e802d)

I'm so glad you're standing with me,

Max Ukropina

name: Brandon Williams
subject: Thankful for a succesful surgery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
|
---
Peter, I wanted to provide you with a quick update on my health. As you may already know I was admitted to St. Joseph's Health Cardiovascular Institute yesterday for a cardiac procedure after an examination at Crouse Health. Earlier today, a highly skilled group of surgeons, nurses, and other support personnel successfully carried out a robotic heart bypass operation. The surgery was effective and I already am on the path to a strong recovery. The minimally invasive techniques employed by the cardiac specialists at St. Joseph's will allow quicker healing, reduced discomfort, and minimal scarring. It is amazing to know that we have such great health facilities and talent here in CNY when the unexpected occurs. Stephanie and I remain grateful for your prayers and thoughts as I recover over the next few days and get back to work as quickly as possible for the people of Central New York and the Mohawk Valley. Warm regards,
>

Congressman Brandon Williams
---

Friend,
I have to say - I'm disappointed.
This month, our nation witnessed the single worst encroachment by the federal government in American history.
The Biden Department of Justice tried to _**JAIL**_ its leading opponent - _me_ - as an innocent man.
I had hoped that Republicans _everywhere_ would've said it was time to come together as one big, united front to stand against an out-of-control Deep State that MUST be stopped.
But instead, disloyal Republicans devised a **$300 MILLION PLOT** to try and stop us and replace me with a nominee who will make nice with the Deep State.
**Our nation is on the brink of tyranny. We need a man of courage in charge of our country, not a coward who would drop to his knees and surrender to his captor.**
But I know that _you_ have just as much courage as I do, Friend.
You've stood by our campaign through thick and thin, and made our movement stronger than EVER before.
_And in just a few days, we have the chance to show just how strong we are._
On the June 30 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline, we will prove that not even a sham indictment, an arrest, or even a $300 MILLION PLOT can hurt us.
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before the end-of-quarter deadline to counter the $300 MILLION PLOT to stop us in the primary - for 1,500% impact.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0cab30929cd5420a905ef80d75db5ee8&_e=klfb-NnwnKT2Ha6ZzR3AXD3tJLpRJbzfEPMNy-2dBQ6e0LN_enrFMV9VPfPio44v2PZRzEulhdmrL_LciUCOTeuXDgMw_I6iH9l1TJEpovUKyovZe6K6s_cPZNQJGsocZfF4L7-fW56y1fi_aYhC1255pnA2wDNVzrrBrC0iwiu9NBbhfcN64pBs9tyPc9zGjkaaIEVXUQGULlsfWYTX61buRQAVT3cgxi-ipaTVcrLPJRB5LLZD2afAbzAk2j13JGacSlOzeOOiJMQ_HXgCfX_bQKWpB_ZBP0gbTc7NvR1ClgyeszUN_MCmxa1E3EU4e2L_GZpr15aQjO9to8lC8yE_CPau3DiUSCLaiRNQLkRmyG0kiwbXIbLU0D0TlbAK_V1mgY3XP0H8koMgCKh39Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,
I emailed you on this last week – this is a quick follow-up in case you missed it.

Our Senate race here in Texas is heating up. I’m clearly the left’s #1 target.

**Colin Allred raised nearly $6.2 MILLION in just over eight weeks after launching his campaign on May 3rd** , and the Washington, D.C.-based Lose Cruz PAC was launched last month to serve as a “good old fashioned attack machine” to tear me down.

I’m counting on your support now more than ever to **KEEP TEXAS RED** next November.

_And we have a critical grassroots fundraising deadline coming up fast this Saturday!_

[**Will you step up to help us reach our July mid-month goal?**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMV8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0xJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/scknVPgo2ErOW8p4Q2ECUw)

We cannot take anything for granted. The left is ALL-IN to flip the Lone Star State.

**Control of the U.S. Senate – and our nation’s future course – could all come down to the outcome in this race!**

It’s vital that we reach our $25,000 mid-month goal to keep our summertime efforts here at Team Cruz on track. Any donation you can send today will be a huge help.

THANK YOU for having my back in this fight!

For Liberty,
