clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, I emailed you on this last week – this is a quick follow-up in case you missed it. Our Senate race here in Texas is heating up. I’m clearly the left’s #1 target. Colin Allred raised nearly $6.2 MILLION in just over eight weeks after launching his campaign on May 3rd , and the Washington, D.C.-based Lose Cruz PAC was launched last month to serve as a “good old fashioned attack machine” to tear me down. I’m counting on your support now more than ever to KEEP TEXAS RED next November. And we have a critical grassroots fundraising deadline coming up fast this Saturday! We cannot take anything for granted. The left is ALL-IN to flip the Lone Star State. Control of the U.S. Senate – and our nation’s future course – could all come down to the outcome in this race! It’s vital that we reach our $25,000 mid-month goal to keep our summertime efforts here at Team Cruz on track. Any donation you can send today will be a huge help. THANK YOU for having my back in this fight! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id:2023-07-10-12:46:55:376t |

name: Jane Kwon
subject: FWD: Action Alert: Hearing for protecting the Owyhee today!
body:
| | | Hello Peter, In a few hours, lawmakers in the US Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee are scheduled for a hearing about the Malheur Community Empowerment for the Owyhee Act (S.1890), a bill co-introduced by our US Senators, Ron Wyden and Jeff Merkley, that would protect the Owyhee Canyonlands. [**Help us preserve this geologic masterpiece today by thanking them for their bill.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66386670/416176759/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZjA2MGQxLWQ0MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gTWLFAni-lub4RvUXhUhzF2l9vC6LPJVZ3M_nFibkt4=&emci=96815fc5-d120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=04f060d1-d420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) This bill would protect large expanses of wildlands in the southeastern corner of our state and the diverse wildlife, ecosystems, and resources found in the region. This is the largest opportunity available to protect lands and waters in the contiguous US, and I hope you’ll join us in our efforts to permanently protect the Owyhee Canyonlands. Thank you. Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66386671/416176761/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZjA2MGQxLWQ0MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gTWLFAni-lub4RvUXhUhzF2l9vC6LPJVZ3M_nFibkt4=&emci=96815fc5-d120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=04f060d1-d420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Have you heard of the Owyhee (ow·wai·hee)? This wild and rugged part of Southeast Oregon–called the Grand Canyon of Oregon for its deep canyons–is unforgettable and truly worth protecting. [**Join us in thanking our US Senators Ron Wyden and Jeff Merkley, who are working to do just that.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66386672/416176762/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZjA2MGQxLWQ0MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gTWLFAni-lub4RvUXhUhzF2l9vC6LPJVZ3M_nFibkt4=&emci=96815fc5-d120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=04f060d1-d420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Owyhee Canyonlands are a national and Oregon treasure that have been 17 million years in the making. With more than 2.5 million acres of wilderness-quality lands, it features deep, rugged canyons and miles upon miles of rolling sagebrush grasslands, supports a diversity of wildlife, and preserves some of the darkest night skies in the country. It also contains sacred lands and cultural resources significant for the indigenous Northern Paiute, Bannock, and Shoshone tribes. The surrounding landscapes, rivers, fish, and wildlife are a part of tribal traditions to this day. The bill that Sens. Wyden and Merkley are championing would permanently protect more than one million acres of the most ecologically sensitive public lands in the Owyhee as wilderness. And, the bill would support important tribal priorities and provide for improved recreation management and economic development–all while promoting science-based management to improve the long-term economic health of these lands. It is a community-driven, Oregon-crafted solution for protecting the most important and threatened places in the region, and it's scheduled for a hearing this Wednesday. [**Write to our senators right away, thanking them for their groundbreaking proposal, and urge them to do everything they can to protect one of the most remote, wild, and untouched places in the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66386673/416176764/60803812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZjA2MGQxLWQ0MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gTWLFAni-lub4RvUXhUhzF2l9vC6LPJVZ3M_nFibkt4=&emci=96815fc5-d120-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=04f060d1-d420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The region has a rich cultural, geologic and natural history worthy of the highest levels of protection now and forever. We must not wait any longer to protect the Owyhee. Thank you for all that you do, Lindsey Scholten

Executive Director, OLCV |
---|---
|
|

| School may be out for summer, but we are working diligently to advance educational initiatives that will empower parents’ voices and protect our children’s right to a quality education that is free of harmful agendas!

**On Friday, July 21st we have a fantastic lineup of speakers gathering for an Education Roundtable,** including State Board of Education Vice President Kirk Penner, Member for District 6 - Sherry Jones, and Nebraska Senators Dave Murman and Lou Ann Linehan.

We hope you’ll join us to discuss our recent victories and the work ahead to champion more Conservative wins for Nebraska families! **Email[ admin@ne.gop](mailto:admin@ne.gop) today for information on purchasing tickets!**

| [ ](mailto:admin@ne.gop)

| **Single submission tickets** can be purchased for **$60** , a table for **10 tickets** can be purchased at the **discounted price of $500** , a table with an available elected official can be purchased for **$1,000** , and a table with the choice of an available elected official can be purchased for **$1,500**.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to be on the front lines in our discussion about defending our children’s right to a quality education that nurtures their academic excellence!

Republicans CARE for students and teachers.

Sincerely,

Eric Underwood - Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: God gave me another shot at life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f18868cf51e4441b8dd87552d9eb1b99&_e=fCJPeVZGywbgjvW8_34BMgxXytE41MV5JQQUt2Y0ZMCbVB1i8fofYs-7XBuDgvBcfqIlgpnJPLX-rTvztdDv58eUK6m-LmcaAfBsB5K3dirlZLAeYkZpWtHOjtELzxNk_LHr22iDcaOwSs4k-hx6eC7qvMIJPeXWI8q7Kfp6nZVniRva_hQIxDXMjTLXpXCLoLJwJqqZkLsXOa1EqsfAaEN2y2XN4sYPJ0b1EA59MG9y7Wx12Ys9Ti2ff5D8ld6vZquwUKNBxbpiSOD2FBGG12USUhM5aCxuFswnkpyxB4UlSej6nMWc899nQhnvUrXWEqatKzSZsmcP3QoGf6c-scTWY1jaPdxmWrO2P1y4GDgrU5QAa4ByBRhf_bDNhBcBDi0hknj_-3PysigboLhOB26M0bGaJyU-mZRner8pHkmIV3Dw-ohiWzcqOuhyy2mdconT2nDQ-jrtravKH0TpEg%3D%3D)
---
You see, it happened in a split second, Peter — when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f18868cf51e4441b8dd87552d9eb1b99&_e=fCJPeVZGywbgjvW8_34BMgxXytE41MV5JQQUt2Y0ZMCbVB1i8fofYs-7XBuDgvBcfqIlgpnJPLX-rTvztdDv58eUK6m-LmcaAfBsB5K3dirlZLAeYkZpWtHOjtELzxNk_LHr22iDcaOwSs4k-hx6eC7qvMIJPeXWI8q7Kfp6nZVniRva_hQIxDXMjTLXpXCLoLJwJqqZkLsXOa1EqsfAaEN2y2XN4sYPJ0b1EA59MG9y7Wx12Ys9Ti2ff5D8ld6vZquwUKNBxbpiSOD2FBGG12USUhM5aCxuFswnkpyxB4UlSej6nMWc899nQhnvUrXWbx434o0g1w6u6ao8xO61RzmKrjyrf52gGpc7-s6Is-QGHSqikFo4s87p2jD5155Qw2AH802Syp9_P8lfRaltYSn9gwVO4i57cRFzEjgZ0AXfxf7v_vy5I4qdyAdHLVi_1_ZLPkeN8ulUXzGkTiqtgw%3D%3D)
---
**I stared death in the face and survived.**
---
**_Peter, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson:_** Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I’m alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. **[I would be truly honored if you chose to become one of my first 1,000 financial supporters TODAY. >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f18868cf51e4441b8dd87552d9eb1b99&_e=fCJPeVZGywbgjvW8_34BMgxXytE41MV5JQQUt2Y0ZMCbVB1i8fofYs-7XBuDgvBcfqIlgpnJPLX-rTvztdDv58eUK6m-LmcaAfBsB5K3dirlZLAeYkZpWtHOjtELzxNk_LHr22iDcaOwSs4k-hx6eC7qvMIJPeXWI8q7Kfp6nZVniRva_hQIxDXMjTLXpXCLoLJwJqqZkLsXOa1EqsfAaEN2y2XN4sYPJ0b1EA59MG9y7Wx12Ys9Ti2ff5D8ld6vZquwUKNBxbpiSOD2FBGG12USUhM5aCxuFswnkpyxB4UlSej6nMWc899nQhnvUrXW8g4hDtbZwS7KZLjDO-VP5quZxVOwNge9oMR3Zeg19TdBEb7DN-F5eyNGEOvGFV3fp31A1wH3lH1r7AeWIiAqfB2ulplVFBngsi0u4Jz301_ACFee1RCgU-RQFnJouYGGPSrIfZhFV3G3d6Npx8GxHg%3D%3D)** Duty First,
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f18868cf51e4441b8dd87552d9eb1b99&_e=fCJPeVZGywbgjvW8_34BMgxXytE41MV5JQQUt2Y0ZMCbVB1i8fofYs-7XBuDgvBcfqIlgpnJPLX-rTvztdDv58eUK6m-LmcaAfBsB5K3dirlZLAeYkZpWtHOjtELzxNk_LHr22iDcaOwSs4k-hx6eC7qvMIJPeXWI8q7Kfp6nZVniRva_hQIxDXMjTLXpXCLoLJwJqqZkLsXOa1EqsfAaEN2y2XN4sYPJ0b1EA59MG9y7Wx12Ys9Ti2ff5D8ld6vZquwUKNBxbpiSOD2FBGG12USUhM5aCxuFswnkpyxB4UlSej6nMWc899nQhnvUrXWuKFobRyVmIdV6239peB3TNwQm7oAAoEQ--yys7gYNcAlsV9mIGdyCmhA5Z-DSKTKUJZ4OLYLh5Pr9XU_Ux9singux62J0dMupTLI-OjpCKv9MNNKZ6s9IN_goWUhi2jXEuquBCOYAW7gKfQpgsCRFA%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor...| | | You see, it happened in a split second, Peter — when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me. I stared death in the face and survived. Peter, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I’m alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. Duty First, | | | | | CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)Republican U.S. Senate Candidate P.S. Democrats have been barely winning every single year for nearly a decade — and winning in Nevada will be KEY to guaranteeing a Republican majority in the Senate in 2024.** Please, chip in whatever you can using this | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Got a second, Peter? I need your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’ll only take a moment.

Peter, it’s no secret that election-winning campaigns are built upon a strong foundation of shared values, ideas, and aspirations — something I take very seriously as I campaign for Governor of Louisiana. Because I know that from New Orleans to Shreveport, Louisianans have a multitude of priorities that they’re counting on our next Governor to tackle. But since we can’t reach everyone on the campaign trail, I want to give folks the opportunity to give me their feedback directly. **That's why I need your input today.** **_[Will you share your thoughts on the key issues you believe Louisiana’s next Governor should prioritize? One of the main questions we often hear from supporters, donors, or daily readers is: "How did we get to this point?"
How did we get to a point where "preferred" pronouns, woke word policing, and drag shows for kids were even taken seriously? How did such lunacy become so mainstream?
Sadly, we got here because, for too long, conservatives sat on the sidelines while far-left extremists took control of our institutions, implemented their destructive agenda, and upended traditional school curriculum as we know it.
Just a few years ago, you'd be convinced this was all satire or self-parody. But it's become all too real.
It's why 1776 Project PAC is here. We're supporting candidates - and implementing the best solutions - to ensure that no student ever has to coddle a pronoun-obsessed teacher or classmate - and never has to compromise their patriotic values in school.
[DONATE AND SAVE OUR SCHOOLS](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/30c33b33-80e3-454b-a1f7-5bf06701ec5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**BIG WINS IN TEXAS AND FLORIDA**
In Texas, the Keller Independent School Board recently [voted](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ec7e43c8-02c8-4970-87cd-941ebeccdf5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 5-0 on a policy prohibiting teachers from pushing pronoun indoctrination. Instead, instructors must use pronouns to address students that correspond with their biological sex.
Our endorsed candidates made this happen. Last May, our support was crucial in electing two outstanding candidates - Sandi Walker and Joni Shaw Smith- who flipped this school board from liberal to conservative.
And last August, we were also key in ousting far-left radicals from the Miami-Dade school board.
Now, our endorsed candidate Monica Colucci is taking a [major step](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0bb223d8-27ee-4079-87c4-1d0e6fbc35dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) toward implementing a classical curriculum focusing on math, science, civics, and classical texts.
That means students will actually learn to read and write instead of pondering how many times a day their gender can change.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUxNzc2cHJvamVjdHBhYy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vc3Vic2NyaWJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cG9zdCIsInAiOjEzNDU4ODc5OCwicyI6ODg3NTExLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjg5MTgxNDI0LCJleHAiOjE2OTE3NzM0MjQsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.qFEhySjIUU0jeWVtjnPDRHTq98C9uYzpJuhhevS3mRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=134588798)
**BRINGING OUR MISSION TO EVERY TOWN**
We're taking on these fights across the country and winning again and again. And with your support, we will take this message to every school board in America, flipping them one by one.
But there's still a lot of work to be done.
For example, in Southern California, the principal at Herbert Hoover High School in the Glendale School District [suspended](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b8446cd0-4d2b-4f49-8a47-3e353d11c1ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) two students for five days for "misgendering" a fellow student, which also prompted a far-left re-education session on transgenderism.
This is the far-left madness that has no place in the classroom. And we're going to stop it.
We're going on offense. We're saving our schools. And with your support, we will continue to deliver one success story after another.
[DONATE AND SAVE OUR SCHOOLS](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/30c33b33-80e3-454b-a1f7-5bf06701ec5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
1776's Newsletter is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell 1776's Newsletter that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.

body:
Peter, with just over 24 hours left before my public filing deadline, I’m still falling short of my fundraising goal by $8,572.

We still have a chance of making up this difference before my numbers go public tomorrow but I’m counting on fearless fighters like you to show your support before this important deadline.

Peter, at a moment when so many of our fundamental rights are being trampled on, my work as your attorney general has never been more important. The powerful and corrupt will be poring over my fundraising numbers the moment they go public to see if there are any weaknesses, so please:

[**Will you rush a donation to my campaign now so I can stand tall and hit my public filing deadline goal? Since I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I've made a few powerful enemies. I called out Big Pharma for their role in the opioid epidemic, and I worked to hold Big Polluters accountable for the devastating damage they've caused to so many of our communities. **Winning justice and equality for you has been my number one priority.**
But when this public filing deadline passes, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.
**I'm counting on dedicated supporters like you to help us hit our goal and show up strong for this major public filing deadline. I _know_ that this team is powerful enough to do it, and missing this public deadline is _not_ an option. So please:**
**[Can you donate $5 right now so that we can meet our $10,000 goal? clean_body: Peter, with just over 24 hours left before my public filing deadline, I’m still falling short of my fundraising goal by $8,572. We still have a chance of making up this difference before my numbers go public tomorrow but I’m counting on fearless fighters like you to show your support before this important deadline. Peter, at a moment when so many of our fundamental rights are being trampled on, my work as your attorney general has never been more important. The powerful and corrupt will be poring over my fundraising numbers the moment they go public to see if there are any weaknesses, so please: = Thank you for being by my side, Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Sun, Jul 9, 2023 Subject: I hate asking this ... | | | = Peter, I'm facing a major PUBLIC filing deadline on Thursday, and I'm humbly asking for your help. I've said it before: Asking for money is my least favorite part of running a campaign. But if I don't, I won't have the resources to continue standing up for you and hold corporations and special interest groups accountable for their actions. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Since I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I've made a few powerful enemies. I called out Big Pharma for their role in the opioid epidemic, and I worked to hold Big Polluters accountable for the devastating damage they've caused to so many of our communities. Winning justice and equality for you has been my number one priority. But when this public filing deadline passes, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter. I'm counting on dedicated supporters like you to help us hit our goal and show up strong for this major public filing deadline. I know that this team is powerful enough to do it, and missing this public deadline is not an option. So please: = | | = Thank you for being a part of this team. I'm so grateful for your support. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

| Hi Peter, it’s Kurt Kroemer.

Three months ago, I announced that I was running for Congress in AZ-01. In just a few months, our campaign has grown so much, and I’m so thankful for everyone who has supported us, whether it’s through kind words or a small-dollar contribution.

[_**Will you make your first contribution today to help us keep our fundraising on track?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66387808/416181082/215820969?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230712-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ3NjYwMDAtZDYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rMLz3PotqxkcMpRlwysGfSk1IvJFgjoJblE0i-rgx50=)

While Republicans like David Schweikert may boast about how much money they’ve managed to raise, what they won’t tell you is that a bulk of those contributions are coming from corporate PACs and special interest groups. So while the numbers they’re reporting may seem large and intimidating, they actually show just how shady and corrupt they truly are.

Our campaign, however, is completely grassroots. In fact, we’ve received over 1,100 individual contributions during our first fundraising quarter, which shows that we’re truly a people-powered movement.

I refuse to take any money from corporate PACs because this campaign is about the people in our community, not corporations or special interests, and I’m proud to only be funded by everyday folks just like you.

subject: Save the Date: WSRP State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Save the date and secure some early bird discounts!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: Laphonza Butler, EMILYs List
subject: RE: A down payment on the success of the women we'll support this cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | We're raising $75,000 to save the Senate in 2024. Are you in? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387855/416181167/-1588944066?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Today's the first day of our Senate Flash Fund — a two-day push to help power the campaigns of Democratic pro-choice women committed to saving our razor-thin Senate majority in 2024.

**Donate on Launch Day to invest early in make-or-break Senate races:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387856/416181168/-1588944066?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** I'll be blunt, Peter: Our Senate majority is _razor-thin_.

While we successfully grew the Senate majority beyond a 50-50 tie last November, _just two seats_ stand between us and a Republican-controlled Congress. And there is no question what a Republican Senate would prioritize — we're already seeing the GOP's extreme anti-choice, anti-democracy agenda playing out in the House.

That's why I am reaching out on the Launch Day of our two-day Senate Flash Fund. We've set an **ambitious goal of $75,000** to invest in Democratic pro-choice women who will fight hard to keep the Senate majority. **We're thinking of this as a down payment on the success of the women we'll support this cycle, and we _know_ that they'll pay dividends in their fierce pro-choice leadership!** [**Are you in, Peter? Donate now, on the *first day* of our Senate Flash Fund, to help send the message loud and clear: The race for the Senate majority is a marathon, not a sprint, and we're not ceding a single inch to anti-choice Republicans.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387863/416181175/-1588944066?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

House Republicans have been hard at work attacking abortion access since Kevin McCarthy picked up the speaker's gavel, and have already passed _multiple anti-choice bills this year_. Without the federal protections of _Roe v. Wade_ in place, House Republicans _will_ pass a national abortion ban — and the only thing stopping these bans from heading to the President's desk is our tiny Democratic Senate majority.

It may seem early to be ringing the warning bells, but I know that you've seen the numbers, Peter: Democrats will have to defend 22 Senate seats — _twice the number_ that Republicans need to hold — just to maintain our two-seat advantage.

Anti-choice Republicans are launching (and bankrolling) campaigns with the hopes of flipping as many seats as possible — so this is our moment to fight back. ****We know what we're up against, so it's time we roll up our sleeves and get to work. Join the fight to save the Senate by donating toward our $75,000 goal now:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Our-Senate-Flash-Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387864/416181176/-1588944066?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List ** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387866/416181178/-1588944066?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66387867/416181179/2124073479?sourceid=1050449&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg2ZmVjNy1kNTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTXMWt2uW-miemSbmGf3WzTXek9xll0UKIJ2gwQcmDg=&emci=3eb3dd0b-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2886fec7-d520-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** ********

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA July 12: The CDC can’t tell men it’s ok to “chestfeed”
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxOTMtZGU0YTI1MjkzZjc2NDQxMjk2NTc4OGQzMjc3MzE4MjQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbGlua3RyLmVlL2plbm55YmV0aG0_bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/aNcmsVrH2krA52CGNOZbAQ)
---
|
---
---
Joe Biden has opened our borders to lawless invasion. Federal health authorities are pushing junk science about men “chestfeeding” babies. Please use our Align Act petitions this week and spread the word about our new documentary “Surviving Socialism” to help bring order to our broken politics. Our country is in dire straits.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/PxYDiob_NCiYTftyfHVq9g)
---
Is male so-called “lactation” safe for babies? The CDC doesn’t know. What’s in it? The CDC doesn’t know. What are the long-term effects on babies? The CDC doesn’t know. However, the people Biden put in charge of the CDC issued guidance telling men that it’s perfectly safe to “chestfeed”. They even recommended banned drugs to help men produce some sort of fluid that the baby is forced to drink. **[The time to push back is NOW.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/fY5xTxrYh5hJj8pyVjumXQ)**
_**Also, be sure to watch my call to action video - you can watch the [shorter version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) or the [longer version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/tIR7oJ_yYvNQ4oqMixI6zA) where I go into more detail about the issue and why it matters so much.**_
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/TbmFs8y8pbepoFrSXcEPjA)
---
|
---
| | The American Library Association is telling public libraries they cannot allow Christian publishers to host story hours at their facilities. ALA’s director of the Office for Intellectual Freedom, Deborah Caldwell-Stone, [told librarians that such story](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) hours are attempts to "exploit the open nature of a public library to advance their agendas" and to "censor LGBTQIA materials or disparage or silence LGBTQIA library users." She went on to recommend policies and procedures to "keep control" of the facilities while claiming that the First Amendment "does not require the library to even offer the meeting room spaces."

To deter Christian book readings, she suggested that libraries hold library-sponsored programs the day of their programming or restrict access to meeting rooms by only making them available to library card holders. The ALA's Library Bill of Rights, however, clearly [states](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that libraries should provide meeting rooms to the public "regardless of the beliefs or affiliations of individuals or groups requesting their use."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/roSjY7OjClyml6q1GBcC3w)
---
The Constitution is clear: presidents who refuse to enforce the law must be impeached. Joe Biden has unleashed chaos at the southern border. He’s refused to enforce our nation’s immigration laws. And crime and human misery have soared because of it, including child sex trafficking. We know that an open border is one of the major factors facilitating child sex trafficking. American presidents should work to stop the abuse of children, not make it easier to do. **[Contact Congress to begin the impeachment process against Joe Biden!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/TS1FLWsfdfLEdARU0klULw)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._yeZu-CUcdKuU0WR0hhUA)
---
|
---
| | Michigan lawmakers recently passed a bill and the Governor signed, HB 4474, that [will make it a crime](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ekf3ivROYr58Q) to address someone by the wrong pronouns, an act punishable by five years in prison or $10,000 in fines. The person accused of making victims feel “terrorized, frightened, or threatened” will be punished by law. This new Michigan law exemplifies the type of woke agenda being pushed at the national level by the Biden administration. Department of Health and Human Services assistant secretary Rachel Levine, just recently [said](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/G6NKOWbNb4Emg54HhcRaMw) that "gender-affirming care," including for minors, is "mental health care." Meanwhile, the administration has given almost $4.6 million to [promote](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) LGBT initiatives like drag shows and pride parades in foreign countries. "Make no mistake about it. Those advocating for this legislation will wield these policies as a weapon capable of destroying conservative expression or viewpoints grounded in the sacred," said William Wagner, a former federal judge and legal counsel in the U.S. Senate. "One merely needs to look at the scores of cases brought against schools, churches, businesses, and individuals around our country."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Join your fellow Tea Party Patriots across the country by hosting a watch party for “Surviving Socialism”, featuring interviews with people who survived socialism and with the brightest young conservatives: Candace Owens, Scott Presler, and Morgan Zegers! **[We’ve put together a how-to guide to help you host your own watch party.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._k_CV0LN6FA)** Bonus - the movie is free to watch!
---
[HOST A PARTY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._4Id_cng)
---
|
---
| | A secretly recorded meeting of Democratic Socialists of America was[ released](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Y9tj3P_ojTyPqcr9iA) by _The Tennessee Star_ last week in which a [member](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-8XMLJwgxmEJDxxNrgjw) proclaimed, “The ultimate goal is full communism,” an assertion unquestioned by those attending. The DSA calls for abolishing capitalism in its [national platform](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._XbkjariMkA) and holds the realization of socialism as a long-term goal. Socialism rises out of capitalism in the transition to communism, according to [communist theorists.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-BBSvNO3OLg) The admission made public by _The Tennessee Star_ is helpful in understanding the motivation and objectives of five DSA members in the U.S. House of Representatives, which include Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (N.Y.), Rashida Tlaib (Mich.), Jamaal Bowman (N.Y.), Cori Bush (Mo.) and Greg Casar (Texas). All five congressional DSA members are officially affiliated with the Democratic Party.

The recent DSA meeting in Nashville recorded by _The Tennessee Star_ emphasized organization. “So, if we want to build a revolution, we’re going to have to figure out how to do that, and there are people out there that have the answers that we can access,” one participant is heard saying in the recording.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxOTMtZGU0YTI1MjkzZjc2NDQxMjk2NTc4OGQzMjc3MzE4MjQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/WXhZoAmmvU-dqedh6EnpsQ)
---
| | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes.
---
| | © 2023 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-VYjAg) 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 **[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b23193-de4a25293f764412965788d327731824/40/885/d7c8710c-b0f4-4d47-b61a-11abad953be5)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._AeEyCkkuWD3ZsYYkdYvw)**
---

The recent DSA meeting in Nashville recorded by The Tennessee Star emphasized organization. “So, if we want to build a revolution, we’re going to have to figure out how to do that, and there are people out there that have the answers that we can access,” one participant is heard saying in the recording. | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2023 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 |

body:
| We need 1,000 more responses now on our survey to find out what issues are most impacting working families. **_[Answer now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66388225/416182495/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230712_SV_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDkzNDIzZi1kNjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr9mBTOf3CjaTcbPpvTwwrGJ0zXl01ubzGTfS4XL2qs=&emci=adcb775d-0f20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5093423f-d620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
* * *
**_Original Email From Team Kildee:_**
| **_[Fill Dan in on which initiatives he’s spearheaded that have the biggest impact on you and your family right now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66388227/416182497/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230712_SV_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDkzNDIzZi1kNjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr9mBTOf3CjaTcbPpvTwwrGJ0zXl01ubzGTfS4XL2qs=&emci=adcb775d-0f20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5093423f-d620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
---

Dan is fighting for mid-Michigan every day — working to support job creation, cut costs for working families and lower the cost of prescription drugs.

While many in Congress are constantly distracted by petty politics and partisanship, Dan serves in Congress to lower the temperature in our political discourse and get _results_ for Michiganders.

**Here’s just some of what he’s working on right now:**
| → July marks the first month Dan’s insulin price caps law fully went into effect, lowering the cost of insulin to a $35/month maximum for seniors under Medicare.

→ Dan just announced $31 million to support early childhood education in mid-Michigan.

→ He’s introduced bipartisan legislation to provide health care for veterans exposed to toxic PFAS chemicals.

→ The House advanced his community project initiatives that would set aside $4.5 million for flood prevention, clean drinking water, and health care.

→ Dan stood up for workers, introducing a bill to make health care more affordable for workers impacted by bad trade deals.

→ He’s introduced a bipartisan bill that will create more manufacturing jobs here in MI-08.

→ He’s announced several new federal grants for local colleges and universities, as well as to support mental health care services in Genesee County.

→ He announced a bill to expand labor rights for public safety officers.

→ He’s continuing to defend Social Security, Medicare, and other essential programs from those who want to undercut them.

---

**Now it’s critical that he hears from you directly about what is impacting you and your family.

_[What kitchen table issues are you and your family focused on right now? We need 2,500 people to take Dan’s community survey and fill us in→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66388230/416182500/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230712_SV_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDkzNDIzZi1kNjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr9mBTOf3CjaTcbPpvTwwrGJ0zXl01ubzGTfS4XL2qs=&emci=adcb775d-0f20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5093423f-d620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66388232/416182502/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230712_SV_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDkzNDIzZi1kNjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hr9mBTOf3CjaTcbPpvTwwrGJ0zXl01ubzGTfS4XL2qs=&emci=adcb775d-0f20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5093423f-d620-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
Thanks,
Team Kildee

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Join the Movement: Oppose the GOP's Attempt to Ban Abortion Nationwide.
body:
Oppose the GOP's Attempt to Ban Abortion Nationwide.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ea4a478-de97-47a7-b681-be418ff9560d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, Enough is enough! The GOP is at it again, shamelessly introducing a bill to ban abortion nationwide. [But we won't let them control people’s bodies and dictate healthcare decisions. It's time to rise up and say a resounding NO to this outrageous attack on our rights! Join the fight now by adding your name!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c18c772-ae08-4b9f-aa2e-76aeecf43b66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1811551-adb7-4184-88bb-52068f935766/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e020ea7-901e-485f-afc2-7c57dfa7f8cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This calculated political maneuver is nothing but a ploy to appease conservatives. The timing of its announcement, deliberately coinciding with the Dobbs anniversary, exposes their true intentions. Once again, the GOP prioritizes their own interests over our fundamental rights and well-being. The consequences of a national abortion ban would be devastating, particularly for marginalized communities. It would force individuals to endure unwanted pregnancies, jeopardize their health, and limit their economic opportunities. [But here's the thing: the majority of Americans stand against this ban! It's clear that this is not what the people want—it's just another desperate GOP tactic. That’s why we need 5,000 grassroots activists to join us this week! Will you join us? Add your name now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf218593f-dd5b-419c-be35-75674524a9a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SIGN ON NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td870a5e3-7517-452e-9f19-db46c2c2805f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We refuse to let them succeed. We must unite and fiercely defend our reproductive rights and personal freedoms. [Together, we will send a powerful message that our bodies are not up for debate. We demand autonomy, dignity, and the right to make our own healthcare choices. Sign the petition now to join the fight against the national abortion ban!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T908cdeb1-d55c-4d82-9045-85af62de0b3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Don't let them silence us. Stand up, speak out, and say NO to a national abortion ban! Cliff
---
|
---
| | |

|

| | |
---
| | | | |
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_op_ja_nationaabortionban2_23071215?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a9164e2-e2e6-4bcf-b9c3-0c62495cdf97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Rep. Justin Jones (via DLCC.org)
subject: I’ve realized two things:
body:
You may know me as a member of the Tennessee Three, or as one of the two state representatives expelled by the GOP for calling on Republicans to act following a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. | | |
---
| | **Republicans tried to silence me – it didn’t work.** I’m Tennessee state Rep. Justin Jones. You may know me as a member of the Tennessee Three, or as one of the two state representatives expelled by the GOP for calling on Republicans to act following a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. Since my expulsion, I've realized two things:
1. Republicans would rather resort to anti-democratic schemes and attack their Democratic colleagues than heed their constituents' calls to action. It's disgraceful.
2. We need bold action that matches the scale and urgency of this moment.

Tennesseans deserve leaders that are willing to stand up for our communities, our people, and our future – who will defend against Republicans’ assault on our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy. I’m ready to continue speaking out in Nashville on behalf of my constituents. **I’m running again for my seat in the Tennessee House to champion justice and progress, and counteract Republicans’ hate-driven agenda.** But this campaign won’t be won alone. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help power this movement through Election Day. [Will you split a donation of $10 today between my re-election campaign and the work of the DLCC to elect Democrats who will fight back against Republican extremism in statehouses nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNr-hN1AWcIDxSbdRc7c9e58ftT7g0DuLblv25f7-7LJxZnii8R1gCC2fQ2mlD4QXTRGfN_wNyEX9O64oXdgJ2VVxGBX4ERFUjHB-MvlcHfBrV2_1Kn_pGILoGT3K_rZ_i3Vc7ekU5cCGr0DVipOP0Zb1jB0p0y04YpkEkHrgUa-hwSOUGVg66i6tLsnr_ghMhJ1GmfhZ7kPZFgtB0TaIluUqbUnmWThg1KVaEuKJO45bj_PzcryUJRQa4mU4sLxHxj7YSt4_p3X3RPQdE5YMiKpUMzU4RtDI8Sx3XuX7pcQ-eiJXEd7CmJANB8KuVa5KDCuH_yiuDQaP6-VHHV-Qi1Ydj2sDRpykkR54uPjY6NUMwQsb1K9x85iUCZ9cs9k4/3xt/pF_j9I-PRtWPSfT_0e7RGg/h0/xhHnxvRIZiENuiKeBP_BBUHrDlD3uPV3aiyFOE6htwI) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the DLCC and TN Rep. Republicans are more afraid of our voices than they are of guns in schools. They’re fighting to take our country back to the stone ages – we can’t let this happen.
By building Democratic power in statehouses, we can protect our children, expand access to the ballot box, and build a more inclusive future in states like Tennessee. **But all of this change starts with investing in and winning races like mine.**

clean_body: You may know me as a member of the Tennessee Three, or as one of the two state representatives expelled by the GOP for calling on Republicans to act following a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. | | | | | Republicans tried to silence me – it didn’t work. I’m Tennessee state Rep. Justin Jones. You may know me as a member of the Tennessee Three, or as one of the two state representatives expelled by the GOP for calling on Republicans to act following a devastating mass shooting in Nashville. Since my expulsion, I've realized two things: 1. Republicans would rather resort to anti-democratic schemes and attack their Democratic colleagues than heed their constituents' calls to action. It's disgraceful. 2. We need bold action that matches the scale and urgency of this moment. Tennesseans deserve leaders that are willing to stand up for our communities, our people, and our future – who will defend against Republicans’ assault on our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy. I’m ready to continue speaking out in Nashville on behalf of my constituents. I’m running again for my seat in the Tennessee House to champion justice and progress, and counteract Republicans’ hate-driven agenda. But this campaign won’t be won alone. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help power this movement through Election Day. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the DLCC and TN Rep. Justin Jones' re-election campaign. | | | | | Republicans are more afraid of our voices than they are of guns in schools. They’re fighting to take our country back to the stone ages – we can’t let this happen. By building Democratic power in statehouses, we can protect our children, expand access to the ballot box, and build a more inclusive future in states like Tennessee. But all of this change starts with investing in and winning races like mine. It is our time now. Justin Jones Representative, TN House District 52 | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Oliver via Team AOC
subject: Taking a moment to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230712-4620-header&t=1&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)
It’s Oliver, Alexandria’s new Campaign Manager. Like a lot of people, I was inspired by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s incredible win in 2018 when she took on the political establishment.
Since then, she’s been one of the strongest voices in Washington for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice. I’d be lying to you if I said it was an easy fight but as Alexandria once said, _“Hope is not something that you have. Hope is something that you create, with your actions.”_
We are up against a lot at this moment: We’re seeing climate change impact our daily lives, the cost of housing continuing to rise, a radical Supreme Court striking down student loan cancellation and basic freedoms, and the list goes on.
[ We’re ready to continue the fight and we could use your help – if you’re ready to support that fight please make a $3 donation right now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230712.k9ecMO&refcode=em20230712-4620-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)
I know you get a lot of fundraising emails from many campaigns. So, why should you donate to Team AOC? Well, here’s why:
* **We are 100% grassroots-funded.** From Day 1, Alexandria has never taken a dollar of corporate PAC money or big checks from billionaires. Our average donation is about $16.
* **We organize year-round.** **As an organizer herself, Alexandria is committed to fighting year-round for working people even when it isn’t an election year.** In the past two weeks alone, Team AOC supported a rally at the Supreme Court in response to the student debt ruling, stopped by a practice picket line with the Teamsters in Queens, and fundraised for New York abortion access organizations.
* **As we gear up for re-election, the donations we receive today directly impact our budget and ability to hire for the coming months.** Alexandria gets constant attacks from MAGA Republicans. We know they’re going to spend millions of dollars trying to take her down. Your support is crucial to keeping her in Congress.

Any amount you donate will help Team AOC reach our mid-month fundraising target so we can support grassroots organizing efforts and re-elect Alexandria to Congress so she can continue fighting for our communities.
If you can, please chip in and help us continue this fight and reach our July fundraising goal. Here’s your own personalized link to contribute:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230712?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230712.k9ecMO&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20230712-4620-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)
Thank you for your support,
Oliver

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230712?refcode=em20230712-4620-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=4&refcode2=4620_2526796_F1_NJ9&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230712-4620-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=5&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=4620%2E2526796%2EF1_NJ9)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: I'll tell you what I told the IndyStar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Friend, to get a better idea of why running for US Senate is so important to me, I'll tell you what I told the Indy Star :
Having served on the Indy City-County Council for the last several years, I've seen government at its best, delivering results for our community. But on a larger scale, when I look around, I see a lot of freedoms under attack.
And I don't always see folks in Washington stepping up to make government work.
Before I tell you more, it's been about a week since we've launched my campaign, and my team and I are working to build a strong coalition of grassroots support. Will you join our people-first movement and donate today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Friend, I'm a strong believer in the idea that our next senator should be a strong voice for Hoosiers, but it's clear the GOP elite in Washington have a different idea.
Why else would they choose a Washington-insider as their guy in this race?
While I'm interested in investing in our communities, Jim Banks votes with party bosses and against badly-needed repairs to our roads and bridges.
While I'm interested in standing up for public safety, Jim Banks showed he was more interested in playing politics when he called the creation of the January 6th Committee "a political witch hunt".
Friend, in the next year or so, Indiana is going to have to make a choice between an elected official with an ear-on-the-ground approach to listening to the community, OR an out-of-touch politician who couldn't care less about our people at home.
I'm working hard to make sure this message reaches our friends and neighbors, but flipping this seat is going to take a lot of support from folks like you. Please, Friend, it takes less than 30 seconds to join Team Keith – can we count on your donation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
SUPPORT OUR TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
SUPPORT KEITH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_KP_initial]
Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate

Keith for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/1TLN01B0A0KQL_AlQY1vjw2?unsubscribedata=URSa5EhfvbHeAJIaIQpJ6jk5%2Fer2rd2sC7VxmDsw5oBvtdRZWskwvCsFBFyUkaJfNVWJelgbOjYn8sW0u3yKlHBsbKCyD7ux0ZAkQArYn%2Bdn1v49KCysYxE%2BxocoezaVRO6br01JCNex28hEU%2BvuXRH9jYTym%2FLn%2F8S2x9YyUTetOuRUkHDxy42LzJxLNJZL%2BN3YIFMH1Ac1fpoxLJPv1sKWG6V7xGltJtN5XHUXSYJpb6LvMEjdkqk1oG6gftwJUnV2wo6qsM0jc%2BBADIqerPsoiQFOZvGfKFgHAzSys6BkyIAO7XZv31dUDeaRDiuaD89f5KabftBbRjWMSuqP3aBHv1KcUXpjFXyuYrXqRnwhQEi0MLX2mqTjvqADwv212wRnKXbYJd4IxikqAxW3OuB%2F0AyUGzKKXiqbkXRXwidTF5W%2FRyF5QjEUA1Th%2FjIw .

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. On June 27th, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy couple of weeks for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e9562fe2efd445a38dc074de02fa6ce7&_e=cATJ_yc4pfxCsKdLPD4lp4ARcEHSJxgNst3o0qqF80fm_Fkjw_Cbuk5Zlsolyk1kdYOGDqpaJLmpWEMB7qxOBVake1mV2mUGkyTUa-nuxpcGDW-wkNNRKwsADfzJyvTJhZdUPZQb-UN89UyF-Om0PfybjlGKb_-W2YGxk2NnU89OEs5AS-j6Tz-7SvBVvCvixfzTrbSQR1c5JTdfovqhVKQ_AYcSt77WrU1x3KlAbrgjRLLk9xe_SxzNxSQ2b0l8ty7W55iekyvrnVubfQnoPpYKLLX7xpbhwjRE0eqRE-oyeVGxncox_xmMXgABmGR5ghr5XrnLfZAQ-er_-jlyfTPh4OZfly2ZG0XtOsA-e64Mq0eU_2Rgr4fR3v6FkWyKGUKNRa77S11CxZ2Um5X2glZtC8QNxijNinNj9fQhP24%3D)

I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e9562fe2efd445a38dc074de02fa6ce7&_e=cATJ_yc4pfxCsKdLPD4lp4ARcEHSJxgNst3o0qqF80fm_Fkjw_Cbuk5Zlsolyk1kdYOGDqpaJLmpWEMB7qxOBVake1mV2mUGkyTUa-nuxpcGDW-wkNNRKwsADfzJyvTJhZdUPZQb-UN89UyF-Om0PfybjlGKb_-W2YGxk2NnU89OEs5AS-j6Tz-7SvBVvCvixfzTrbSQR1c5JTdfovqhVKQ_AYcSt77WrU1x3KlAbrgjRLLk9xe_SxzNxSQ2b0l8HCs74ncjpSfZ9sQyQ2NsKrVHfVUVM6G8fJRyh-5popxCnUFwRhp0ft22Y0O_EoFuYl2kuO8BLJ6ij-P1bJtZKVrSE1dPqFwXbYEGjW7ib6Gf3Pio69sQ3lRVW-cIQt8ULdi43V9tW3QrbwQIOmgLbClxZBNVULWFy5Cj9gjuReY%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

| | I am sick and tired of Americans being asked to pay more for medications than people who live in other developed countries. In a moment I'm going to share what our movement is doing to end price gouging in the prescription drug market — but first I have to ask: **[Can you chip in and help fuel this movement today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66389583/416187639/-2122444374?refcode=2023-07-08-price-gouging&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6e4d7d10-d920-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRkN2QxMC1kOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qINELMoyzh4rmByghg0c8tjSEMMN2mp3Jl_NcEvuUG0=)** Americans treating Hepatitis C should not be asked to pay $15,280 _more_ than folks in Switzerland for the exact same prescription. We should not be paying almost $100 for a single vial of insulin, a life saving prescription, when Canadians can buy it for $12. This is ridiculous. **Big Pharma is forcing Americans to give them a BIG pay day for drugs the U.S. government helped pay to develop. That's why I wrote the _End Price Gouging for Medications Act._** This bill will:
* require the Secretary of Health and Human Services to ensure Americans do not pay more for prescription drugs than the lowest price per drug in 11 other countries;
* imposes civil penalties on companies that charge Americans more than they charge people in comparable countries so they pay back their ill-gotten profits and more; and
* save working families millions in health care costs.

**I will always stand between Americans and greedy corporations** , but I need your help. Our movement is about looking out for hard working Americans, and that means taking on deep-pocketed Big Pharma. **[Can I count on you to join the movement and fight for fair prescription prices?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66389584/416187640/-2122444374?refcode=2023-07-08-price-gouging&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6e4d7d10-d920-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRkN2QxMC1kOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qINELMoyzh4rmByghg0c8tjSEMMN2mp3Jl_NcEvuUG0=)** clean_body: | | | | I am sick and tired of Americans being asked to pay more for medications than people who live in other developed countries. In a moment I'm going to share what our movement is doing to end price gouging in the prescription drug market — but first I have to ask: = Americans treating Hepatitis C should not be asked to pay $15,280 more than folks in Switzerland for the exact same prescription. We should not be paying almost $100 for a single vial of insulin, a life saving prescription, when Canadians can buy it for $12. This is ridiculous. Big Pharma is forcing Americans to give them a BIG pay day for drugs the U.S. government helped pay to develop. That's why I wrote the End Price Gouging for Medications Act. This bill will: require the Secretary of Health and Human Services to ensure Americans do not pay more for prescription drugs than the lowest price per drug in 11 other countries; imposes civil penalties on companies that charge Americans more than they charge people in comparable countries so they pay back their ill-gotten profits and more; and save working families millions in health care costs. I will always stand between Americans and greedy corporations , but I need your help. Our movement is about looking out for hard working Americans, and that means taking on deep-pocketed Big Pharma. = Onward! Hey Peter, We’ve set a goal of bringing in 500 individual contributions before our first mid-month deadline of the quarter this Saturday — so we’ll get straight to the point: [_**Could you pitch in any amount to help us get there? We’ll explain more on how your support will advance our work to elect women and take back the House in just a moment.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66389679/416187877/-605873117?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmYyYjFkZjctZDkyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EJd9ZDNCwCA9s4YIELKrSeLP2eJIbMem0ae_ig8BrN0=) **The truth is that the odds are stacked against so many women and young people running for office.** A big reason for that is these candidates don't have the resources that come with being an established politician. Meanwhile, billionaire CEOs can write plenty of big checks to the established politicians they have in their pockets. That’s why HER Time is 100% powered by supporters like you who believe in our mission. We are a grassroots movement committed to supporting a generation of young women and allies to help them break through those final glass ceilings, one crack at a time. But House Republicans are almost as committed to rolling back progress as we are to making it. So we need to hit each and every fundraising milestone we set to ensure we stay on track to raise the resources necessary to elect more women and flip the House. clean_body: | = Hey Peter, We’ve set a goal of bringing in 500 individual contributions before our first mid-month deadline of the quarter this Saturday — so we’ll get straight to the point: = The truth is that the odds are stacked against so many women and young people running for office. A big reason for that is these candidates don't have the resources that come with being an established politician. Meanwhile, billionaire CEOs can write plenty of big checks to the established politicians they have in their pockets. That’s why HER Time is 100% powered by supporters like you who believe in our mission. We are a grassroots movement committed to supporting a generation of young women and allies to help them break through those final glass ceilings, one crack at a time. But House Republicans are almost as committed to rolling back progress as we are to making it. So we need to hit each and every fundraising milestone we set to ensure we stay on track to raise the resources necessary to elect more women and flip the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=12ef9b0ef11b4b8294153a945dce0251&_e=XPlQoHWzgMz5vp6i7cprhp8u2M-elBzbu3x9TcT6DckG5Cb3cg0F9L8rMLTFK6suXBf-IaRqv2-LBkrLeYprV1Hk6vDFwZxf6-_keyRJAe2VT17Ukl_-fLqmQZSXFS6Z1JCbcH7HBBislW3UedauHCB85JZvidBOg1QZd8A6bJ5fejzGHiQcPzJzUthaTpZ4La29Qp1uXX5gHXEi5BQvY6QBKe39uKHV0W_Fx4PhgjmGvEE8E9emF0cpjNh6O68zF2CnuGHMVgJFOkIq7Ywlm-RjxKysEA81GTWkCw3DGvXLrALsBDe3OkVWEMyXGPnJJApGEfjp664-o3s7SAIgIm8FUvwIqUdFUDMblpSOBrCZBeJN3fjVbOuG2P-AzM0IGsWkhHLG0Wjq49jEZwimZ7qcTPMDOb4QszHKrSlp9MVdpTw3yDKevbUJll3aoBPU)
