| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%%

Friend, it's Stefanie from Team Gillibrand again.
---
Last month, I emailed a select group of supporters (including you!) about becoming a monthly donor to our grassroots campaign. We were thrilled to see so many people commit to defending this seat in 2024 with a monthly gift.
You see, monthly donors are the backbone of Kirsten's campaign, friend — they're the folks who she knows we can count on _every single month_ to power the most critical aspects of our campaign. From keeping the lights on at our campaign headquarters to competing with GOP ads on TV and radio, we couldn't do it without our committed monthly supporters.
**But unfortunately, I just finished running the numbers from last month, and we fell 32 monthly donors short of our goal.**
That's why I'm reaching out to you once again. **I noticed that you haven't taken the opportunity to become a monthly donor yet. And now, I'm personally asking you, friend:[_Please, will you take a moment right now to upgrade your support to a monthly gift? As one of our most reliable supporters, I'm really counting on your help to hit this goal — even just $5 a month will make a notable impact._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66390418/416189996/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=jtk4276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNmODA4YS1kYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxgwZta-vONPW16C3iRmGZqD5VVje5ts6OIM6x7adjY=)**

Stefanie
Kirsten's Finance Director

Subject: I want to thank you
| | |
---
Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. **First, I want to thank you, truly, for your support to Kirsten's campaign.** Kirsten and all of us on Team Gillibrand are so grateful for our grassroots supporters like you.
This campaign is seriously heating up — we're just a couple short weeks away from our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. That's why I'm about to ask you to become a Team Gillibrand Monthly Donor.

Please, let me explain why your monthly gift is so important _right now_ :
* This month marks a year since _Roe v. Wade_ was officially overturned. Election experts across the board are warning that the 2024 Senate map is a "GOP dream," meaning **we could lose our pro-choice majority in the Senate.**

* **New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades**. With one of their MAGA extremists hinting that he'll challenge Kirsten, we _need_ to put up strong numbers for this quarter.

* Kirsten refuses to take a single cent from corporate PACs. That means **she's relying on grassroots folks like you** to compete with the GOP's megadonors.

The only way that Kirsten will be able to win in New York and defend our pro-choice Senate majority is with early, consistent support from grassroots supporters like you, friend. _[So please, will you commit to this fight by starting a monthly donation of just $5 to save our Senate majority and protect reproductive rights? Kirsten needs to know that she can count on you, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66390421/416189998/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=jtk4276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNmODA4YS1kYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxgwZta-vONPW16C3iRmGZqD5VVje5ts6OIM6x7adjY=)_
Thank you,

Stefanie
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66390423/416189999/1575385346?refcode=jtk4276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNmODA4YS1kYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxgwZta-vONPW16C3iRmGZqD5VVje5ts6OIM6x7adjY=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66390424/416190000/1575385346?refcode=jtk4276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNmODA4YS1kYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxgwZta-vONPW16C3iRmGZqD5VVje5ts6OIM6x7adjY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66390425/416190001/1575385346?refcode=jtk4276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmNmODA4YS1kYzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxgwZta-vONPW16C3iRmGZqD5VVje5ts6OIM6x7adjY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Peter,
Our current President claimed himself as the "education president," the reality of the education crisis paints a different picture:

* Test scores have plummeted to their lowest levels in decades.

* Hundreds of thousands of students are missing from schools - particularly in Democrat-run states.

* Math scores for 13-year-olds have experienced the largest decline ever recorded.

clean_body: | | | | This is alarming...| Peter, Our current President claimed himself as the "education president," the reality of the education crisis paints a different picture: Test scores have plummeted to their lowest levels in decades. Hundreds of thousands of students are missing from schools - particularly in Democrat-run states. Math scores for 13-year-olds have experienced the largest decline ever recorded. This is alarming and demands our immediate attention and action, Peter. | | | | School choice allows parents to have a say in their child's education and ensures that every child has access to high-quality educational opportunities. Together, we can break the barriers that limit educational opportunities and ensure that every child receives the education they deserve. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

1. **Election experts are predicting this will be the most competitive race in the country.** Andy won by just 5,000 votes in 2019, and we know it'll be another close race this year.

2. **This race is TIGHT.** A Republican firm released a poll that showed Andy and his opponent are neck-and-neck.

3. **Dark money is flooding Kentucky once again.** Outside groups are spending millions to attack Andy and prop up his opponent.

If we're going to protect the progress Andy's made for Kentucky, we need to win this race in November. But we have a tough few months ahead of us and we can't re-elect Andy without the help of this grassroots team.

**Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**

But this cheapens our money supply. And it hurts Americans by forcing them to pay extra for food, rent, and gas. So what happens when the people start demanding REAL MONEY? I predict...

clean_body: for 2024 | Hey, Friend, I 'll be respectful of your time and cut directly to the chase. I have to tell you the complete truth:our projections for 2024 are bleak. | We were not able to take back the Senate and we barely have a majority in the House in 2022. The Democrats, with the assistance of coastal limousine liberals, are continuing to outraise Conservatives by unsustainable margins, and their assaults on our freedoms are only growing stronger by the day. We must make a dent in the fundraising margins! , it'll show the wealthy liberal elites that the millions of freedom-loving patriots across our country won't stand by idly as Democrats work to wreck everything GREAT about America. Please, chip in any amount now to support me and house conservatives in their fight against the Left's assault. | | ---|---|--- | | We must win and fight for our country, and we MUST do that NOW by investing in our conservative leaders. Thank you, and God Bless, Senator Ted Cruz Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund Copyright (C) 2023 House Conservative Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Protecting CO’s public lands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071223_CORE_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071223_CORE_act]
Friend —
This weekend, Susan and I climbed Mt. Flora just outside of Denver. We were treated to vibrant wildflowers, banks of snow, and breathtaking views.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071223_CORE_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071223_CORE_act]
We are so lucky to live in the most beautiful state in the country. And today, I’m back in Washington DC, fighting to protect public lands in Colorado and nationwide.
I worked hard to make sure Camp Hale National Monument was designated last year. It now protects more than 53,000 acres of land for conservation and outdoor recreation — but our work isn’t done.
In May, I introduced the CORE Act to protect an additional 420,000 acres across Colorado.
Will you join our growing coalition of Coloradans fighting to protect our public lands by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the CORE Act? Add your name to support this work now >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/mfb-em-210319-core]
Team, Colorado’s public lands are critical to our environment, our economy, and our way of life.
I will never stop fighting to preserve them for future generations.
You can help protect 420,000 acres of Colorado’s public lands by signing on here. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/mfb-em-210319-core]
Thank you for your support.
More to come,
— Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Navy SEALS for Congress
subject: I want to introduce you to Tim Sheehy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=584c4133e2c043dcae8b5a3506af23dc&_t=Yx-bEM93RzmvnQTwGs3W-WSMWK1eBFy8sLeHUp6Bopx_8Flzn5Bdv3F76lrYTsalsFgqCg_hbE4-nyDGykFQtZsdv49tOCNw7x5Te9SYl60%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=584c4133e2c043dcae8b5a3506af23dc&_t=Yx-bEM93RzmvnQTwGs3W-WSMWK1eBFy8sLeHUp6Bopx_8Flzn5Bdv3F76lrYTsalsFgqCg_hbE4-nyDGykFQtZsdv49tOCNw7x5Te9SYl60%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy.**

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=584c4133e2c043dcae8b5a3506af23dc&_e=aZVG7tFGZvM67NG7vvilednJXsU5G98HM2VCzZOE4iNLCK9qgeitb3iV5fV506u5QvEzPbXrcQKDLBQJT6v7ImgV3xg-KOVfrLOjWDBdaekOHYKxXyLNGpA0ubuD1OV00_24fDpGUQCbj5UnDN8ca37kIa0hNGGzINmDGflfwtpFoM9LbLnBxvgj8hTfC6dVZ5eFRKp5waC5n8UUhxeAhrUvUN-AcPyZsSkbJM-6bU7t670C-lBR7xNqNohwPUxuYSaKlZHUDprn9izTj_HbrqBgx-B8gGAg94Xy3puPzbXdRS-J5z0rzsu5GSRVfELuwyrLGEtDMIjztiBSHXsgUXidA5RD9R85a_5DIHQQOjouTFKR5-yOM_SNMoekW73SqHz4Wv03gaiPq4CFTcRVVr0yMBTj-iJO-Du_yBuRtTo%3D)
Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=584c4133e2c043dcae8b5a3506af23dc&_e=aZVG7tFGZvM67NG7vvilednJXsU5G98HM2VCzZOE4iNLCK9qgeitb3iV5fV506u5QvEzPbXrcQKDLBQJT6v7ImgV3xg-KOVfrLOjWDBdaekOHYKxXyLNGpA0ubuD1OV00_24fDpGUQCbj5UnDN8ca37kIa0hNGGzINmDGflfwtpFoM9LbLnBxvgj8hTfC6dVZ5eFRKp5waC5n8UUhxeAhrUvUN-AcPyZsSkbJM-6bU7t670C-lBR7xNqNohwPUxuZwFgeRDFxj5kUN-poVatpj_4EwVRd20Z6o2cfNXka5ZQWGegyNSfSnEl_KET-gz1QjxzKxBXwAKhGcNysxnwkC1VSdysp4nyvQckbUGiAf-lvp0-O5GptljayBhT1Em9f33XoTOP-V4T0fPD9OBUSCMIYRArCwFM-Ag84tuY1ZY%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=584c4133e2c043dcae8b5a3506af23dc&_e=aZVG7tFGZvM67NG7vvilednJXsU5G98HM2VCzZOE4iNLCK9qgeitb3iV5fV506u5QvEzPbXrcQKDLBQJT6v7ImgV3xg-KOVfrLOjWDBdaekOHYKxXyLNGpA0ubuD1OV00_24fDpGUQCbj5UnDN8ca37kIa0hNGGzINmDGflfwtpFoM9LbLnBxvgj8hTfC6dVZ5eFRKp5waC5n8UUhxeAhrUvUN-AcPyZsSkbJM-6bU7t670C-lBR7xNqNohwPUxuIXUkGScofQ_b1QbAvWiLfGBHg6qwRHyxKkJ6rljYQG0rxLt0hbYUk2JGDztW_dWYlrgrPSurzOjc3DAxS96qAlQH8sItfoi6t55QUxiVv-L_9EihSZLRL7H-0GjC0ew17438W5U_IoNw2APn1FRtADEGy9ZXPvBFUeQT5F47zHQ%3D)

**I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6.**

I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. clean_body: Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. | | Fellow Conservative, During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - Tim Sheehy. In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator. Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor. Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6. I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. The Montana Senate race is not just about Montana. This race will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate and the direction of our country for years to come. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: we’re taking on the GOP

body:
GOP lawmakers show us just how out of step they are with the majority of Americans. **** Peter, day after day, GOP lawmakers show us just how out of step they are with the majority of Americans.

Their most recent budget proposal prioritizes tax cuts that benefit the wealthiest Americans, cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and spending even more federal funds to complete a southern border wall most voters don’t believe we need.

Rather than address the issues that are on voters’ minds – gun violence, reproductive freedom, rising cost of living, and climate change, to name a few – my colleagues across the aisle would prefer to put popular programs on the chopping block.

**But as a member of the House Democratic Caucus, I feel a responsibility to offer meaningful solutions for the challenges and opportunities before us.**

In order to move those solutions, though, we simply _must_ retake the House majority next year. I believe we can do it, but with summer in full swing, we are starting to fall short of our budget goals. To get back on track **we need to activate 24 grassroots supporters before Friday’s mid-July budget deadline. Only if you’re able,[can you start us off with a donation? _Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. clean_body: GOP lawmakers show us just how out of step they are with the majority of Americans. ** Peter, day after day, GOP lawmakers show us just how out of step they are with the majority of Americans. Their most recent budget proposal prioritizes tax cuts that benefit the wealthiest Americans, cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and spending even more federal funds to complete a southern border wall most voters don’t believe we need. Rather than address the issues that are on voters’ minds – gun violence, reproductive freedom, rising cost of living, and climate change, to name a few – my colleagues across the aisle would prefer to put popular programs on the chopping block. But as a member of the House Democratic Caucus, I feel a responsibility to offer meaningful solutions for the challenges and opportunities before us. In order to move those solutions, though, we simply must retake the House majority next year. I believe we can do it, but with summer in full swing, we are starting to fall short of our budget goals. To get back on track we need to activate 24 grassroots supporters before Friday’s mid-July budget deadline. Only if you’re able,= If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = We accomplished so much in the previous two Democrat-controlled Congresses, and I’m confident that we can continue making meaningful change for Americans nationwide — but we cannot do so with the current GOP majority in the House. = Thanks for all that you do. – Madeleine = Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. body:
A handful of billionaire donors just put more than $1 MILLION into a Super PAC to fund ads attacking me
#
Peter — Josh Hawley and the National Republican Senatorial Committee are so afraid of our movement, they’ve not only spent half a year attacking me for playing a card game...
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34921?refcode=em20230712-3392&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3392%2E614464%2EYmC1cT)
They also just had a handful of billionaire donors dump **more than $1 MILLION** into a Super PAC to prop up Josh Hawley and fund attack ads against me.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34921?refcode=em20230712-3392&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3392%2E614464%2EYmC1cT)
I won’t lie and say this race will be easy — but there’s a reason the NRSC is already on the offense. They know we’ve built a record-breaking and worker-led coalition that can defeat Josh Hawley, and now they’re scared.
**This is your chance to help us make their worst fear a reality.[Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now so we’ll be prepared to stand up to their attacks and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Looking at you, Jeff Bezos.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
My wealth tax bill would place a two-cent per dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million — a few cents more for the billionaires. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66406906/416231306/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15I_TAX_E_20230712_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRlMDE4NC0wNDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=APmKSauU9epnvwKUYFiZOsXcc_DFQi5HJ20firF3GHg=&emci=a04e0184-0421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a24e0184-0421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s estimated that every 10 seconds Jeff Bezos makes $5,000. It’s even more today, on Amazon’s Prime Day. Reminder: In 2018, Amazon made over $10 billion in profits but paid $0 in federal income taxes. But we called them out, we got organized, we fought to fix it, and last year, Congress passed my plan for a minimum tax on massive corporate profits — tackling Amazon’s freeloading head-on. We showed that we can fight and win to put a new tax on billionaire corporations. Now, we’ve got to keep pushing to make the rich CEOs of those companies pay their fair share too. See, if you paid any federal income taxes this year — any at all — you paid more than Jeff Bezos did in 2007 or 2011. And under our broken tax system, it’s completely legal. That’s because billionaires like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk don’t make their fortunes through income like working families do. Their wealth is in assets — like stock portfolios, art collections, and super-yachts. And by hiring the savviest lawyers and accountants that money can buy, they’re able to take advantage of huge loopholes and special breaks to pay little to no income tax — even while their fortunes are skyrocketing. Our tax code is rigged for those at the top — you know it and I know it. We need to address the growing power of billionaires, corporations, and their lobbyists as they rig the system and rules in their favor. And I’ve got a plan for that. [_**I’m fighting every day in the Senate to pass a wealth tax and level the playing field for working families. We've got to keep pushing, and that's only possible with the support of grassroots supporters like you. >
My wealth tax bill would place a two-cent per dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million — a few cents more for the billionaires.
This small tax would generate huge amounts of revenue totaling at least $3 trillion, providing money for policies like expanding the caregiving economy — everything from child care to nursing homes, rebuilding infrastructure, ensuring high quality K-12 education, and guaranteeing tuition-free public college and technical schools.
**A wealth tax is critical for raising revenue, and that revenue is critical for raising opportunity. We build a future for all of our kids by investing in opportunity. This is one way we can make this government work for everyone — not just the rich and powerful.**
[_**I’m going to continue fighting hard for my wealth tax bill in the Senate, and your support helps me do this critical work. clean_body: My wealth tax bill would place a two-cent per dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million — a few cents more for the billionaires. | | | It’s estimated that every 10 seconds Jeff Bezos makes $5,000. It’s even more today, on Amazon’s Prime Day. Reminder: In 2018, Amazon made over $10 billion in profits but paid $0 in federal income taxes. But we called them out, we got organized, we fought to fix it, and last year, Congress passed my plan for a minimum tax on massive corporate profits — tackling Amazon’s freeloading head-on. We showed that we can fight and win to put a new tax on billionaire corporations. Now, we’ve got to keep pushing to make the rich CEOs of those companies pay their fair share too. See, if you paid any federal income taxes this year — any at all — you paid more than Jeff Bezos did in 2007 or 2011. And under our broken tax system, it’s completely legal. That’s because billionaires like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk don’t make their fortunes through income like working families do. Their wealth is in assets — like stock portfolios, art collections, and super-yachts. And by hiring the savviest lawyers and accountants that money can buy, they’re able to take advantage of huge loopholes and special breaks to pay little to no income tax — even while their fortunes are skyrocketing. Our tax code is rigged for those at the top — you know it and I know it. We need to address the growing power of billionaires, corporations, and their lobbyists as they rig the system and rules in their favor. And I’ve got a plan for that. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = My wealth tax bill would place a two-cent per dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million — a few cents more for the billionaires. A wealth tax is critical for raising revenue, and that revenue is critical for raising opportunity. We build a future for all of our kids by investing in opportunity. name: Joanna Weiss
subject: What issues have been top of mind for you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66394062/416199628/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I4M2Q4MDctZTQyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IPOOwHKGQOKLWmwOOjM8veX0BimS3rY4_VzK2M7pWnA=)
Peter, it’s been an eventful couple of weeks in Washington.

I’m sure you saw that the Supreme Court recently handed down a number of devastating rulings. They struck down student loan forgiveness, rolled back protections for the LGBTQ+ community, and severely altered the processes that contribute to equity in college admissions.

The Supreme Court wields immense power, and their decisions are often immediately felt by the American people.

My husband and I graduated law school with crushing debt and started our new careers and our family while drowning in loans. I can imagine what it must feel like for millions of borrowers who'd hoped relief was coming, only to have it pulled away in an instant.

**These rulings are another reminder that we need to work hard and build the strongest campaign possible to keep this seat blue and retake the House. Winning a strong, Democratic majority is an important step in creating a check against these attacks.**

**[As my campaign team strategizes for July, I wanted to check in to see what’s been top of mind for you. Can you let us know what you’re thinking about by filling out our short issues survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66394063/416199629/453684129?refcode=em-7.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I4M2Q4MDctZTQyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IPOOwHKGQOKLWmwOOjM8veX0BimS3rY4_VzK2M7pWnA=&emci=3267da66-e220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb83d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1771054)**
| ****[Take The Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66394064/416199630/453684129?refcode=em-7.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I4M2Q4MDctZTQyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IPOOwHKGQOKLWmwOOjM8veX0BimS3rY4_VzK2M7pWnA=&emci=3267da66-e220-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cb83d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1771054)****

In unity,

Joanna

name: Ro Khanna
subject: No one should go broke because they fall sick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Medical debt shouldn't exist in America.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66394105/416199672/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4M2Q4MDctZTQyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UkvrEcTEd7pEs0nj1Sent58K54paMdDZ3niAVBmfCmI=&emci=c683d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cd83d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)

Friend, Medical debt shouldn’t exist in America, yet it impacts nearly 1 in 3 people and is the leading cause of bankruptcy for middle- and working-class Americans, even those with health insurance. The fact that millions of people endure this kind of hardship in the United States, the wealthiest country in the world, is unacceptable. No one should go broke because they fall sick—and hospitals shouldn’t profit off their patients' suffering. It’s time for Congress to wipe the slate clean and pass Freedom from Medical Debt, legislation Bernie Sanders and I introduced that would end the burden of punishing medical bills once and for all.
[**Sign the petition: Demand that Congress deliver****freedom from medical debt for millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66394106/416199673/-1859414253?contactdata=LCf7UzXrd77dG9WzK+wD/JR+sTzoF5EKfpZtM2Ag6eq7HWb2iydfnNrT66Txr/kFLXD0Z2b3/+Gt/EqF86OTMfY74GwkfvAzKEROOBomqQxNSFjYV5XDVOyMmN7L/TBJHVAwMD3pSeu+O2tIsTHX5w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4M2Q4MDctZTQyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UkvrEcTEd7pEs0nj1Sent58K54paMdDZ3niAVBmfCmI=&emci=c683d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cd83d807-e420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)

In Florida, you can buy any book you want. What we are doing is making a judgment call about what's appropriate in elementary school libraries and we are not using tax dollars to bring in that type of material into our schools. Meanwhile, Biden has created a federal "porn enforcer" to try and stop state leaders like me from protecting children and keeping schools clean. **That is fundamentally wrong.** They're not "your" kids, Biden. As a father, I don't want my 6, 5, and 3-year-olds seeing this garbage.

It's common sense. It's right. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=17c1876d3dda4e31a42e50323021b886&_e=wE2-q9jQVK4sMPKVd7PhXbzPRL0Nm7s6qRn5OciXuEKOBl04RShVjwYvDG-nCbbaCBRTb7eILsCLKEPjwRPmolroUPFzdE37Pf06_7RYyEv5UeBijvkXG-tdU8KP7xuNSW7e1BAClWx6s_vCMk5sAvjRzGzq2Fz1ihg5EwvECt4PuUSfz5EPg6AcNBVGBza2cC_Uypq2RAhctTO-vuNNugILebjg8IBBwuIshu2HrONz7Mg8BexeGTjQcjyU1Bo-tY7Msdga4y-u72xAP3qrZwcMIBdYN7Eakc4mth6Mrc8xEKjORqjNAUbAgk4Onxxxn3mfC9spIcWQYsfpsmjuRr_86-wGDq7Kn0_XSungdqs-fy_wBVXX50iCLAsY9vkvNPg3M4_cJggcUOCZm8bLsw%3D%3D)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

|
### **80% Complete, We Only Need 50 More Petition Books To Hit Our Minimum, We still have 800 Petition Books in Circulation. New Signing Locations at the Bottom of the Email.**

### **Our Office is Now Open, Soon We will be Open 7 Days a Week. At this time, please call before you head this way to make sure we have someone here to get your signature.**
**Address: 4201 E Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654****It is on the same road as Ken’s Garden Supply (**_**4121 Dimond Way, Wasilla, AK 99654). Once you turn on Dimond, drive straight up the hill. Do not turn, go straight up the hill, there are White Yard Signs with our logo on them. We will have bigger signs coming soon. If you are disabled, please let us know when you call and we will come to the car for you to sign.**__**Phone Number:**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)_ _**Email:**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com?subject=Office%20)_

#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

#### **DC Draino pictured below wearing one of our buttons while doing a presentation here in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
**Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64aef83a32ce6d26d54f92d6&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64ae66a26078eb20ac7142b0&l=en-US&s=0IEMbbkczECp3LVPqVpvCHsr4a0%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64aef83a32ce6d26d54f92d6&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64ae66a26078eb20ac7142b0&l=en-US&s=Q2eU5tp28-CTJ4YrDM1qRAlTDhw%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**
---
**We will have more signing opportunities all year, we are hoping to have all of the petition books turned in by August 31st, the signature verification process will take time and we want to make sure to we the correct amount of signatures in every district.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---

#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64aef83a32ce6d26d54f92d6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64ae66a26078eb20ac7142b0%26ss_email_id%3D64aef83a32ce6d26d54f92d6%26ss_campaign_name%3D80%2525%2BCompleted%2Bwith%2BRCV%2BRepeal%252C%2BHelp%2BUs%2BFinish%252C%2BNew%2BSigning%2BLocations%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-12T19%253A01%253A02Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64ae66a26078eb20ac7142b0&l=en-US&s=eaUjFFrF_cZSEfBV4ldLE330PHY%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64aef83a32ce6d26d54f92d6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64ae66a26078eb20ac7142b0&l=en-US&s=QRLKIUDNaVvcksunoIiDwUbbFyU%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Reckless decisions from the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I will do everything I can as a Senator to restore trust in the Supreme Court and undo the harmful impacts of their recent rulings.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)
Derek —
In just the last few years, we’ve seen an extreme and partisan Supreme Court overturn decades of legal precedent — stripping away rights and freedoms from millions of Americans.
The Supreme Court is supposed to be a fair, just, and impartial judicial body. But today’s SCOTUS is anything BUT that.
**Their partisan, extreme, and reactionary rulings have deep, personal, and heartbreaking implications for so many people.**
Across the country, women have been deprived of their fundamental right to have an abortion. Colleges will be unable to diversify their classes and provide equal opportunity for students from disadvantaged backgrounds. And young people counting on student debt forgiveness are now grappling with upcoming payments.
**Derek, in Congress, I have already sponsored legislation to expand the Supreme Court. In the Senate, I’ll be fighting tooth and nail to make sure it gets passed.**
[**Can you take a few moments to tell me your thoughts about the Supreme Court and what steps you think we should take to restore balance and a code of ethics?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230712-scotus-survey.hHBa11&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)
[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230712-scotus-survey.hHBa11&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)
---
Thank you for taking some time to do this.
Derek, together, we can rebalance the Supreme Court, insist upon an ethical code of conduct and impose reasonable term limits, so that our children and grandchildren can grow up in a world that has more rights and freedoms — not less.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)
---

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2958%2E5257348%2EFqQsbN)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

Governor Cooper poses as a champion for public education. But he wouldn’t even dare send his own child to public school. **That’s right.** He sent his own child to a staggering $32,000 per year private school but doesn’t want to give other families those same options. But Governor Cooper's attacks on school choice don’t stop there. His loyalty to teachers unions is **so strong** that he’s resorted to declaring a **state of emergency** to stop school choice.
**We cannot allow Governor Cooper or the powerful teachers unions to drown out our vital message.** Peter, will you act now and****[**make an urgent donation**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95035305793d43989978b782d9a2f09c&_e=_8UvU0llOa8Imlhc2dEzFirExCii5_FHN7ff3wHr3ipcm9_UMta9SgOEl10G5vFGa2kZ3BsL1rVVVc3PDnaq5MmuqnxX-Jpt1NHdDFfAJ_wB840HHR8oadjNnKjv54mDCa2Lf3wxl89twYBwKzaH8XCc74G9Qn3aSRXl-bXKw1UVg7ZrYoFTSpznVsRAeYW4hyCHglzBkjXEFxG7q2u97Z2XEgGebZcjyB91XqEXtXzP92pSPBaqVkZ-O7hpCeDDjjiIe9PHvAQGeVGoKzl4l1ZLF2Sk86ObhzPTzNTSwHOCVnzfWzRb9eaINsM6iay0yZe7wPuPcwbJgnHWD8u46OPmbVhzqpGdPKNJDbc1_iK8Dag95AlHXWLImSxd4srXJ93WB57S3gI54A7S_iROlS_jkWdOnaHdZqGDdUrfYUOPUwm5MDEqpYxfw62z88ZyC2ArITD_pAzGoGgKR8erI7ATpm-EUQD5rk8ersAtcw6VUAqY5dp2lL0_nJFo-2m922yoGYvehE6wizeRRxzG2A%3D%3D) to ensure our message stays on the air?

But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I'll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae1e9df96edc4d6d97900200889341b4&_e=tWr-1ZrCJX9Fh2XzNrL83SPxoswrMZPUBDajSwxDgB6Sl9aVDQXDngYdrMlGeexKwWiyrI8DJZlsHZpQN1iTVLMcIH_pSAQqonfpfuBPeHZTKhfxTeMf5yYREE784xkU5txW_P0mlyYnleSq_RuoVI91FGDyttvyv3YTDCT2pWa8jIJYUb6ufbsUKJAeVCT0qkDglsBSc0PWyMNEQ4OTHZrWL7KujKM8AeDmhJR8NNKLejNxeuKaLIwgxuAACtIqkpiGUlJO08bHsCI-kNN9sVKZBp_cAkjoMaAHKl6GU6E%3D)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

School Choice
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

Defeating DEI
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities.

It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process.

Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple:
Public universities will be **explicitly prohibited** from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs.
In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools.

clean_body: Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend,
---
I spent 8 years in the Army as an Apache helicopter pilot, including a deployment to Iraq.
---
That time in the military taught me what it means to sacrifice for my country.
---
**That’s why I’ll always do what's right, no matter the personal cost.**
---
_I’m in Washington, not to advance my career, but to fight for YOU and this country – to be the voice of the people that have been ignored for far too long by the radical Left and the establishment swamp._
---
_I will do whatever it takes to save this country from the radical Left’s destruction, even if it’s the last thing I do._
---
But I can’t fight this all-important battle alone and am counting on my fellow America First patriots like YOU to join me.

| | We have an alarming statistic to share with you. In 2022 alone, Americans received **_more than 50 billion robocalls_**. That’s almost 1,600 robocalls a second.

This outrageous volume of calls is both disruptive and annoying — **but it can also be dangerous**. Senior scams — many of which rely on harassing robocalls and phone calls impersonating government officials — cost older Americans **_nearly $3 billion per year._**

It’s past time to put a stop to this madness. Josh has been hard at work fighting against robocalls in Congress — but he needs your help to step up the pressure.

name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: GREAT news about our fight for fair maps →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, we have **GREAT news** about our fight for fair maps. | **FIRST:**
The Supreme Court issued a huge victory for our movement in _Allen v. Milligan_ by reaffirming the importance of the Voting Rights Act, striking down Alabama’s congressional maps for illegally diluting the power of Black votes, and requiring Alabama to draw new, fair maps before the next election.

**Attorney General Eric Holder called it “a victory for all Americans,” saying it would “have an impact far beyond the borders of Alabama.”**

**THEN:**
_Another_ Supreme Court decision blocked Louisiana’s gerrymandered congressional map, clearing the way for the state to redraw its maps to accurately reflect Black Louisianans.

**NOW:**
Pending challenges in states like Arkansas, Georgia, and Texas could lead to maps being redrawn in those states as well!
| [Donate to help the NDRC
keep fighting for fair maps](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66399205/416205709/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230712_FR_7L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3Y2UwYzY3LWU4MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uC1SOrZeQu6C_jk0zt3AMMjtTNHanu-tvvszUYHsup8=)
---
Team, before the next election, so many maps could be redrawn across the country that, **according to _FiveThirtyEight_ “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”**
[**_We have a rapidly closing window of opportunity to secure fair maps and ensure a level playing field ahead of the 2024 election. Will you rush a donation now to help the NDRC continue our critical work – while there’s still time?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66399206/416205710/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230712_FR_7L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3Y2UwYzY3LWU4MjAtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uC1SOrZeQu6C_jk0zt3AMMjtTNHanu-tvvszUYHsup8=)
