name: Team Tina
subject: Tina’s on the road!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Before Tina was even sworn in as Governor, she promised to visit every county in Oregon in her first year in office. She wanted to hear directly from Oregonians about their most pressing concerns, see firsthand the challenges they’re facing, and build strong partnerships with community leaders across the state. We decided to call it the **One Oregon Listening Tour** , and now that she’s officially visited 16 of Oregon’s 36 counties, **_she’s almost halfway_** _to meeting her promise!_ Tina’s been busy talking with local leaders and community members everywhere she goes, especially when it comes to the state’s three top priorities: housing and homelessness, mental health & addiction care, and education & child care. Here are just a few highlights of the tour so far! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66399600/416205987/1256240469?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxYWVhZC1lODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uh7Lj8-N5t4_NLa8GquB-TRmzz6RG3JNavz5PJJTRQA=)
_Tina visits a micro shelter community in Silverton to house folks experiencing homelessness. This resource center received over $500,000 from the Governor’s homelessness emergency funding package to add 20 new shelter beds._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66399601/416205988/1256240469?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxYWVhZC1lODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uh7Lj8-N5t4_NLa8GquB-TRmzz6RG3JNavz5PJJTRQA=)
_Tina learning more about summer programs in the Woodburn School District and discussing how every district can do this every year._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66399602/416205989/1256240469?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxYWVhZC1lODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uh7Lj8-N5t4_NLa8GquB-TRmzz6RG3JNavz5PJJTRQA=)
_Tina at Victor Dairy in Tillamook where she learned about the joys and challenges of being a farming family and a key part of Oregon’s food industry._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66399603/416205990/1256240469?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxYWVhZC1lODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uh7Lj8-N5t4_NLa8GquB-TRmzz6RG3JNavz5PJJTRQA=)
_Tina even got to take some time to enjoy some of Oregon’s abundant natural beauty at Cape Lookout State Park!_ Tina is looking forward to the 20 counties yet to come, and she’s excited about all the people she’ll meet and places she’ll visit by the end of the year. clean_body: | Peter, Before Tina was even sworn in as Governor, she promised to visit every county in Oregon in her first year in office. She wanted to hear directly from Oregonians about their most pressing concerns, see firsthand the challenges they’re facing, and build strong partnerships with community leaders across the state. We decided to call it the One Oregon Listening Tour , and now that she’s officially visited 16 of Oregon’s 36 counties, she’s almost halfway to meeting her promise! Tina’s been busy talking with local leaders and community members everywhere she goes, especially when it comes to the state’s three top priorities: housing and homelessness, mental health & addiction care, and education & child care. Here are just a few highlights of the tour so far! = Tina visits a micro shelter community in Silverton to house folks experiencing homelessness. This resource center received over $500,000 from the Governor’s homelessness emergency funding package to add 20 new shelter beds. = Tina learning more about summer programs in the Woodburn School District and discussing how every district can do this every year. = Tina at Victor Dairy in Tillamook where she learned about the joys and challenges of being a farming family and a key part of Oregon’s food industry. = Tina even got to take some time to enjoy some of Oregon’s abundant natural beauty at Cape Lookout State Park! Tina is looking forward to the 20 counties yet to come, and she’s excited about all the people she’ll meet and places she’ll visit by the end of the year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Peter. Tina is working hard to make progress on the issues we all care about, and she’ll be grateful to know you have her back. — Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: a note about the extremism of the Colorado Republican Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
We can't afford to ignore this, Team

Team — all of us are more familiar than we would like to be with my colleague Lauren Boebert’s outrageous comments and far-right legislative agenda. But here’s something we don’t talk about enough: the Colorado GOP has become so extreme, and so out of touch with the people of our state, that Boebert is no longer a fringe candidate. The new party chair has taken to calling everyone he disagrees with a “groomer” and promised to use scorched-earth tactics to elect more hard-right, MAGA-style candidates. **Here’s what it all boils down to: if the GOP succeeds in defeating me in this next election — and you can bet they’ll try anything to make that happen — there’s a good chance a candidate in the mold of Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and other far-right figures will take my place.** **[I’m committed to fighting back against GOP extremism and making progress for the regular families whose needs Washington often ignores — but I can’t keep up that work if we let the Colorado GOP flip this seat. The Colorado GOP is determined to ban abortion, make life dangerous for LGBTQ+ Americans, and roll back all the progress we’ve made fighting climate change.
But together, we have what it takes to not only fight back, but to fight for progress.
I’m working every day in Congress to combat our nation’s opioid epidemic, address our shortage of affordable housing, stand up for basic freedoms like the right to choose and the right to vote, and make our economy work better for working people.
[**If you’d like to see more of that kind of representation for Colorado — and less of the far-right antics of Lauren Boebert and other extremists — I’d be so grateful to have your support in this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66399728/416206036/600297262?refcode=email_071223_extremism&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFjNzBkMy1lODIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTsO9JuM2km5N_WJ4ITYPdMmwLieEqqu19SThVHxPVo=)

subject: I’m asking you to make Tim #6
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=15f4ca4b14af44c8aaaf785c00e675ef&_t=8dPJJTd6PyACWQXuVAzOfNRoV-4EuPVJjHr0oM-Qp6R3LLsFF6gkvCi8gaeio3YLeBOg-6BprM3uRxPWJKwQPohQq7R_kuksh5Xd5C2pXFQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=15f4ca4b14af44c8aaaf785c00e675ef&_t=8dPJJTd6PyACWQXuVAzOfNRoV-4EuPVJjHr0oM-Qp6R3LLsFF6gkvCi8gaeio3YLeBOg-6BprM3uRxPWJKwQPohQq7R_kuksh5Xd5C2pXFQ%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation in June was $29.17
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

Building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors. I won't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ed79f41d41d14985912305ce26c9d52b&_e=pp_zh_4j6_2M-2VenuUiZHh65CBUMdGQWtt1tYPAy_4baID9v7pp2NaTUYyfIlb30ITdNSn4exGlxUmfWAJrIr7_0MFC1WMynXuQPAo6Bot6s3exPz0F4Kr3H0eM0WENuTCH4fIYXyH0m-96_A4OplzzxZLNccdimK4KW3JmNmPpC-MsiTMc8_9pW_HsTTt-tD-NKbs15Swp4fv7yIHAugGwWmdBaKAS2SR17CKlvzPvqOVuhOhxb5-b3HnePBhBPw3sENePJy2v-0uQDUsFdzleAzkg2ZoNk0aJY2COvnPWGoudVvPcdePEGlyGXbRnBupuQDQVfi-WWADUM2oQtEWYOhYcpMYcQ-1aIQGk5RKahKcWS54DdMCUM_YSnix7HnHh_5C-NvPdVcs0Ca2tUA%3D%3D)

Hello,
I wanted to reach out directly: I need your help now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert. Right now, we’re facing our most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet, and I have nowhere else to turn.
My race against Boebert last year was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, we lost by just 546 votes. In order to make sure we have the resources to start strong, we’ve set a goal to raise another $200,000 before our mid-July deadline – and missing this goal isn't an option.
This is going to be one of the most expensive House races ever, and Lauren Boebert’s allies have already started attacking me. With just 0.17% being the difference in 2022, every dollar is going to matter.
All of the political pundits are calling this one of _the_ races to watch, but grassroots donors like you are going to be what allows us to correct the lies and hold Boebert accountable.
I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I am asking if you can chip in to my campaign now and help finally send Boebert packing.
Anything you can spare before our critical mid-July fundraising deadline would mean the world and go a long way.
Here's the best link to give now: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/frisch_email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66402627/416213541/1610638071?refcode=em20230712pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=a45a1c1c-ef20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDVhMWMxYy1lZjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpvIMDWkL4VqcfCzMPUOI_bEYI51mMoiVlaRpFmFhHo=)
Thank you so much for your support.
With gratitude -
Adam

subject: Exposing the GOP’s plan to steal the Senate:

body:
It all hinges on one seat!
| **↓ We’ve uncovered the GOP’s new plan to steal the Senate ↓** | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49424?t=6&akid=9117%2E878179%2E7fZ4Yg) **STEP 1:** Recruit MAGA devotees like Sam Brown to jump into key races – after running last cycle, _he has an _army of supporters__ and donors at the ready!

**STEP 2:** Challenge our _most vulnerable Democratic Senators_ like Jacky Rosen – they’re already preparing an avalanche of attacks to overwhelm us!!

**STEP 3:** Dump a boatload of dark money into swing states like Nevada to supercharge their attacks – **_they only need to flip _ONE SEAT_ for this awful plan to work!_**
---
[We’ll be frank: This terrible scheme could succeed if we don’t step our efforts up _right now._ That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 for our SAVE THE SENATE FUND by tomorrow to defend Democrats like Jacky Rosen – please, rush $7 now to keep the Senate out of MAGA hands! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49424?t=7&akid=9117%2E878179%2E7fZ4Yg)

**SAVE THE SENATE FUND: $15,000 | DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TOMORROW**

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: FBI Colludes with Ukrainian Intel to Censor Americans under Biden Misinformation Campaign
body:
In the most recently exposed Biden administration scheme to combat
misinformation, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) colluded
with a compromised Ukrainian intelligence agency to censor the speech
of Americans.

[alt_text]

[*****]
July 12, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64125&L=29854&F=T&&hash=8e3a6d87f5965332d1135ce0d08d257b8d9f0036ce8229973864034a7083c32c]

In the most recently exposed Biden administration scheme to combat
misinformation, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) colluded
with a compromised Ukrainian intelligence agency to censor the speech
of Americans. The federal agency responsible for protecting the nation
against terrorists, violent street gangs and serial killers joined
forces with the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU), which is widely
known to be infiltrated by Russian-aligned forces, to take down the
authentic social media accounts of Americans. This includes a verified
U.S. State Department profile and those belonging to American
journalists. Interestingly, accounts targeted for removal by the SBU
and FBI criticized Russian President Vladimir Putin and expressed
pro-Ukrainian views.

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64125&L=29854&F=T&&hash=8e3a6d87f5965332d1135ce0d08d257b8d9f0036ce8229973864034a7083c32c]

[alt_text] [*****] July 12, 2023 [article-image] [] In the most recently exposed Biden administration scheme to combat misinformation, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) colluded with a compromised Ukrainian intelligence agency to censor the speech of Americans. The federal agency responsible for protecting the nation against terrorists, violent street gangs and serial killers joined forces with the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU), which is widely known to be infiltrated by Russian-aligned forces, to take down the authentic social media accounts of Americans. This includes a verified U.S. State Department profile and those belonging to American journalists. Interestingly, accounts targeted for removal by the SBU and FBI criticized Russian President Vladimir Putin and expressed pro-Ukrainian views. **Each time I’ve run for office, it’s because I recognized a problem that I had the right tools to fix.**

That’s the outlook handed down to me by my great-grandmother, Maebell James. She was the strongest woman I’ve ever met. She prevailed over cruelty and injustice in her life with inexhaustible dignity.

She had one rule for her family: **No complaints.**

She’d often say, _“If you don't like something, you go farther and you do better.”_

That lesson lived on through my hard working parents. They taught me what integrity looks like, and to respect all work.

Their example led me to enter public service for the first time 13 years ago, right here in Prince George’s County. I fought to develop new economic opportunities, improve the health, safety, and security of our communities, and strengthen our education system.

I’m deeply proud of the things we’ve accomplished so far — we’ve received ringing endorsements from pro-democracy groups like EMILYs List, Collective PAC, and Higher Heights, as well as the support of more than 40 elected officials from right here in Maryland.

With a little determination and a good attitude, I know together we can go farther and do better for all Marylanders.

There will be bumps on the journey ahead. But as I write this, there’s not a doubt in my mind that we’ll overcome them together.

[Peter, if you can, will you chip in $25? clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hi Peter, Angela Alsobrooks here! I’m a lifelong Marylander, mom, former elected prosecutor, current County Executive of Prince George’s County, and now Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in Maryland. Before I tell you all about why I decided to run for Senate, I want to make you a simple promise: I will always take the time to learn from and listen to you. I’ll work diligently every single day to make this community proud. The truth is, there aren’t that many people in the Senate who live like and think like the people they’re supposed to represent. I know the people of Maryland should have a Senator who not only fights for them, but who also understands and shares their concerns. The journey we’re on is an investment in a better tomorrow, for Maryland and for our country. I can’t tell you how grateful I am that you’re by my side, Peter. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Each time I’ve run for office, it’s because I recognized a problem that I had the right tools to fix. That’s the outlook handed down to me by my great-grandmother, Maebell James. She was the strongest woman I’ve ever met. She prevailed over cruelty and injustice in her life with inexhaustible dignity. She had one rule for her family: No complaints. She’d often say, “If you don't like something, you go farther and you do better.” That lesson lived on through my hard working parents. They taught me what integrity looks like, and to respect all work. Their example led me to enter public service for the first time 13 years ago, right here in Prince George’s County. I fought to develop new economic opportunities, improve the health, safety, and security of our communities, and strengthen our education system. I’m deeply proud of the things we’ve accomplished so far — we’ve received ringing endorsements from pro-democracy groups like EMILYs List, Collective PAC, and Higher Heights, as well as the support of more than 40 elected officials from right here in Maryland. With a little determination and a good attitude, I know together we can go farther and do better for all Marylanders. There will be bumps on the journey ahead. But as I write this, there’s not a doubt in my mind that we’ll overcome them together. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | With love and gratitude, Angela Alsobrooks The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71a4b42dac4c4e94900f0ed5c7c54003&_e=mh8e8lKfk02cXVKo-qDmpG4Dpx29CObu9_31AU6yp-05WuySmjmcGXl-5HRPYKZ3laMp4YHW5hXdgyZtgDUHb2-ei42VYxrB2NUdnYiIL_7I_v-ICuVp9D7kefBHjQiIMk0D9KgSpACwnoh1Ng6M2jSymisYdofTREbQ0WtwMk2O-G4CE_nATpK0GBUx344FezjfBOczdw4z2GDizyskBYQTXcyh2cZdo7Focd8uX-LhHoC-7aFw-Ip4ShQgJIHrWWow5wGztzkrsL3u22A24A%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71a4b42dac4c4e94900f0ed5c7c54003&_e=mh8e8lKfk02cXVKo-qDmpG4Dpx29CObu9_31AU6yp-05WuySmjmcGXl-5HRPYKZ3laMp4YHW5hXdgyZtgDUHb2-ei42VYxrB2NUdnYiIL_7I_v-ICuVp9D7kefBHjQiIr43Fis1S62HSVeUT7RG7qXBZ9bJADNe9FJQf_MMIUh7ut8CtqoAdFDHsJk-pdoYrmcrtPXVk2hMNegM9rTWoBOymsFDHlQp9RBSXca5aPo2-yUf7sqBxvBVUGIkfzYfIzOd5zXbe9RQNw6sBCt5ZwQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71a4b42dac4c4e94900f0ed5c7c54003&_e=mh8e8lKfk02cXVKo-qDmpG4Dpx29CObu9_31AU6yp-05WuySmjmcGXl-5HRPYKZ3laMp4YHW5hXdgyZtgDUHb2-ei42VYxrB2NUdnYiIL_7I_v-ICuVp9D7kefBHjQiI--HMruuFAQDUvG5UlX1UBaaZumrTlArLZe8TOJz2noNDbiIbZpZcXRgq9AvpySbFeFulxfdGDlBhakW6EP5ujLjDVEqbLPsS9sFKc21GnNVOP09yVVc7T2Tc3mGwRvW2a3_jvITMK7ITIzSq8Hjpcg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71a4b42dac4c4e94900f0ed5c7c54003&_e=mh8e8lKfk02cXVKo-qDmpG4Dpx29CObu9_31AU6yp-05WuySmjmcGXl-5HRPYKZ3laMp4YHW5hXdgyZtgDUHb2-ei42VYxrB2NUdnYiIL_7I_v-ICuVp9D7kefBHjQiIPMQALVDNuyx0K9unqkW-oRc5wL1cdt56OdHszvtXf9ihj90QkdPEeP1d7_QsrfeHs9n46P3OyIBzxCxUdrHxGm8gLgGf0O5dWRbxMnjLX894cu-dF92yajMoDhJiqv3BLM6WCyoXTOSpW2hHaA3WiA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. Every spineless Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b30cce6bf8184ed19c81af5207cc0c85&_e=IRu7m3wnmvNNSvk0nFDdGI2CV2VSpfVpmOVRNEXHhiak1MPw08G4lC4-hqQ3Eo4F5bWp5IuBuwDRToLTlSCDB4gnoi7z-zbjB7YYFca2HSdFae_CwZsv7nkywHjKqJjvA-BimH4wO5ZH9oduKp9NGqYsfokOyshuKYtlLU9OyCKqIY2199TWHSeixwNeqMCbTe_u_B4XiQ_t_isH6vTIn2JXOtV07jEz3S6iUi8eW1s6h54tRDblbhwXB_l0LmQAdpNiXgFde-JLr7O9ZcVw_Oxuy4CQ-QXW5JKyHZNzWazwIagxKgGuaKRQvYH9RdEstJk88TSXXStiXa50S0Ia2ijsOthpygKE1BJjB7O3sF7gvzXaNmJqTLGMiug4-PiHh_R1zkHeTUuIDczgKU_d6QoihAKzbp4gkJC6kkw2lfc%3D "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b30cce6bf8184ed19c81af5207cc0c85&_e=IRu7m3wnmvNNSvk0nFDdGI2CV2VSpfVpmOVRNEXHhiak1MPw08G4lC4-hqQ3Eo4F5bWp5IuBuwDRToLTlSCDB4gnoi7z-zbjB7YYFca2HSdFae_CwZsv7nkywHjKqJjvA-BimH4wO5ZH9oduKp9NGqYsfokOyshuKYtlLU9OyCKqIY2199TWHSeixwNeqMCbTe_u_B4XiQ_t_isH6vTIn2JXOtV07jEz3S6iUi8eW1s6h54tRDblbhwXB_l0LmQAdpNiXgFde-JLr7O9ZcVw_LdJidXoZMuIT8c9LoBWHxtIVxQxt5HhHX4wiwQnQsP8nfK5zC08lRzYpFI9-5qDuuClGrNUVoB8sueGQukPDyORtMM0UkVAb7rT4APBai4LBFVvf3VTqzl1hODpl23XDcI_2aREUJNYx7VHvnHXX0U%3D)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b30cce6bf8184ed19c81af5207cc0c85&_e=IRu7m3wnmvNNSvk0nFDdGI2CV2VSpfVpmOVRNEXHhiak1MPw08G4lC4-hqQ3Eo4F5bWp5IuBuwDRToLTlSCDB4gnoi7z-zbjB7YYFca2HSdFae_CwZsv7nkywHjKqJjvA-BimH4wO5ZH9oduKp9NGqYsfokOyshuKYtlLU9OyCKqIY2199TWHSeixwNeqMCbTe_u_B4XiQ_t_isH6vTIn2JXOtV07jEz3S6iUi8eW1s6h54tRDblbhwXB_l0LmQAdpNiXgFde-JLr7O9ZcVw_IBAvE9PHhwjDQVu0Lf_pTH_lh-9jtWc7y3XvaXONaXUHBzOej9BkomMf0WIE5MEdd-_AQy_CyNJ80zb0HQaL4_NhaJFI-wNLgNaK-z4bL4tZvF5ppjAOJ-p8IsAguT8gEyQaMZM82A0e2e8M26oBio%3D "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Katie Porter
subject: Some advised me not to run as a progressive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I will stand by my record any day of the week.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)
**I ran on Medicare for All in 2017—a policy choice some advised me not to take at the time.** I was running to flip an Orange County district that had been held by Republicans for decades, and conventional wisdom said only “moderates” could win in these purple seats.
But we proved them wrong, Derek. We flipped that seat blue, and defended it even after redistricting.
How did we do it? By talking about the real issues facing families and working people everyday in this country, due to corporate greed, political corruption, and broken systems created and maintained by the rich and powerful. Whether you’re a Republican or Democrat, old or young, I’ve never met anyone who doesn’t want a strong, stable, globally competitive economy.
California’s next Senator will have the chance to guide our party’s messaging and policy priorities for decades to come. I’m running because I know I can help Democrats up and down the ballot in every part of the country—from rural areas like the one I grew up in, to suburbs like the one I’m raising my family in.
**I’m a proud progressive representing a purple district.** I’m a lifelong consumer advocate with a history of holding big corporations accountable and getting sh*t done. I’m one of just a few single working moms in Congress. I will _always_ put what’s right for California above politics. And I’ll stand by my record any day of the week.
[**If you’re with me, please pitch in a donation of $5 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230712-1?refcode=EMAJ12_1_REC_20230712_V1_F&refcode2=26393_3422442_9j_onL&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230712-1?refcode=EMAJ12_1_REC_20230712_V1_F&refcode2=26393_3422442_9j_onL&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)**
Thank you for your support.
—Katie
P.S. I’ve won in a purple district with a progressive agenda three terms in a row—even when super PACs spent millions of dollars attacking us. [**Can you pitch in a donation today to help me stand up to the super PACs and outside spending, so I can bring my experience to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230712-1?refcode=EMAJ12_1_REC_20230712_V1_F&refcode2=26393_3422442_9j_onL&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ12_1_REC_20230712_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26393_3422442_9j_onL&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=26393%2E3422442%2E9j_onL)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: [SURVEY] Which Democratic pro-choice Senate candidate are you most excited about?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: No More Silos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
It’s time for Americans to come together again.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=568d39051f&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# No More Silos
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, As you’ve probably guessed, I’ve been spending a lot of time in Iowa lately. I recently spoke with [a group of Republican activists in Waterloo](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=9a78d7918d&e=0be619cbaa), where I shared my life story, as well as my vision for a new Golden Age for America. I also told them the story of my conversation with two 85-year-old Democrats in California who, believe it or not, shared my views on so many issues that they were actually finishing my sentences! Remarkably, these ladies told me that they had never before had a conversation with a conservative Republican.It’s an important reminder that as Americans, there is far more that unites us than divides us. We all want the same things – a safe, prosperous country for ourselves and future generations to enjoy.It’s time for us to come together again. That unity requires true leadership, and as the next president, I’ll bring good will, humor, and common sense to a political system weighed down by constant drama, negativity, and inaction. [**But first, I need a spot on the GOP presidential primary debate stage. For that to happen, the RNC says we must have the support of 40,000 individual donors. Can you give ANY AMOUNT – even $1! – to help us get there?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=82ccb50f1b&e=0be619cbaa)
---
Thank you for your support, **Larry Elder
**GOP Candidate for President [**P.S. When we are divided, the political elites win. When we are united, We the People are unstoppable! Your donation of ANY SIZE - $10, $5, even $1! – can help guarantee a voice representing the American people to the GOP debate stage. Can you chip in today?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=17f8d1bbe1&e=0be619cbaa)
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acfca0e726f54e99816ab8e947857601&_e=b3mIoiUIS_Nklfz56Fm5uCFxe2mNVsSpMyOyv0yonT9oTokxigbQAPTeX7f4UjhOXEk0oU1prpAGDmQDzZKdOisL-uVOgWP4fLbTSOr_LeoibgfYGnd4dEeu7Q6Cm9EXdrpQOU6ase24GCmQ7uK-OoOAhHR10A84jC8gGT9gwwXyvyxENgLRnaaYgr_fKS-IXJZT8fEcB-SicT6HBJqseJBXJmWF4LaOeild3wRnPz6Sfi3Chwg-7xroBTZ1W0QJQGn2NYgAFpT-RZbkVwhUHA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acfca0e726f54e99816ab8e947857601&_e=b3mIoiUIS_Nklfz56Fm5uCFxe2mNVsSpMyOyv0yonT9oTokxigbQAPTeX7f4UjhOXEk0oU1prpAGDmQDzZKdOisL-uVOgWP4fLbTSOr_LeoibgfYGnd4dEeu7Q6Cm9EXUtOkb8ggEjiGnYL5FUjk53s1untsGnFZKsLcvoiT3JzWajEHtMIMMGSZ3EF-9DnNSAImRP5lofWrKuG91NQIVwOfsyILJsuo9LaI7itG8Mw4udBX5pKmS_xmsx56BihFYTX0ZUnVKl6aLDFVwrIutA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acfca0e726f54e99816ab8e947857601&_e=b3mIoiUIS_Nklfz56Fm5uCFxe2mNVsSpMyOyv0yonT9oTokxigbQAPTeX7f4UjhOXEk0oU1prpAGDmQDzZKdOisL-uVOgWP4fLbTSOr_LeoibgfYGnd4dEeu7Q6Cm9EXsyP_ZyoNAcllO1JZMSkzom17Qoc9VMbfYpajPx4t18nAQ98Ji_xdrgkl7Wvfg5VTXikBci79D1T0FTDNFNV0Y6zEX8Yu5USANgcdtOZuU8TFxfSeyXGtjOemwpMpfAfUyzn359XvRDO-vosH0TPKUw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Greg Abbott recently signed a bill banning local regulations to guarantee water breaks for Texas workers—regulations I fought to pass in Austin and Dallas as a labor organizer years ago.

But in the weeks since Abbott signed the bill, the Texas heat wave has killed a number of workers in our state.

**I told MSNBC that these are the deadly consequences of Greg Abbott choosing his corporate mega donors over working families.** That’s why we have to take this fight above Greg Abbott’s head.

Peter, when I was a labor organizer in 2010 we fought to deliver rest breaks for workers—and won. Then in 2015, we fought for rest breaks in Dallas—and won.

Just in the last few weeks, Greg Abbott signed a bill to roll-back and block regulations like these that guarantee basic workers’ rights. Now, Texas workers are paying the price. Just last week a USPS carrier in Dallas, a construction worker in Fort Bend County, and a power lineman in East Texas died while working in the Texas heat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66403454/416217568/593283661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJjMGY4OS1mMzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qzkIl-hLGWb37cppF9pisXfsUc5kmALVBkiMyGEppE=)
**Eliminating these rest breaks was a key priority of Greg Abbott’s corporate mega donors—so it was a key priority for Greg Abbott too. **

He sold out Texas workers. But we’re fighting back. **That’s why my team and I are fighting for federal protections for the basic right to have a break from the heat. Can you help us get it done?**

**[Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us fight back against Greg Abbott and deliver basic worker protections for Texas families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66403455/416217569/593283661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJjMGY4OS1mMzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qzkIl-hLGWb37cppF9pisXfsUc5kmALVBkiMyGEppE=)**

clean_body: Peter, Greg Abbott recently signed a bill banning local regulations to guarantee water breaks for Texas workers—regulations I fought to pass in Austin and Dallas as a labor organizer years ago. But in the weeks since Abbott signed the bill, the Texas heat wave has killed a number of workers in our state. I told MSNBC that these are the deadly consequences of Greg Abbott choosing his corporate mega donors over working families. That’s why we have to take this fight above Greg Abbott’s head. My team and I are fighting for federal protections for basic workers’ rights like water breaks.= = **= Peter, when I was a labor organizer in 2010 we fought to deliver rest breaks for workers—and won. Then in 2015, we fought for rest breaks in Dallas—and won. Just in the last few weeks, Greg Abbott signed a bill to roll-back and block regulations like these that guarantee basic workers’ rights. Now, Texas workers are paying the price. Just last week a USPS carrier in Dallas, a construction worker in Fort Bend County, and a power lineman in East Texas died while working in the Texas heat. = Eliminating these rest breaks was a key priority of Greg Abbott’s corporate mega donors—so it was a key priority for Greg Abbott too. He sold out Texas workers. But we’re fighting back. That’s why my team and I are fighting for federal protections for the basic right to have a break from the heat. Can you help us get it done? = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl]
It’s hard to believe that we’re already halfway through the year. Lizzie and the team have been working hard to build momentum in our district and in our state for the important 2024 elections that are right around the corner. We’ve been attending events around the district and connecting with voters, volunteers, and Democratic leaders as we gear up for critical elections in Texas next year.
Here are a few recent highlights:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl]
Our Interns are here!
Our Democracy Summer fellowship program kicked off at the end of June, and we’re so excited for the arrival of the newest additions to #TeamLizzie. They are already learning critical lessons about organizing, and helping us organize and get the word out about our race in TX-07 as well as the stakes in the 2024 elections from the top of the ballot to the bottom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl]
As you can see, our work together is as broad as it is important—connecting our community, training the next generation, and electing Democrats at home, throughout the state, and across the country. Re-electing Lizzie is central to our work, but just like in past years, we will make sure our work lifts up others. We need good leaders now more than ever, and you make that possible.
Thanks for being part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230711nl?refcode=folf230711nl]

Re-electing Lizzie is central to our work, but just like in past years, we will make sure our work lifts up others. We need good leaders now more than ever, and you make that possible. Thanks for being part of the team, Team Lizzie DONATE [] PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Lizzie Fletcher for Congress 3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636 Houston, TX 77098 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Greedy cruise companies are threatening endangered orcas
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1872975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **ORCA UPDATE: In just the last two decades, the population of southern resident orcas has dropped by 15 whales. **This startling decline has continued despite orcas being listed as endangered under the Endangered Species Act. A key culprit in their continued decline? The shipping and fossil fuel industries. Despite being protected under the ESA, orca habitat continues to be flooded with pollution from the shipping and fossil fuel industries. And the proposed Trans Mountain Pipeline and Robert Banks T2 shipping terminal could be the final nail in the species’ coffin. [**Please, Friend, sign our petition by midnight to save the 73 remaining orcas.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1872976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1872977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orcas need your HELP, Friend. Recently, after the tragic death of matiarch Marina, we reported on another Southern Resident orca, Cappuccino. The last time this playful whale was seen, his dorsal fin had completely collapsed. His body was _wasting_ _away_. With no fat left on him, it was presumed he could no longer keep his body afloat -- **forcing him to sink and drown**. His body could not be recovered. Then, just last year, yet another young male orca from the same pod, Ripple, was presumed to have suffered a similar devastating death.
The deaths of Marina, Cappuccino, and Ripple are a dire warning. **Orcas are under attack**! Shipping noise and fossil fuel megaprojects are **_destroying _**their habitat and food source. With only 75 Southern Resident Killer Whales remaining in the wild, we must ACT fast. **[Please help us collect 198 more signatures to protect orcas.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1872978?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1872977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Team Fetterman
subject: 👥 Thousands of folks coming together 👥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re defending a narrow Democratic majority, and the same right-wing PACs and politicians are ready to spend million$ to see us fail.
#
Hey Derek, let's run down where we're at:
**FIRST:** We defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and elected John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate.
**THEN:** We got to work. We're standing up for working people in the fight for livable wages. John's introducing legislation that will really help PA families. And we're helping confirm some of the most diverse, qualified, and impressive judges and officials for roles around the country that make a difference in people's lives.
**NOW:** We HAVE to defend a narrow Democratic majority, and the same right-wing PACs and politicians are ready to spend million$ to see us fail. That's why we need your support.
**[So Derek: Can you make a contribution of any amount to support John Fetterman's work and help us defend our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230712-1?refcode=em20230712-1-8456&refcode2=8456_434096_7HlY5L&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230712-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230712-8456&refcode2=8456_434096_7HlY5L&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)**
Every donation makes an impact, even when it's not an election year.
That's because instead of being funded by corporate PACs or ultra-wealthy donors, we were able to build a powerful movement in every corner of PA with thousands and thousands of folks chipping in $12.66, $5, or $100 at a time. 👥👥👥👥👥
Your contribution, no matter the amount, is how we're able to support John's work + keep campaigning year-round. It really matters, Derek.
Our finance team has told us we're a little behind where we need to be to keep pace with the budget we planned. 😬 **[So please consider chipping in $5 to help us catch up + continue growing our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230712-1?refcode=em20230712-1-8456&refcode2=8456_434096_7HlY5L&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)**
We're so proud of this team.
Thanks,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230712-8456-footer&t=1&refcode2=8456_434096_7HlY5L&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8456%2E434096%2E7HlY5L)

[**July 12, 1861:** At the age of 24, Bill Hickok began his legendary gunslinging career with a gunfight against three men in Nebraska. Reports spread rapidly, exaggerating the story. [**July 12, 1862:** The highest medal for valor in combat available for members of the U.S. armed forces, the Medal of Honor, was authorized for Navy Sailors and Marines first in 1861. The following year in 1862, it was also authorized for Army Soldiers. Since its establishment, the Medal of Honor has been awarded to over 3,400 members of the Department of Defense Services and the U.S. Coast Guard.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c6cd69c0fff4260845bf51eedaaab32&_e=CnxeOjyBg6meiGtbqycAlgAeEHhQPomcgraoyU64DWaVWJ9YxcfWNKlMg5Sx5JHggzwpHfP__JBVGyzRFkGJlai7vsIVvDDh7YAhYr1B3kFdSM42izN54dtAZTgovCqF1vf4eIPAvUFZOWAs0FWpPM_FsgKK8jW1sswPxSk_7imwDtqqMcWQPnev-oRgayBhBv64zcHIBS9QcT9sBNI5-Q3itbBCkK2HsWnFKf8WZWIBAs1IFzUK0FNuTbNUpXknhp9qPItK6voIiZwZKVeLNg%3D%3D) **Source -[army.mil](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c6cd69c0fff4260845bf51eedaaab32&_e=CnxeOjyBg6meiGtbqycAlgAeEHhQPomcgraoyU64DWaVWJ9YxcfWNKlMg5Sx5JHggzwpHfP__JBVGyzRFkGJlai7vsIVvDDh7YAhYr1B3kHCqXAPs-YOOpqY7FVCsPgGYfbedrPcjEERw4wZwvMtDOz85d0azRt3ZRl6ccQGoU0q5C97NgLOx_3aN9MTGT6dDdTRQdXP2BcwemXQIpAKsR8j7PJhFli-UuMTzX6lrctmcXBqHTPLiGfDHEqtKxaACZwtsBIY-IJm5tOfV6diwA%3D%3D)**

body:

| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d51f137a410e431393285831a411ed63&_e=peWE5o3Y1a_F_87v51CdQeO16AdZetQbDJfGVWcKE_UKHIiJcwmhs7NHfS30ekMR9cxf53Y2h3BYNL7wax1Mlr-PBnIVDbagQ-HK-AbnUWDXK4uTqXkzu7d6nkPTPN8McQe5Wm4Iih17pws-M7eTd6-uUsvFjWh1Td8jFgV7vRI4UOeIqe9ARDPBgGCGHz0_1-U0Ctr8lxK1KwSGUBnSnqxjdYNvs-rwTF9qBuyceBlxT9U2DEJX7M6mgqRFtPpxg6Ts1ynGyZh2fF242m3HrvuWl6CA1G6GqOOXx_f0DeosEIEAQV4seNW4Wv7NSPljHfWzwt7H4uaJr7rK-9KlrwEdmDXx4oQK6ROxyfrP66Y-PKwwi11no2BSrCcaa4zA1sG_qhTc2F8-b_MpfJlL-NdNlFp9tMhnoM4ARDloHnI%3D)

Friend,
At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the _FIRST-IN-THE-NATION_ primary state of New Hampshire.
While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty.
I thought to myself - you know what would be great there...
_**... a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign.**_
And I don't mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within.
I'd love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I'm asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall.
_But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I'll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque._

body:
| [**Peter, I need your immediate attention: Kevin McCarthy and his far-right allies are handing out $6 MILLION in special-interest cash to vulnerable Republicans everywhere to steal back our slim lead in the polls and cling to power for another two years. I’m reaching out because fighting back immediately couldn’t be more critical. Can you rush in $14 before midnight to close this fundraising gap, hand Republicans a DEVASTATING defeat, and help me take back our House Majority? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66403925/416220111/-1810142053?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGQ0MzYxNi1mNzIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5MCeRv_4ineTcsUqfJ0ohVgnrEWNlBTEP_3jtp3o_N0=)

body:
The U.S. government can and must hold Israel accountable for its ongoing war crimes. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvqO9YOXONPhXjNyjdR02Kzax_hZD5SHkixL1sCMS8QeihPLwX8moa7cghC8rtaya9aWAFFQk0ipYsIPVK_ErEGRB-08ZNfmjKVpxAk5hsqB8HiJrAAkTC-Fr1PsAXTBspBPfzTCtoNjmOpoDM72fcGGkxv16LS2NyCsBuG8d88paw1z40lnN5_drXoCqobivBUCFY3DWmIoWCVx7NP35Ang/3xt/aTxpxHCzTNSzYqu5yNw__w/h0/t0wt6Zi3_aax3XodcrWwcTulWTizh_fPhBCBKS4bc08)
---
Friend, Last week, the Israeli military escalated its brutal attacks on West Bank’s Jenin refugee camp, bombing and killing civilians (including children), blocking medical assistance for wounded Palestinians, shooting journalists, firing on hospitals where families sought refuge, and destroying essential roads, water and sewage lines, and 80% of the homes in the area. UN officials expressed shock at the destruction and trauma in Jenin, reporting that children in the refugee camp are now afraid to leave their homes.[1] **Without international condemnation, Israel will continue escalating violence and traumatizing generations of Palestinians.** **Prime Minister Netanyahu said this would “not be a one-time action.”** **Although these war crimes were aided by U.S. weapons and taxpayer dollars, President Biden has not criticized the invasion.** Instead the White House released a statement supporting Israel’s “right to defend” itself.[2] **To be clear, there are not two equal sides here. Occupying military powers do not have legal rights to “defend” themselves against the people they control.** The UN Secretary-General reiterated this when responding to last week’s assault on Jenin, noting that “Israel, as the occupying power... has the responsibility to ensure that the [Palestinian] civilian population is protected against all acts of violence.”[3] The people in Jenin’s refugee camp were made refugees after 1948’s Nakba, where 800,000 Palestinians were forced out of their homelands. Israel’s far-right leaders have called for another Nakba, but the Nakba never ended, with Israel’s government continuing to terrorize and oppress the Palestinian people—who are not allowed to escape or even become citizens. **Our country funds this violent apartheid regime. When our political leaders stay silent, we dehumanize Palestinians and enable more horror.** [**Add your name if you agree: We need more members of Congress and members of the Biden administration to speak out and condemn Israel’s increasing attacks on Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL07CUsFEmUBVsRS4_dT_KOFDVC7C9AqHwe7S_2UZNzjm6zID2b5NqZyxU5AWzQ5wPChck1zFr5suVw4n1wVN6CpiIlHJXz4PFORd8cj4M2ZpkNmHlnbkOok__C_KGRkyWG6yKEQPwan3JT-jDpv_lVtvKdtipZdVuOr-SdJlZUCr9EdHOMK7OdVLFn7_rHjmxiQUYQxYDqnZ1vywCeLvgJ5WMP6JcALMh8b3aca1ZHpavPxNEBlTPw7miCdaduO7xAsFsfFL2mhPLQn4EltMMhkzo_Ubkuea2Eb-KD19tOiyL/3xt/aTxpxHCzTNSzYqu5yNw__w/h1/qNazmaIreYz_ACBKD-cQ7eobzCG3vNhuGreiTQ93N-M) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL02mvQH34A4UZobDuNeoriEZ4bT_wJamTOi90cj07yPJ-22JqCjCn6Qw_2lo4KDzorPEsHv6GHR4nsrUrEjvSicSdvrqpONxrkWwWqVGTQcmLuyEYgAGbaccnQKzHJvvEMHLTI67YO_LCIIRadeThiCzt3Yaa0DE7ig_-fZ4YbSg3HTH7wodCEsES0FRNcPLNOfvFMdDL925MGib8R1pFwoLhCSIUAjSDcNHuAdrVSDeU6UXM9qHWNrRbapntXvHAHU2pXp2745Dz_oHVSF5rzY99z6eVmV66Zsca8Ex8IrDb/3xt/aTxpxHCzTNSzYqu5yNw__w/h2/iPX8my_ovaKHEzLPDdPBovrvWz8bgQuzAbU9isBQcO4)

Rashida

From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Sat, July 8, 2023
Subject: Sign to condemn Israel’s attacks on West Bank cities
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week, the Israeli military escalated its recent deadly raids on West Bank cities, bombing the city of Jenin and killing children in a refugee camp.
The people who were forced to flee from the Jenin refugee camp this week have been made refugees multiple times. They descend from families who came to Jenin during the 1948 Nakba, when violent militias forcibly removed close to 800,000 Indigenous Palestinians from their homelands.
Clearly, the Israeli government is still trying to displace and erase Palestinians. For multiple days this week, Israeli soldiers in Jenin blocked medical assistance for wounded Palestinians by bulldozing roads, and fired on hospitals where families sought refuge.
They destroyed 80% of Palestinian homes, cut off water and electricity, and shot at journalists. Remember: When the military murdered beloved Palestinian American journalist Shireen Abu Akleh last year, she was covering a military raid on Jenin. Attacks on Jenin have continued up through last week, and then again this week.
**The U.S. government can and must hold Israel accountable for these ongoing war crimes.**
**The Biden administration and Congress can refuse to send billions of our tax dollars to the Israeli military each year. At minimum, they can speak out and condemn these human rights violations.**
[**Add your name to tell Congress and the Biden administration: Condemn this week’s war crimes, and speak out against Israel’s attacks on West Bank cities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlu-i6nB4VJ8K8Ns881jqWJ_mQkUB4bvKy8MpaANkhpcN7TOBBczBwXgWUrOUrRMzpk2chDZGDoMLd4M3uvjgB5zWpErL7ogE2GlowIwyFL0wWH-4ML0c3otr6Ba3DeYgMsv245n_Gehd3kMt2mPYDIYuCztUkf6Jecllj9L7RzWfrLG2CUb99Vtq8CWCkJErLr6Pq5KTNhC2Jxab9OfWllZqjt_u9W3LOuZ5CHzm4ChBl9VfZ0x4-75JOn0hQ626z7M2lYOqnMiLHBKZ4rnHvcPSc2cM2vEXoL-5iDCKW9TbxJAjCejHlQnNQIuYY81JylO9LMnxetMobBYfm6Heb08d76qpmx2tvcn96w5hlbEaoXc9kFj7g1JEVBFhIuy318bK2nlz9fJgOktruNfgxR/3xt/aTxpxHCzTNSzYqu5yNw__w/h6/lbh5V3BcpZOEdD8mleuL3VgbliiMRZB7R_JyrBVM9q8)

Official military attacks have escalated dramatically this year, as have attacks by Israeli settlers.
**Top Israeli government officials have called for “another Nakba” and have openly supported increasingly horrific and frequent settler-led pogroms, where Israelis kill Palestinians and destroy their homes.**
To be clear: This is not a “conflict” between two equal sides, or between two countries. Israel’s powerful government and military keep terrorizing and oppressing the Palestinian people, who are not allowed to escape or even become citizens.
**This is an apartheid regime enacting ethnic cleansing and war crimes with American backing, bulldozers, and bullets.**
**Meanwhile, U.S. officials keep trying to silence criticism of Israel.**
They tried to block a UN event this year commemorating the Nakba, and U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy tried to stop an event about the Nakba on Capitol Hill. These attempts have failed, and will continue to fail as long as we keep speaking out.
But too many U.S. officials stay silent, and this inaction enables the Israeli government to continue colonizing Palestinians with impunity.
**Without condemnation, Israel will continue to escalate violence, killing more Palestinians than last year—which was the deadliest year so far. We cannot allow this unbearable status quo to continue.**

Our country funds this violent apartheid regime. When our political leaders stay silent, we dehumanize Palestinians and enable more horror. | Thank you for continuing to act for Palestinian liberation. In solidarity, Rashida [1] [2] [3] \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, July 8, 2023 Subject: Sign to condemn Israel’s attacks on West Bank cities To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, the Israeli military escalated its recent deadly raids on West Bank cities, bombing the city of Jenin and killing children in a refugee camp. The people who were forced to flee from the Jenin refugee camp this week have been made refugees multiple times. They descend from families who came to Jenin during the 1948 Nakba, when violent militias forcibly removed close to 800,000 Indigenous Palestinians from their homelands. Clearly, the Israeli government is still trying to displace and erase Palestinians. For multiple days this week, Israeli soldiers in Jenin blocked medical assistance for wounded Palestinians by bulldozing roads, and fired on hospitals where families sought refuge. They destroyed 80% of Palestinian homes, cut off water and electricity, and shot at journalists. Remember: When the military murdered beloved Palestinian American journalist Shireen Abu Akleh last year, she was covering a military raid on Jenin. Attacks on Jenin have continued up through last week, and then again this week. The U.S. government can and must hold Israel accountable for these ongoing war crimes. The Biden administration and Congress can refuse to send billions of our tax dollars to the Israeli military each year. At minimum, they can speak out and condemn these human rights violations. Official military attacks have escalated dramatically this year, as have attacks by Israeli settlers. Top Israeli government officials have called for “another Nakba” and have openly supported increasingly horrific and frequent settler-led pogroms, where Israelis kill Palestinians and destroy their homes. To be clear: This is not a “conflict” between two equal sides, or between two countries. Israel’s powerful government and military keep terrorizing and oppressing the Palestinian people, who are not allowed to escape or even become citizens. This is an apartheid regime enacting ethnic cleansing and war crimes with American backing, bulldozers, and bullets. Meanwhile, U.S. officials keep trying to silence criticism of Israel. They tried to block a UN event this year commemorating the Nakba, and U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy tried to stop an event about the Nakba on Capitol Hill. These attempts have failed, and will continue to fail as long as we keep speaking out. But too many U.S. officials stay silent, and this inaction enables the Israeli government to continue colonizing Palestinians with impunity. Without condemnation, Israel will continue to escalate violence, killing more Palestinians than last year—which was the deadliest year so far. We cannot allow this unbearable status quo to continue. Thank you for taking action. We will keep fighting until Palestinians can live freely, with human dignity and equal rights. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: A 3-time Grammy winner just endorsed! ♫
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
Peter,
I wanted to be sure you heard the news about three-time Grammy winner Lucinda Williams supporting my campaign for Nashville mayor!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
Peter, there has never been an artist more honest than Lu, and I am so grateful and honored to have her support.
The momentum behind our campaign to put Nashville first is growing every day! Nashvillians want accessibility, affordable housing, public education, smart growth, and sustainability— and I’m ready to deliver.
But I can’t do it alone. Peter, will you join Lucinda Williams and the other amazing community leaders, elected officials, and organizations supporting my campaign for Nashville mayor with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_TH_30_90_10_AllD]
JOIN OUR WINNING TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230710_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD_RS]
With immense gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230712_em_fr_b1_HC_30_90_10_AllD]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]

Nashville, TN 37203

name: Dick Durbin
subject: This Senate race could decide it all in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Don’t let Mitch McConnell pick the next Senator from Montana.
#
Peter, you may have missed this news from Montana:
**Mitch McConnell’s handpicked Republican candidate just launched his campaign to unseat my friend Senator Jon Tester, flip a critical seat red, and take back the Senate.**
Political experts are watching this race. _POLITICO_ says control of the Senate “runs through Montana.” _Axios_ says the Montana Senate race is “among the most competitive in the nation.”
**[We should not allow Mitch McConnell to handpick the next Senator from Montana. We need to support our Democratic champion Jon Tester and keep the Senate blue. Pitch in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404886/416223151/-866163912?refcode=dd_em_230712_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDkzZDc0Zi1mOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGxNbpj3ZaIQH7eSs1lCRLTA3eMjiqDA6qNLcuaJCHo=)**
Let me tell you something I’ve learned through the years of working with my colleague Jon Tester, Peter. This man is not afraid of a tough fight. The GOP have been eyeing this seat for years — but time and time again, Jon shows them what he’s made of and Montana’s voters send him back to the Senate.
Jon describes himself as the “only working dirt farmer” in the Senate. He gets $15 flattop haircuts. He didn’t come to Washington to impress lobbyists and politicians, but to help people. That’s the kind of leader that Montanans deserve — and one we need in our Senate majority.
**[Donate whatever you can now to re-elect Jon Tester in Montana and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404887/416223154/-866163912?refcode=dd_em_230712_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDkzZDc0Zi1mOTIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CGxNbpj3ZaIQH7eSs1lCRLTA3eMjiqDA6qNLcuaJCHo=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

| | Will Hurd wants to _**tackle the issues** _that keep him up at night, fellow American. Our country isn't safe thanks to Joe Biden's inaction at the southern and northern borders and Donald Trump's empty promises. Our law enforcement at both are saying the same thing: _"We need help."_ Will is the ONLY presidential candidate to visit the northern border. It's time to stop grandstanding and actually put words into action.
---
|
---
The truth is – the situation at our southern border is a major threat to our homeland security and the opioid crisis. So what do we do about it? _**Will's Common Sense Solutions →**_
* _Achieve operational control of the border_
* _Enforce the existing definition of asylum_
* _Pool our federal resources to help struggling countries build an economic plan and address the root causes of immigration_
* _Streamline LEGAL immigration_

clean_body: Focus on the Issues...| | | | | Will Hurd wants to tackle the issues that keep him up at night, fellow American. Our country isn't safe thanks to Joe Biden's inaction at the southern and northern borders and Donald Trump's empty promises. Our law enforcement at both are saying the same thing: "We need help." Will is the ONLY presidential candidate to visit the northern border. It's time to stop grandstanding and actually put words into action. | The truth is – the situation at our southern border is a major threat to our homeland security and the opioid crisis. So what do we do about it? Will's Common Sense Solutions → Achieve operational control of the border Enforce the existing definition of asylum Pool our federal resources to help struggling countries build an economic plan and address the root causes of immigration Streamline LEGAL immigration Basically, it comes down to the need to enforce our laws, help our Central & South American allies address the lack of economic opportunity, and tackle real immigration reform. Will represented the largest border district Congress and he knows what needs to be done to secure it. - It's going to require Republicans and Democrats to come together to solve this problem. It will take courage, but isn't that what America is all about? Will believes that the country is not as divided on this issue as D.C. politicians would have you believe. When I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate to defeat Senator Josh Hawley, I did so knowing that this race wouldn't be cheap – or easy. I saw a broken system. A system put in place to make the rich and incredibly well-connected richer at the expense of everyone else. I knew I needed to run because Josh Hawley was more focused on being famous than being a voice for everyday Missouri families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- I'm no stranger to winning tough races. In 2018, I challenged and defeated a longtime incumbent in a campaign that political insiders told me I had no chance of winning. Now, I'm ready to take on the political establishment again, and we need to be prepared for Josh Hawley to come out swinging. We already know that out-of-state extremists will pour a fortune into Missouri to try to keep their puppet, Josh Hawley, in the U.S. Senate to do their bidding. I'm ready to take him on, but I can't do it alone. = Thank you. Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

Supporters like you are building a true grassroots campaign from the ground up, with more than 24,000 Founding Donors across the country who believe in what we’re creating together. But we don't see your name on our Founding Donor list yet. Now, we’re counting on you to join us as a Founding Donor ahead of our Founding Donor Fund deadline on Friday. Your support will help show the strength of this campaign. If just a few more folks like you from Cresco get on the record as Biden-Harris Founding Donors before midnight Friday, we'll be able to hit our goal: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for all you’re doing. We’re so proud to have you on this team. \-- Team Biden-Harris

Peter, I have a _very_ exciting announcement to share with you today. **Wendy Davis just announced her endorsement for our campaign!** Wendy has been a strong force in Texas politics before and after she gained national prominence in 2013 when she strapped on a pair of pink sneakers and held a 13-hour filibuster to protect women’s reproductive freedoms in Texas. **[It’s an honor to have the confidence and support of such a powerhouse in Texas politics. Will you add your endorsement alongside Wendy’s by making a contribution of any size today to help us keep our momentum?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0FtqXRQ-O1z-9pEeottojEesh1rn1gykcThcw0sIWep6_DD5P-dxQX-V_9ZNRsE1VEoPj2mYqxNVKh1TWUrbpl5fk8M42hPL4jbaGiMNT3lmKERGqBhMSSyJq-PW6lCQSN6vAopaIQY8dOLCDxJmOl4Q5e4VwHkcGpg-7YJX4q3gI9x4W9EeSfygizDSMCtDBuxJOHYCSGvs7KYxHCkiIJwYDCi0aCVNZnIJHDpI8aluUmK6YhmHa-Wn_xYbUglPa2-JyO6rPerMVY-I2gJ94HpT9yf7N3y9ZfOAHo_jCr5VO9VHlFV5rjhhOrItCI2RE4z9zifYXul2cakqP5rAhe9za5zSFBkYQmJSJZelA2k/3xt/ikT8otMVQbmczH825QqprQ/h1/u-YC1kGucQfjoEhbGcJJ0AmeleZ--rZUFslaVvH7oZE)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0FtqXRQ-O1z-9pEeottojEthgAYqUNkbw2bkcoL6FrTlm9YZgM3cw5wDvPH2Pt2c0AVYk3ZaArYI6HsHOX1fRKti6hXFbkQJlPYxPsc-KBI0mVAt_KnAhYfinnZIDFBlXiXwV1pfwJckU1cf9W-mPirLqpEuCjhaj-Pbq8lOLy0oxNsCn5tIgP2C3oNqcH3uCrjhMjTzWVv8RlPIFmKfdk0GO3lD2EXgS3iFoi84-fJzLy6hZW2c0K8SSVX628xjY9XuvSBLTYK7BWmAVkfO-rgZujlE0OE5iKIo2is_KVYnlCZ1wGG3yck1SR4WqjZiTRr1eVRWh4rmKGd20kBSCC3YR3ZtYXE5hWluU-R0qew/3xt/ikT8otMVQbmczH825QqprQ/h2/T4ZeLFm82UwRN3BzT2TDkaWUA9nQcCOyuP9AkmEBC-0)**As someone who has been at the forefront of the fight to restore reproductive freedoms and voting rights, Wendy knows how important this election is, not only for the future of our district, but for Texas and the nation. The pathway to taking back the house in 2024 runs through South Texas, and Michelle Vallejo is the leader we need to flip Texas’ 15th Congressional District.”_ Peter, since getting elected last year, Monica De La Cruz has voted in favor of more restrictions on our reproductive health care. subject: I need you to help me put Jon out to pasture
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_t=q_R_zk_hUiA2MOyb5Pl4Ao_sxTX6A2ZZwOXgBa0OWDW8WrEzcQ5iQInznCdIrEkNcYBhk_jxn-nUhtu7AjZPaLCmQeFTglwlBYrq0F4RV4g%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_t=q_R_zk_hUiA2MOyb5Pl4Ao_sxTX6A2ZZwOXgBa0OWDW8WrEzcQ5iQInznCdIrEkNcYBhk_jxn-nUhtu7AjZPaLCmQeFTglwlBYrq0F4RV4g%3D)
