Peter,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy.**

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_e=VsgZhEORn75N1kzWD5unS-ClwU52OelU4-IdW879wrE8CeSB9FVqGBrSqWTMhoGdltDcc8biojWnlGQkDpYE_K-Qu0kSB7SpWn123Tnn0AulTJRoXIBGR3bQMFOG4qkMDIGmQBsLRPWp6lLBabioz8GYUpmjQOFJ2jbFiY0-8T_tjsYOWj2u_oyVCqXIDjuF5UGguUK4rVdURhXMhpQBNoMUVexm-4XX76JKPRxZAszE6Wmd2yhzyyHFv6OvO8zL3dD_WWqAnZj7hDY_wuGMGGU2JRPQ6XMr1bgOj5MkLxr4oHm6s4Nj3U6kpksdwPgT7xbXaJiWydEnXJYft3aG778SsgH5KTvwAbfj9ns4FelJVZe_XDvI4JPYR3euygKIvnNda4oC2ZP1Z_9fSUVzQKPpnU0Nialb0bGP96fxPWk%3D)
Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_e=VsgZhEORn75N1kzWD5unS-ClwU52OelU4-IdW879wrE8CeSB9FVqGBrSqWTMhoGdltDcc8biojWnlGQkDpYE_K-Qu0kSB7SpWn123Tnn0AulTJRoXIBGR3bQMFOG4qkMDIGmQBsLRPWp6lLBabioz8GYUpmjQOFJ2jbFiY0-8T_tjsYOWj2u_oyVCqXIDjuF5UGguUK4rVdURhXMhpQBNoMUVexm-4XX76JKPRxZAszE6Wmd2yhzyyHFv6OvO8zLeOdSqDJa3dclQt17UMTVn-TEijbNSLo8hDZc3PQZ4AB1_794JKh1asE_YkNR06-nSTObO4Pf2wkQ2vLYZXgWgVbjqtHGPdWuG_RY8Lf_yIk-P1Bd25AqIVW3qjdXKXMKtSHqUQADnURUit8Ji-n9awKKHcNJGhGrwXeFcfDTOLo%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_e=VsgZhEORn75N1kzWD5unS-ClwU52OelU4-IdW879wrE8CeSB9FVqGBrSqWTMhoGdltDcc8biojWnlGQkDpYE_K-Qu0kSB7SpWn123Tnn0AulTJRoXIBGR3bQMFOG4qkMDIGmQBsLRPWp6lLBabioz8GYUpmjQOFJ2jbFiY0-8T_tjsYOWj2u_oyVCqXIDjuF5UGguUK4rVdURhXMhpQBNoMUVexm-4XX76JKPRxZAszE6Wmd2yhzyyHFv6OvO8zLTYxdb0JnTskU4zZMW6579j9M49OZ5rp9cQe9sXET_AljKRyi55sHHAvZLmbf9l_0Wc6649DcTHwkzVZHws5YKWgBKjhPZkqSSxlJQlxtEjRpWVmuAMRsjWCwaNNGsWEpoCRFYUozkvQdzROXa_AEqmlwEMDBCEVwRvEsGhkXu1c%3D)

**I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6.**

I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. **[Will you help him get there?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=74a6cb0f91a443bf8c845b0b4dbcc516&_e=VsgZhEORn75N1kzWD5unS-ClwU52OelU4-IdW879wrE8CeSB9FVqGBrSqWTMhoGdltDcc8biojWnlGQkDpYE_K-Qu0kSB7SpWn123Tnn0AulTJRoXIBGR3bQMFOG4qkMDIGmQBsLRPWp6lLBabioz8GYUpmjQOFJ2jbFiY0-8T_tjsYOWj2u_oyVCqXIDjuF5UGguUK4rVdURhXMhpQBNoMUVexm-4XX76JKPRxZAszE6Wmd2yhzyyHFv6OvO8zLRsYYUkVdkLlpA05E-6GSRqqNyFrSZiGyxlucj1bGhez9nSdvWIzE8z1SSa61VWqJHJ76mwp7pX54vssBoHsNel2WnSUdkHynM9mRvlHVAAshEU_j8UV8v6nSjfa1ylR8U6N4aSxv6lgTzumhXmXF-BMOw825syZuMEtMQ8QNIVU%3D)**

clean_body: Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. | | Peter, During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - Tim Sheehy. In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator. Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor. Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6. I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. The Montana Senate race is not just about Montana. This race will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate and the direction of our country for years to come. For God and country, Commander Ryan Zinke | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. Hey team,
I learned as an army captain that when your motto is "leave no one behind", then you have to check in regularly.
It's been a moment since we did that as a team.
[**So I've got a simple question: What's on your mind? Use this form to send me your thoughts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404993/416223824/-1399264069?ms=fl_em_su_20230711survey1_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQxNzUwZS1mYjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uefMmEgbTYYbKHCB3VD4U9uq3Sn-7HOtqi-0K0KmHAI=&emci=158a052b-3d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ffd1750e-fb20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404994/416223825/-1399264069?ms=fl_em_su_20230711survey1_wm_180da_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQxNzUwZS1mYjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uefMmEgbTYYbKHCB3VD4U9uq3Sn-7HOtqi-0K0KmHAI=&emci=158a052b-3d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ffd1750e-fb20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

I'm really proud of what we've accomplished in the first 6 months since Aruna and I took office. We:
* Passed (with bipartisan support) all 10 of the bills I introduced to the legislature, including a first-in-the-nation program for a paid year of service for high school graduates
* Made Maryland a leader in what it looks like to be an abortion care safe haven
* Signed the Trans Health Equality Law
* Passed critical gun safety legislation... and then got sued by the NRA (something our administration will take as a badge of honor)

But we've also had hard times. Last month's mass shootings in Annapolis, Baltimore, and Salisbury are a painful reminder there's a lot more work to do to address gun violence and safety in communities all across our state. Supreme Court rulings have upended decades of work to reduce discrimination in our country. Now more than ever it’s crucial that we speak up.
[**I could go on, but as the saying goes: God gave us 2 ears and 1 mouth for a reason. So that's why I want to know what you're thinking about right now, team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404995/416223826/-1399264069?ms=fl_em_su_20230711survey1_wm_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQxNzUwZS1mYjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uefMmEgbTYYbKHCB3VD4U9uq3Sn-7HOtqi-0K0KmHAI=&emci=158a052b-3d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ffd1750e-fb20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66404996/416223827/-1399264069?ms=fl_em_su_20230711survey1_wm_180da_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmQxNzUwZS1mYjIwLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uefMmEgbTYYbKHCB3VD4U9uq3Sn-7HOtqi-0K0KmHAI=&emci=158a052b-3d1f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ffd1750e-fb20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

name: Mayra Flores [TX-34]
subject: I can’t stop smiling!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
I'm not afraid to say this
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c32cde90c5646a786e8ac76bddcda89&_e=m7c5lEOV_TOTVxQXAt4YspnoLsnmSaJE87IWS_rxCZQ-0grYZWH9cbYGhT2BwwGiBcBQNf8Bn2r7OZXJAqdezOBfMDaI4E9H11DYJnVbQtjgKh6ZxvRPAL6h-WIlaVD7o2-kkY5K5dPl0aSamt3Wr07vjGmN06P9JRrA6f2SaZs03gluuzRzXTbN9CU7QGQ-cZi3xtR6OsQ16RMqDv2CVhvv6GBBvZ8XEwVfGf-NFMBDalf-rmTJbCY9N_zKbB0Lh4uRTGlIWjtAzXBxKVNk1PaZDqdBgr06mRfhXHzzXYW2E1XNDK9BKQ6PtJ7YkzmrcDl0bObuft1ITJ6JkpRQc8lNVHnXLjjcV6EWGb4uMPda8jdXT9PnjztZO-b-auncyNI3Zrd1fUMJvWN4_tKRUHzRStq_ZkmR58M1Q04asFP3offWwc_5BSucWDiwvdOlDWLD8bs9_AWLbUhQD46IPMP-ePU89VuwDDti1WdZQZVaPqVhe48nDenVRj68_P5z)
---

You're the reason I can't stop smiling today, Friend.

My name is Mayra Flores.

I just launched my 2024 campaign & I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't work.

But I'm not afraid to tell you that I am a Christian who is Pro-God, Pro-Family, & Pro-Law Enforcement.

Democrats & the pathetic hacks in the liberal media will tell you that someone of my ethnicity & my age can't be any of those things.

**Who I am & what I stand for makes their blood boil. They hate my guts.**

And they know they can't take another humiliating loss from a Hispanic conservative like me.

But Biden & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservatives.

_**Please, please don't let me be one of them.**_

As a conservative, I fully support transparency in politics, so let me be clear- without a surge in grassroots support today, our campaign won't make it off the launch pad like we need to if we're going to win this thing.

clean_body: I held Adam Schiff accountable. | Friend Last month, the House finally passed my resolution to punish Adam Schiff for his unethical behavior. I formally CENSURED Schiff and referred him for an ethics investigation over his role in the phony Trump-Russia collusion witch hunt! I'll be honest with you: The resolution didn't go as far as I would have liked (Schiff ought to be expelled from Congress), but it's the best I could do with a narrow Republican House majority. Securing its passage is still a win for the American people. Accountability will be restored in Washington! But now that my resolution has passed, the swamp has vowed to retaliate against me. That's why I'm asking for your help defending myself from their slander machine as I keep fighting to drain the swamp and make Washington accountable to YOU once again. Special counsel John Durham's report completely debunked the Left's phony Trump-Russia collusion narrative. It concluded that neither law enforcement nor U.S. intelligence agencies had any actual evidence of collusion between President Trump and Russia. Just like President Trump has always maintained, it was all a witch hunt orchestrated by Hillary Clinton, Adam Schiff, and their allies to sabotage the Trump campaign and his presidency. Ultimately, the Trump-Russia collusion hoax ripped our country apart, cost taxpayers more than $32 million, and damaged our foreign relations (potentially permanently)... ... and Schiff has the audacity to keep pushing the LIE to this day! This kind of treasonous, unethical behavior cannot be allowed to go unpunished. Which is why I REFUSED to back down after my first resolution failed to pass. Instead, I kept fighting - and because of strong support from grassroots conservatives like YOU, many of the Republicans who previously voted with the Democrats switched their votes. I want to make one thing perfectly clear: This is only the beginning. I'm in Washington because you trusted me to come in here and do the right thing - and that's what I'm going to do, no matter the cost to my own political career. I will ALWAYS be a voice for those whose voices have been ignored and whose wishes have long been disregarded by the corrupt uniparty establishment in Washington. With your support, we'll drain the swamp one step at a time. Thank you, Anna Paulina Luna Congresswoman (FL-13) U.S. Air Force Veteran PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: Freedom wins.
body:
The tide is turning in America, and we couldn't be more excited about the way the narrative is starting to shift. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/freedom-wins?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

The tide is turning in America, and we couldn't be more excited about the way the narrative is starting to shift. With the Supreme Court ruling against Affirmative Action, the United States became a better place for ALL Americans to pursue opportunities in higher education. In fact, we believe removing ethnicity from the application process is more in line with freedom, liberty, and equality under the law. We were hugely encouraged by this monumental decision and are more motivated than ever to continue our mission of creating tremendous growth in the Republican Party.

Republicans have the most diverse group of presidential candidates in American history. This slate of candidates only reinforces our message that Republicans must engage minority communities to win in 2024, and that starts with having authentic conversations about what makes the American Dream possible.

At Let's Win for America Action, we believe that economic prosperity and conservative principles benefit ALL communities. We're committed to reaching all corners of the state with this message, but it won’t be easy.

[Will you help us forge ahead and ensure big wins for the GOP in 2024?](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=1e6f0150a6&e=cb396c52a2)

Just like when we were on the campaign trail last year, getting to speak face-to-face with activists like you has been the highlight of the past seven months. As we gear up for one of America's most important election seasons, we have big plans for LWFAA. It will be hard work, but we believe you make real progress by planting seeds, not cutting down trees.

[Can you join our team? With your contribution of $500, $250, $100, or anything you can give today, we will continue to plant the necessary seeds to grow the Republican Party in Georgia and nationwide.](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=df1c6cb450&e=cb396c52a2)

God Bless,

Kelvin & Janelle King
Co-Chairs | Let’s Win for America Action

name: Cori Bush
subject: Support a fair and independent judiciary: Impeach Clarence Thomas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Decades of corruption on the highest court, attacking marginalized communities and receiving luxurious gifts -- the time has come to hold Justice Clarence Thomas accountable | |
---
Peter, I was the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for the impeachment of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, and I’m not going to stop organizing to make it happen. We must not only expand the Court, but also hold its judges accountable to legal and ethical standards. **There are so many reasons Clarence Thomas must be impeached. He should never have been confirmed in the first place, given his history of sexual harassment and abuse.** Once on the Court, he has shown complete and utter disregard for ethical standards and legal requirements, time and time again. **He has exploited his position of power to subsidize a life of luxury. Cruises on a mega-yacht, international flights on a private jet, vacations at private resorts, undisclosed gifts worth literally millions of dollars** \-- the list goes on and on. Thomas may well have violated federal disclosure laws, but these have not been his only ethical lapses, or even his most serious. In a bald-faced repudiation of his ethical obligations, **Clarence Thomas has repeatedly failed to recuse himself when he faced clear conflicts of interest** , which relate to his decades-long attacks on marginalized communities through rulings undermining our democracy, overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , allowing discrimination against LGBTQ+ individuals, and ending affirmative action in college admissions -- to highlight only a few of the worst. [**Justice Thomas has shown he cannot rule with impartiality, and his presence on the bench continues to damage the legitimacy of the U.S. Supreme Court and harm our communities. We cannot tolerate these abuses any longer. Join with me and sign the petition calling for the impeachment of Justice Clarence Thomas now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDue1nhU1qW2YvdTdZBSIeUV85AZRR-IF91TGp0XWEtASMhEQ2SDUJwGpDzSDP2wPbXTQIghf5dsa0ATLPPV4WazBzJaF74RykslwF3rgqcbVX7iR16bgDUNUkz3OVb3Rl5btdXamLEwFfZmeOJZP4_6CJxMYXK8DLIcKjbGeVE2I_J2PeLc-lxjaNpdAzfkHAdSLsXFAdGmRPtHp8KWm3fLJunFdiJhg0BJD4ECXMyS5jRh4rtX-ZByNHzB_J3cAMjuvtxXLCz2lixr4nS655-l2UHwUJwlaG7XbT_FkPT4clTgkBCFho4XrT9qvhIPye4-NeGA_8a2M-5lcj61LE4wZv2DSXbxT8ZDZMVLhzNv2LmXGHtDvy8czFbL-FERNQRJ1eJvvqDwdRFLOC98NXo-IOVvmwCUtkN9U0e5IFO3eeCiT3SwXM1iOa5g2sWmgFabThYwf0NVGWnKuhdcapWOV_pumA8irh8s9nMIvxBDmmJ_zG8FmGMqmi8KL48GJXL/3xt/VunyvRAfS6CHh3TiBag_nQ/h0/QLotO2QEkVdjerOj3ARSqx0hROuxH42WE9SqtviPlfo)**** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDue1nhU1qW2YvdTdZBSIeUV85AZRR-IF91TGp0XWEtASMhEQ2SDUJwGpDzSDP2wPbXTQIghf5dsa0ATLPPV4WazBzJaF74RykslwF3rgqcbVX7iR16bgDUNUkz3OVb3Rl5btdXamLEwFfZmeOJZP4_6CJxMYXK8DLIcKjbGeVE2I_J2PeLc-lxjaNpdAzfkHAdSLsXFAdGmRPtHp8KWm3fLJunFdiJhg0BJD4ECXMyS5iu0qoDe7xW5cFoaQb6LLFM85dq2t4TgARdzZi-neC_AY7UVnh2N-ZQeBS03WhV45cJLCKOXIhIAtuFpRiTUbCwkx0pofN21UOQMTE1PSuRvOR9F9gn6u4F45VzMRAsTho-gCeJetWXrQh3tYLOjclLXXxZIzBnPt8KdLrcIcshKEMTPtNbR6gkONHANKqnI_uK4pm6SUIJBPdTXYp6W9iJ-8d1m54Cz4SljGaGNfHkfnwJY9Us4Fiq4QkaIWt0Zj1LsVVS5KyT60kBkPttzapb/3xt/VunyvRAfS6CHh3TiBag_nQ/h1/DuFpylsVtwpBcoazHmFzItT6s9h7r734F4BOSHRy46A) ** Many of Justice Thomas’ conflicts of interest involve the activities of his wife, Ginni Thomas, who **actively advocated for the overthrow of the government** with dozens of state legislators and directly to then-White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows. Yet Thomas continued to hear Supreme Court cases related to the 2021 insurrection, and his was **the only dissenting vote against requiring former President Trump to provide subpoenaed White House documents to the House Select Committee on the January 6th Attack.** Nor was this the only instance in which Thomas’ judicial decisions were in lockstep with the conservative political activism of his wife. In 2000, she was working with George W. Bush’s transition team when **he ruled to stop the vote recounts and hand the presidency to Bush** in _Bush v. Gore_. In 2012, his wife was being **paid to lobby for the repeal of the _Affordable Care Act_** at the same time he voted against it. And in 2017, his wife worked for an organization that supported Trump’s ban on **Muslim travelers and refugees** , even as he voted for it. **Time and again, Justice Clarence Thomas has ruled against the public interest and against the will of the people, for his own gain.** [**Clarence Thomas has violated the public’s trust, eroded our fundamental rights, and corruptly exploited his position of power. Click here to join me in my efforts to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDue1nhU1qW2YvdTdZBSIeUV85AZRR-IF91TGp0XWEtASMhEQ2SDUJwGpDzSDP2wPbXTQIghf5dsa0ATLPPV4WazBzJaF74RykslwF3rgqcbVX7iR16bgDUNUkz3OVb3Rl5btdXamLEwFfZmeOJZP4_6CJxMYXK8DLIcKjbGeVE2I_J2PeLc-lxjaNpdAzfkHAdSLsXFAdGmRPtHp8KWm3fLJunFdiJhg0BJD4ECXMyS5i9QBEr8M_R-Kep63xc6Z87VHvfu1yQCBRKwnnmFWO7fzcWWvYNAPgpQyUdMhuyAnJNir4RsUgrXs8_5zsI-Hc2l9EHRqPMNhXPZXRJpIKcnF0L7uIkDOdsWz3BL-tjuin76dpuASesQywBayDer6Xt-K85pUmCgigprJrw2-LmmMIeBEoBWOQzjlbM6W0xfZFCUPQM9IqG7yOJcjgdXi9gDUO4ACl6XZ_MtTsJHS_kUnWAafMUxEKKK6s3z3vWuUCsiWvrmo1aHhwhQeObbzP6/3xt/VunyvRAfS6CHh3TiBag_nQ/h2/XxHJyyYhRMroqBCYAx_Sjr6JozBGKdmBK8rlEnUDEYs) Thank you for taking action to support a fair and independent judiciary that actually protects our rights and our democracy. With love, Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wfYpC3rlqw5ViQwTtycxxx5uXBqr0DL2hckB8Zme1Dty8q6PzaEMp_fFrQqtW_7XACMJ-ReW2NlRiWymtCuDSQdwneFgmX0wSkwwLQBLBc2VgEnFEtProx7Z7W1ij2d12MV8mtPeOA8mQzN6eIzv3dg5j04Xz9J-YCQ2GnlwG_nI4AbylJwO6fm2wjPL7offstsdXJDySfImdIDOV4jWcyySG-509T18dPuOjzAvyYyjxtavlGarNB2i-SVsnDiuj5urr36YQGpHD2CBOhxi4lnWCQYe2YHuqV4Z4jPOusXgA3X7rFFAnmT1OrZixGTSh_BMNG9kKaX9Xt4M2fchIJOL0UrzTY3eJiDubnFfVjFRLKg9-7D7uVCcIUvoPdVyMOPK_4YWhIrzt4Z7LuZGQ7LqTbHNhP-rkUSrQp75Qj32j76l8nBBsrMm__V5dfc_Q/3xt/VunyvRAfS6CHh3TiBag_nQ/h3/HCpYzB7UeZdLJBIbR2I6Ye8lfVQRrTtg3Jkjtb0tLXo) **

Emerge alums are counting on your help, Peter. They know we have a huge job ahead to transform politics, safeguard our rights, and achieve a truly inclusive democracy for the FIRST time in U.S. history. And to get the job done, they need more Democratic women in office.
**Right now, women make up only 28 percent of Congress and less than 33 percent of state legislatures! Crucial voices are missing in the rooms where life-changing decisions are being made, and we urgently need to close the gap. **
That’s why every election matters. And that's why Emerge works year in and year out to build our bench of bold Democratic women ready to run and win in every state! But we need _you_ with us to power our movement and achieve crucial victories this year.
**With more than 100 Emerge women on the ballot this year, we’re asking 1,000 of our top supporters – _including you!_ – to show your support before midnight tonight. body:

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-t/) **Chinese Military Training Children** The Chinese military is training kindergarteners to handle firearms and fight like soldiers in boot camps across China this summer.**[You won't believe the things they are learning to do.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-i/)** **Banana Republic** Merrick Garland and the DOJ are now **[actively indicting the Biden whistleblower.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-d/) ** **Repaying the Favors** Several **[high-ranking Biden White House officials had longstanding professional and personal links to Hunter Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-h/) **before his father ascended to the presidency. **Idiotic** British Energy Security and Net Zero Secretary Grant Shapps**[blasted calls for a rapid shift from fossil fuels](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-k/) **during meetings with U.S. Special Presidential Envoy for Climate John Kerry.

**NATO Fast Pass** NATO offered a **[fast path to membership for Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-u/)** once the embattled country meets certain conditions. _I wonder what Putin thinks about that?_ **Three Years Too Late** CNN anchor Jake Tapper appeared**[adamant about the importance of covering the Hunter Biden scandal](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-o/), **which was the complete opposite approach he took during the 2020 presidential election. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* Which one of these is **[not like the other](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-m/)**?
* I don't **[want to know](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-c/).**
* **[_Poor do_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-q/)[g](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-a/).**
* **[Whose is it](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-achudy-trhiujldw-f/)?**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Let’s make it official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:

We’ve already achieved so much, and with your help, we’ll be on the path to victory in 2024 and take back our Senate majority.

body:
God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPsyMkO0EXdYw1fixEwEMJHh-x_QA7Ww6N_WcNCATddhGC4n_BXkxmHOc76PvqcU-bneKt9SZhKlO-QbklyEc6Eo1UDSSKdkvxBYpMNo7IRtpFFVPd-VOnDFgNB6xYtc0kXVFFd9O9qQPv-4Gc8opQjA%3D)

| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPg9X0v-LGLMbXQgg0zHVGitSfV_wQ6mL4kcHPjNP5j-d4Ajfz71PeNpb4NuRhxhMgiHcnB17EqsrOHP1wU1QacQhc3TNJ2QnOn3quDoEfAXx8DbT7_E7F7vi-K2-D_6IpFJ-tu0WzMgPc64Ntrv_Ip8%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPrgtFu-wwfrG69zricy6cpPZKnK7TR5BcCZ6-LSYdYrPQT7i8YA4EtZ21Kgl3JxCGiDJXNFTuPJij89ucGOW-CVrXCWiHIIWMEtu24jeH9kyVlY9yMlPszlUeE-f4_I6FRqxJU91PUaqy5yriuQ9J6w%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPtJ1qqXaxSKfIjYOmjIgMRQLP7w_703tvKWQdbyZHGqYWc04okkZd2D6T_OFIscRboXHohM_HDKzhRmCcew90NJF6qjDezOv27sCrtZYeCZgZ9Vd872FBv-5eqVpWCv3XUJg6sZYJfV7KiKIlKGekxA%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPu5S9fOmjpIoiZbuQXiPjcv1xAq6s272tuMB_BVVVUABPOWaWhYrnxc1024voBTyBohZO_kX5x69JuQNuF-ScE4udWAB2GrLtFDyA2g73MRqAYfjRH1dvZbXAOxR1L0UUkWM_Gl9yxYSyackqOQ9Bwc%3D) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPsszPYk_jC97lgXnvM5eaBYTIgu_h4_NxHjyGl_H_vtGgtXh2wk9cYa2m0OLhH6wU8yb0IvMzFutuUO8KMbnbXG8MKYz4Na5mkJBJHV8FN8oMuBx6P8RZK57oWtoUW4CHSm15ezUAqGqPmNd5cfu02k%3D)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPhqtnu1dVz1F1218U8wwJ3jwgXEBaf0zGGb1kDe-_xzyu0dTiSt3P6DvufhaiFThaNgTqinn9bG05j5j3zLdejxGTny5ptpUZgTzqX8FpoKDxbIOJsTlFAtrfyxsI-pNHADOp18M18GGmtiWsL9WMjs%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dc7ccbdd035544eb892be6abb4d72272&_e=V2tg2wRFxIHevFhFqkPis-ktxaSXmnxD5E_WetPGS9k25ZC7Uc_86Eev-5eN8VC-mbghVdZDt2735uTVwS5lR5CX-jcq37z9PfnuN-LOmB6uuCSPnlg1Vlgf0Q5xTqzunYlT98etfRqJ0XcOtO21BJF9E5nnUgdIbE13mosPq0k2hZAeq4r_3PeMr61qcEUi2XxS3UvI2OT8SRWVKw8r56op8qRTgET5uxZb8T1QrX7cszNqajJdEjVJsjxS8gh9hNH2cNWeOacULloUZP6vPl8EyQJKyGEfGHwdatEFinjanL8qzbIeVj_KoiLCHFNVJamTC5qA42-eH-9c4-NDJlUKZLIAmdahhC_B7FPoYIetTT2J8rjxhbYZqyssc9eHxj1ct2SUoOIlwRKdt35WrZ_8GOiRM4AAEFFtOR0LoWI%3D) Duty First,

clean_body: God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it| | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn’t be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? . name: Keir Bradford-Grey
subject: For people without power…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:
As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/f_OCAZQVq06HV0T6jD6mWA2?unsubscribedata=L05947dxwANovriJZxjZHueqLFJnVDo13cJbC%2BpNa3iUR6xelzFvZRWcEiqjJXCDxx4TOh6u8M58eFtO7HKYCFToG3o476Iv7HWAsDDoomnbG7FeLh16OdHGDbnfgEciEVHRDNsmVEmJ0niOA8VggXgDkWH8RAo4vg9Yxs41UJ0OvLTfSAQRGmhNwQe0MvqB6ekR6N3PXQRI%2FJK%2FHAmjP8hGuTOVkyRp9rLfjl6BHeByEOeAeTM76mr21JernXBnIp6D3S9IK7zJj8lFuQGa7BZL6btcap1hl%2Bi8DwYgr0De21Yalt45M8OodbfWTWnlLzWgk%2FdvExpABdGh5dkE9qPg1gsAYdGRD2QEr%2BHMG7OJxPsR0JufjpYU%2B6S8%2FOUszOf7Di5IiDlJsveZWVv2o67d4L3jIUTN%2FJZaBy07xyjVccyjAW11Ut1C%2FturBrEc)

---
Peter,

I am thrilled to let you know I am running to be Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General.

**[As I start by asking you — someone who knows how important this race is — to support my campaign today with a $10 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66405919/416227356/-1353971691?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20230712_FR_Launch_0_D_KeirBradford-Grey_na_na_Intro&recode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTFmYTBjYWQtZmYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PI2_9_jIO0RoEV9QSvhDzZ-XrUdeqR62Z7Myu56ywCU=)** , here’s what you should know about me:
* **I believe in fighting for the underdog.** I have spent my career standing up to the powerful and winning on behalf of people without money, connections, or power.
* **I know how to get big things done.** As the chief public defender in Montgomery and Philadelphia Counties, I oversaw more than 500 people and a budget of $50 million. I instituted real reforms and made a difference in our communities.
* **I was raised in a proud union household.** My dad was a union laborer and my mom was a parole officer. I understand the power of strong unions in fighting on behalf of hardworking families.
* **I want a more balanced system of justice for all.** Public safety is not black or white, blue or red, or police versus the community — it’s all of us working together, paving the way for a safer society.
* **I’m no stranger to firsts.** I was the first in my family to graduate college and the first African American woman to run the nation’s fourth largest public defender’s office. Now, I am the _only woman and only African American_ running for Attorney General — when elected, I’ll be another first. But most importantly, I am committed to not being a last.

**Watch my campaign kick off video below!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66405922/416227366/-1353971691?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20230712_FR_Launch_0_D_KeirBradford-Grey_na_na_Intro&recode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTFmYTBjYWQtZmYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PI2_9_jIO0RoEV9QSvhDzZ-XrUdeqR62Z7Myu56ywCU=)
But, Peter, I’m not running for this office because I check a list of ideological boxes. I’m running for this office to protect Pennsylvania families — that means yours.

As Attorney General, I won’t let big pharmaceutical companies gouge seniors. I won’t let insurance companies unjustly deny coverage. I won’t let extremists push their hate in our communities. I’m going to put a stop to violent actors holding neighborhoods hostage.

**[Now, I am asking for your support. Join Team Keir with a $10 donation today to help elect an Attorney General who will work and fight by your side because we’re stronger together>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66405925/416227369/-1353971691?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20230712_FR_Launch_0_D_KeirBradford-Grey_na_na_Intro&recode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTFmYTBjYWQtZmYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PI2_9_jIO0RoEV9QSvhDzZ-XrUdeqR62Z7Myu56ywCU=)**

No matter your zip code, who you pray to, or who you love, I’ll be an Attorney General for YOU.

I will always fight for fairness, opportunity, and justice for all Pennslvanians — please join me.

— Keir Bradford-Grey

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: what I said on Morning Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I will not stand for one man’s political games.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66405860/416227211/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230712-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U0ZjkyNzUtZmYyMC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nmiqiBQV692sHTh2q6Nuo9zws1u88TXizKtNtc0mibg=)
---
| Peter,

Today, I went on Morning Joe to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power.

He is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions are going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics.

clean_body: I will not stand for one man’s political games. | = | Peter, Today, I went on Morning Joe to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power. He is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions are going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics. = | = As the representative for Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers across Virginia’s 7th District, I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness. And I’ll keep calling out the disrespect to our servicemembers and the danger to our national security inherent in his actions. = | = I appreciate your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Friend,
I have to say - I'm disappointed.
This month, our nation witnessed the single worst encroachment by the federal government in American history.
The Biden Department of Justice tried to _**JAIL**_ its leading opponent - _me_ - as an innocent man.
I had hoped that Republicans _everywhere_ would've said it was time to come together as one big, united front to stand against an out-of-control Deep State that MUST be stopped.
But instead, disloyal Republicans devised a **$300 MILLION PLOT** to try and stop us and replace me with a nominee who will make nice with the Deep State.
**Our nation is on the brink of tyranny. We need a man of courage in charge of our country, not a coward who would drop to his knees and surrender to his captor.**
But I know that _you_ have just as much courage as I do, Friend.
You've stood by our campaign through thick and thin, and made our movement stronger than EVER before.
_And in just a few days, we have the chance to show just how strong we are._
On the June 30 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline, we will prove that not even a sham indictment, an arrest, or even a $300 MILLION PLOT can hurt us.
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before the end-of-quarter deadline to counter the $300 MILLION PLOT to stop us in the primary - for 1,500% impact.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc0jqds3t806jee004cg27rnt64u23sa4ns3akhg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9i6cor4c9h2bs)

Peter, I’ll let President Biden’s and House Democrats’ accomplishments speak for themselves. Just take a look: | ✅ Created more than 13 million more jobs
✅ Lowered inflation to 3% – _the lowest point in more than two years_
✅ Made historic investments to create jobs, rebuild our roads and bridges, strengthen our supply chain

But Peter, while House Democrats and President Biden are delivering for the American people, the Republican party continues to double down on Trumpism.

**_So it’s time to make them pay a heavy price for it all in 2024._**

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: They speak for themselves | = Peter, I’ll let President Biden’s and House Democrats’ accomplishments speak for themselves. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email? | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen, but the worst has yet to come. The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership." | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year. We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services Subject: We hate to see you go. Friend, for the last 3 years , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,but we have bad news for you. It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?" | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" | "ORDER NOW" We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late >>>" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. name: Laura Friedman
subject: Ticketmaster is abusing their near-monopoly on ticket sales. I’m holding them accountable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66406647/416230154/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM3YWRjZTgtMDIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvvvEaZkXoWOdQm8A4KDD-sLgUZddC2AcLRmUbv4RxA=) I have a huge legislative update, friend.

Recently, I introduced A.B. 8 in the California State Assembly which would ban Ticketmaster from charging hidden junk fees. When consumers buy tickets, they deserve to know what the actual price will be up front.

**My bill PASSED in the Assembly and is now on its way to the State Senate for approval.**

This bill is an important step in holding Ticketmaster accountable, but our work is far from finished.

**[Please sign my petition urging the state Senate to vote YES on Assembly Bill 8 to stop Ticketmaster from charging absurd hidden junk fees. We're aiming to collect 2,500 signers before the Senate begins deliberating this bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66406648/416230155/-1235440754?refcode=em-7.12.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM3YWRjZTgtMDIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvvvEaZkXoWOdQm8A4KDD-sLgUZddC2AcLRmUbv4RxA=&emci=dc272b2a-0121-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=837adce8-0221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66406649/416230156/-1235440754?refcode=em-7.12.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM3YWRjZTgtMDIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvvvEaZkXoWOdQm8A4KDD-sLgUZddC2AcLRmUbv4RxA=&emci=dc272b2a-0121-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=837adce8-0221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)
Ticketmaster is one of the only places people can go online and purchase tickets for shows across the country. It's clear they've abused that near-monopoly. At the very least these hidden fees are sleazy. At the worst, you could call them rip-offs.

Los Angeles has always been a leader in the entertainment industry. There are a host of issues with Ticketmaster's virtual monopoly on the market, but at the very least, buying tickets needs to be more straight-forward and transparent for consumers. That shouldn't be too much to ask for.

Here's what we're up against: _Ticketmaster and their parent company Live Nation have a huge lobbying arm._ There's a tremendous push to stop this bill from passing, so it's critical that we demonstrate massive grassroots support for this legislation in order to get it passed.

**[Add your name to our petition: Stop Ticketmaster from charging absurd, hidden junk fees.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66406650/416230157/-1235440754?refcode=em-7.12.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM3YWRjZTgtMDIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvvvEaZkXoWOdQm8A4KDD-sLgUZddC2AcLRmUbv4RxA=&emci=dc272b2a-0121-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=837adce8-0221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

Thanks for stepping up,

Laura

name: Senate Battleground Update
subject: We need to catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are fundraising at historic levels. If we don’t match them now, we could lose it all... |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0385fbbb48c046dcb4cfa521e429c12f&_e=UnjyxnX5zF67tqFG9s3viNuTqyuiw8Jun7Qx_ioqyxH3R6bJoTC9jcIVwdwyTrZ_tRZjJw-mYQlIF5kGr-tpP2o8XnfmmvgeToFDyXFQQ5QloSme_cZBzzTvIYZK8bduCQYg-NVGPmJy6Ju8Y5549p0aQTGnBCldwEnVv_Dt_O_7gWfODPamrvn2qeBuR0CFu3DFhbIXiwy_gEGS_MHb9iAbk6bEDBTogZXhZPxGWwJ5gqxNQAHQZ2tH42KariQZcSoG7twr6_kLidQfE5mycfaFd41Py-uxjGeZIwSiNDV3mzvda1jJZIqLIgd7TU973OPDDyjEs7KoB4rJ8ap7QoXsA7SGwCQ_NTFyBuDnN4GCVynmolq91zxtGS05Qi4bFEUoXQo61s9eJmAisAC4eFRGMZCcsytoDD7g5guvHmelOmOX2xRGMMWpMdMxhkFz)
**This. Is. Huge.** The Texas Senate race is about to be the most expensive race in the entire country next year. Ted Cruz’s opponent, Colin Allred, raised $6.2 million in just two months. **This will be the biggest and most expensive Senate race next year.**

[**STAND WITH TED CRUZ >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0385fbbb48c046dcb4cfa521e429c12f&_e=UnjyxnX5zF67tqFG9s3viNuTqyuiw8Jun7Qx_ioqyxH3R6bJoTC9jcIVwdwyTrZ_tRZjJw-mYQlIF5kGr-tpP2o8XnfmmvgeToFDyXFQQ5QloSme_cZBzzTvIYZK8bduCQYg-NVGPmJy6Ju8Y5549p0aQTGnBCldwEnVv_Dt_O_7gWfODPamrvn2qeBuR0CFu3DFhbIXiwy_gEGS_MHb9iAbk6bEDBTogZXhZPxGWwJ5gqxNQAHQZ2tH42KariQZcSoG7twr6_kLidQfE5mycfaFd41Py-uxjGeZIwSiNDWTqiSt54-DNI-mg5SX0gHcZTG8NE4H5Y3iFugRHbxX3QVtaEPuUgKChE3K1Wbi_VYPB13j3S1FeFN_fiT7gOtM0osLBxyElvQKWqFp-eDNgiWxHb23D1lBoVFGWs2L9PNkBfGyd177m9npb_R9q1ew)
In the 2018 Senate election:

* **It was surprisingly close;** Ted Cruz won by ONLY 3%

* **Cruz’s opponent raised $80 million** for the seat 6 years ago. In 2018, Beto O’Rourke raised $6 million in 9 months. Colin Allred has hit that number in LESS THAN TWO MONTHS ALREADY.

This is not a race we can take for granted. The extremist left has made Senator Ted Cruz their #1 target to beat. Hi Peter, it’s Will’s Campaign Manager, Coby.

**This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today.** We recently got word that we were _outraised_ by Ken Calvert in the latest quarterly reporting period.

While our campaign brought in over $875,000 in the six weeks since we launched on May 16th, Calvert still managed to haul in a little over $900,000 over the last three months.

**Now, the good news is that we have significantly more grassroots support than Calvert.** Our individual donor count outnumbers Calvert’s individual total by more than a 3:1 margin. And we only had six weeks against his three months — meaning we’re raising at a quicker pace than Calvert.

And when Calvert's report goes public, we expect to see it chock-full of big checks from corporate PACs and special interests. In contrast, our campaign rejects corporate PAC money and is funded by individual donors. I know we can pull ahead of him, but it's going to depend on your support:

**[I hate asking again right after our last deadline, but we set a goal of generating 250 donations from emails before the end of this week to help overcome Calvert’s fundraising advantage. clean_body: | = Hi Peter, it’s Will’s Campaign Manager, Coby. This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today. We recently got word that we were outraised by Ken Calvert in the latest quarterly reporting period. While our campaign brought in over $875,000 in the six weeks since we launched on May 16th, Calvert still managed to haul in a little over $900,000 over the last three months. Now, the good news is that we have significantly more grassroots support than Calvert. Our individual donor count outnumbers Calvert’s individual total by more than a 3:1 margin. And we only had six weeks against his three months — meaning we’re raising at a quicker pace than Calvert. And when Calvert's report goes public, we expect to see it chock-full of big checks from corporate PACs and special interests. In contrast, our campaign rejects corporate PAC money and is funded by individual donors. I know we can pull ahead of him, but it's going to depend on your support: you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Here's the truth: When Will ran against Ken Calvert in 2022, he surprised everyone by nearly flipping this seat. But in the end, Calvert’s corporate cash was too much to overcome just five months after the primary, when Will became the Democratic nominee. But now, after you helped Will build real name ID in the last campaign, our chances are much better in 2024: we’re starting early, and there are far more grassroots donors supporting Will than big donors supporting Calvert. When we win this,it's going to happen because of strong, grassroots fundraising from people like you. = Thanks in advance for chipping in. Coby Eiss Campaign Manager = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. name: Team WFP
subject: What you missed last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. | | | Peter,
**It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting for the many — and winning.** Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight.
* * *
**_WFP-ENDORSED PROGRESSIVES CLAIM MAJOR VICTORIES IN NEW YORK, VIRGINIA, AND COLORADO_** **We celebrated a big primary night in Virginia last month,** where WFP defended three progressive reformer district attorneys and won eight legislative races, including: **Lashrecse Aird** who took on the last anti-choice Democrat in the State Senate and defeated him by a more than 2-to-1 margin; **Jennifer Carroll Foy** who defeated an opponent backed by the state’s dirty energy monopoly; and **Buta Biberaj** who retained her seat for Commonwealth's Attorney after facing a bipartisan barrage over her restorative justice policies. Together with our partners on the ground, we were able to knock on 32,000 doors, make 120,000 phone calls, send 1 million texts, deliver 200,000 mailers, and reach over 2 million voters with digital ads. Now, we’re expanding our organizing in Virginia through the general election in order to reform our justice system, flip the House of Delegates, defend the Democratic majority in the State Senate, and ensure abortion access is protected in the commonwealth. **Meanwhile in New York** , WFP helped protect vulnerable progressive incumbents that conservative Democrats sought to unseat, and powered over a dozen primary wins for first-time candidates across the state — rooting out some of the entrenched power of special interests. A notable victory includes Democratic nominee for New Rochelle Mayor: **Yadira Ramos-Herbert** , who ran a campaign that spoke to the needs of her community, focusing on affordable housing and climate resiliency, and now stands to make history as the first woman of color elected as mayor in New Rochelle. Other wins include: **Celeste Friend** for Utica Mayor, a former teacher, union member, and City Councilor; **Maurice Brown** for Onondaga County Legislator, a veteran, college coach, and former WFP staffer; and **Kayla Matos** for Ithaca Common Council, the Deputy Director of a treasured community center. **And finally in Colorado** , WFP led the charge to capture four seats for progressive candidates on Denver’s 13-member city council. While one of our longtime champions, incumbent Denver City Council member Candi CdeBaca, fell short against her corporate opponent after being outspent by a six-figure smear campaign launched by Denver’s real estate and landlord lobby — we notched wins for **Serena Gonzales-Gutierrez** , **Shontel Lewis** , **Sarah Parady** , and **Jamie Torres**. As a result, this will be the most progressive city council in Denver’s history.
* * *
**_WORKING FAMILIES POWER ORGANIZES TO TAKE COP-CITY TO A CITY-WIDE REFERENDUM_** Working Families Power is at the center of a new effort to stop ‘Cop City’ — a proposed $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city for police forces to test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. Working Families Power has teamed up with the NAACP Legal Defense Fund and other partners for a ballot initiative to take Cop City to a city-wide referendum and block construction of the planned site for good. Over the next two months, organizers will need to gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 70,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process — in the process building a more educated, engaged, and empowered city. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHjS7lXJ_BZ6HV8TFd1RdH5EBI5S7ozVieP-yHYe9T78194E5E2hdcFy3ERq1LL6i3y4b_EnPLPOCvqg_fyAhtIug0zF0_OxuvsIb-vQMVmBtaK6h0_TtWF3e9QudapVdyFN7g4ZQ3rXUmV7U272xIvWbKZuV74uwseV3Xg24Q8dvYpnxYFVZxoNHwwD1pbFfK5JjWlhIbna2q4UK7vn8t7w6F4e5V7kWuZ0L3EAyS2C6DJAc1P1m7H_LSdjRtrqAQ/3xt/pRn0t9mOQ0uEx-KvPMXOCQ/h0/uUHZ0Lp4iRT1iBLfpS4h0vJqU5CRXeTZgxjrurLvR4Q) **[Read more and find ways to get involved here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/gXX4IWOWv8a8LHyxcrU5Cxm5QLanQblFPuJ7EzfF5zifTN7d4BHtEPrhd8gL_YuYVMl0eC_Mk15hQ9K_ET5pKS9Vv2VnYnr-Qj7G7KbxeZCVk9esl2NDaKVwGU7uK1W_khh4p5Zt4nPvsYviMU4J_0DBGLjEMTEsl-WmPoY0kgYurSLCE30Rotnofe_LNs-CcjeO_kH2wf0lnXaq2GpwbnTn7H2rZkDi-FvcvmZ6Zw8zVN2Fz_i5dhMq5Vi5YPXO/3xt/pRn0t9mOQ0uEx-KvPMXOCQ/h1/GFT9yHXrG3wl4tjK7mFctYnnHljsgiME1wW7KF4fps8)**
* * *
**_WFP’S KENDRA BROOKS OFFICIALLY LAUNCHES RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN FOR PHILADELPHIA CITY COUNCIL_** In 2019, we made history in Philadelphia when we ousted one of two Republicans on the City Council and elected Kendra Brooks in their place on the Working Families Party ballot line — the first third-party city council member in generations. The victory broke a streak of nearly 100 years of Republican control over the seat, and proved everyone who counted her out wrong. Now, Kendra is gearing up to do it all over again, officially kicking off her re-election campaign last month at Ile Ife Park — a North Philly community garden filled with public art and youth programming that represents the enduring power of neighbors coming together: [](Photo from Kendra Brooks' re-election launch event at Ile Ife Park. Kendra stands at a podium overlooking a crowd of supporters.?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-wfp-july-newsletter-2&email_referrer=email_1988783&email_subject=what-you-missed-last-month) After running a groundbreaking campaign in 2019, we're thrilled Kendra is continuing her fight for working people in Philadelphia.
* * *
**_NEW WFP ENDORSEMENTS TO SHARE_** In the Pacific Northwest, Regional Political Director Vanessa Clifford is leading the charge to build out a bigger statewide WFP effort in Washington. The first step of that effort is using this year to explore local elections in a few more medium sized cities, beyond the well-resourced progressive infrastructure of the Seattle metropolitan area. The first stop is Spokane — a pretty purple territory — where WFP brought together an endorsement committee jointly with FUSE Washington. We’ve released five new endorsements for local office in the area: **Lisa Brown** for Mayor of Spokane, **Betsy Wilkerson** for Council President, **Lindsey Shaw** and **Paul Dillon** for City Council in Districts 1 and 2, and **Jaime Stacy** for Mead School Board, just outside of Spokane.
* * *
**_Spotlight on WFP member, activist, and Campaign Camper Merika Goolsby_** I’m 48 years old, born and raised in San Francisco. I grew up in a community that preached voting “blue no matter who” and for "the lesser of two evils.” That was until I decided that I would rather make an educated vote instead of a blind one straight down my party’s line. That’s what brought me to WFP. After being an active leader in grassroots organizing with ACCE around housing issues, I found that WFP offered the political education I was looking for — one that really empowered me, and gave me the space and ability to build on the work I was doing. Recently, I participated in WFP’s Campaign Camp program where I sought guidance, asked questions, and found my answers after deciding to run for City Council in Oakland. What I appreciated about WFP’s Campaign Camp program is that they’re trying to even the odds by equipping people like me with the skills, knowledge, and tools we need to win. I’m running a campaign to address the cost of living crisis that’s exacerbating our already dire housing crisis, and forcing thousands of people, not just in Oakland, but everywhere, to make difficult decisions about whether to buy food, pay their rent, or heat their homes. And now, after learning more with WFP on how to craft a clear campaign message, fundraise as effectively as possible, and just talk to people about issues I’m passionate about — I feel confident that I can win.
* * *
**_UPCOMING EVENTS_** [**WFP Welcome Gathering**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqWhjD1ih7CGTCPlg5FmdtGZ1Q5ezsUc0WrSiAXJnjE5oD2Tz40yPq66p4aa7osjikThl-a5db6SGWaYOyg6hWcxy2oQFxUBRMz_HJ2kmLP3A3VL8ERV89OEXV-YBLAwzbYctTu733YxBdhB1ro7GP9QYXEw-BH-4HIC_DADV_bI46EfiTt5WkUDIqBjqkmRFMtpV4IbKG547JGPGXC1rX3oMKxus-2w5IjMUSdKu1W2U/3xt/pRn0t9mOQ0uEx-KvPMXOCQ/h2/cCVPdAzFpns6u9ve8n21bHiKIR-Uv1WurkIypEoOJhk): Tomorrow, July 13th, join WFP members old and new for our monthly Welcome Gathering! On the call, you’ll have the chance to meet people who share your vision of a world where we can thrive, and not just survive — and learn how you can get involved in making that vision a reality. [**WFP Tuesday Text Party**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqeTcARYRZX_0yga3u68Z_i6tjeJtd4HFogwpMO_2WGTRpCuxgjwn3aVWFFhUHrVG8BRyQZc6La82p64O06qdHKfuLuQOq_fDJuozoFzu8-4ExuhwIAsejzdsOKtbFtDmlfpXNhKe5o0AXCbH0SzXBG0wVGrMiaJUfXz1d9A92LuvvGxW_czxKMSUtoophFWm-XcNvzmxvIvGy5HBKV5HPZ7Ir33gBh1pwiE8GQuK0LYY/3xt/pRn0t9mOQ0uEx-KvPMXOCQ/h3/9Nt-p7icWiLS38IB2GM0sli1AGxpxL-jQx9itgTDrFc) Collect petition signatures from Atlanta residents in support of the ballot initiative to stop Cop City, or help get out the vote for Mai Xiong for City Clerk in Warren, Michigan at our Tuesday Text Party on **July 18th at 6PM ET**! You can also join us on **July 25th at 6PM ET** as we text voters in Ohio to vote NO on Issue 1 to stop anti-abortion Republican lawmakers from taking power from voters, and get out the vote for Aaron Regunberg for Congress in Rhode Island. Whether you’re a first-time texter or an experienced pro, you can make a real difference by sharing our message with voters and let them know about the WFP champions and issues on their ballot. [**WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqVdgy_m_CzfNEjU_ITl35YItLhD96D2rwQHKffIaAQVoItgIzRZw-yptVps8c4PxDyEsOWNPHjppS_jPlmzxXvr-BEvT3DcxK78W9tS5P1X_AMW9Z7C_Vukt4ScZwaERGiAeqF-DonIrQMiWOOYxO1_ic0NPHfgtgD-sPxp_I_yY9jXK-1OwXLmXRJ0hNxGgksxnk1JxdWG52mozUABzSXZ8W2o59SdPgeQvYQ92Anyc/3xt/pRn0t9mOQ0uEx-KvPMXOCQ/h4/AGXFJMtkO2QDQQV2UMftq2m7X_EbAzQdsEQXzDCeZz0) In July’s edition of the WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution, we’ll be discussing **No Country for Eight-Spot Butterflies by Julian Aguon**. As a group, we’ll talk about what the book means for our work and how we can apply its lessons to our own advocacy work.
* * *
Thanks for catching up with us as we reflect on a busy month! But the work isn’t slowing down. To keep up the fight in July and beyond, we need support from people like you. clean_body: Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. | | | Peter, It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting for the many — and winning. Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. WFP-ENDORSED PROGRESSIVES CLAIM MAJOR VICTORIES IN NEW YORK, VIRGINIA, AND COLORADO We celebrated a big primary night in Virginia last month, where WFP defended three progressive reformer district attorneys and won eight legislative races, including: Lashrecse Aird who took on the last anti-choice Democrat in the State Senate and defeated him by a more than 2-to-1 margin; Jennifer Carroll Foy who defeated an opponent backed by the state’s dirty energy monopoly; and Buta Biberaj who retained her seat for Commonwealth's Attorney after facing a bipartisan barrage over her restorative justice policies. Together with our partners on the ground, we were able to knock on 32,000 doors, make 120,000 phone calls, send 1 million texts, deliver 200,000 mailers, and reach over 2 million voters with digital ads. Now, we’re expanding our organizing in Virginia through the general election in order to reform our justice system, flip the House of Delegates, defend the Democratic majority in the State Senate, and ensure abortion access is protected in the commonwealth. Meanwhile in New York , WFP helped protect vulnerable progressive incumbents that conservative Democrats sought to unseat, and powered over a dozen primary wins for first-time candidates across the state — rooting out some of the entrenched power of special interests. A notable victory includes Democratic nominee for New Rochelle Mayor: Yadira Ramos-Herbert , who ran a campaign that spoke to the needs of her community, focusing on affordable housing and climate resiliency, and now stands to make history as the first woman of color elected as mayor in New Rochelle. Other wins include: Celeste Friend for Utica Mayor, a former teacher, union member, and City Councilor; Maurice Brown for Onondaga County Legislator, a veteran, college coach, and former WFP staffer; and Kayla Matos for Ithaca Common Council, the Deputy Director of a treasured community center. And finally in Colorado , WFP led the charge to capture four seats for progressive candidates on Denver’s 13-member city council. While one of our longtime champions, incumbent Denver City Council member Candi CdeBaca, fell short against her corporate opponent after being outspent by a six-figure smear campaign launched by Denver’s real estate and landlord lobby — we notched wins for Serena Gonzales-Gutierrez , Shontel Lewis , Sarah Parady , and Jamie Torres. As a result, this will be the most progressive city council in Denver’s history. WORKING FAMILIES POWER ORGANIZES TO TAKE COP-CITY TO A CITY-WIDE REFERENDUM Working Families Power is at the center of a new effort to stop ‘Cop City’ — a proposed $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city for police forces to test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. Working Families Power has teamed up with the NAACP Legal Defense Fund and other partners for a ballot initiative to take Cop City to a city-wide referendum and block construction of the planned site for good. Over the next two months, organizers will need to gather tens of thousands of signatures to achieve the 70,000 necessary to qualify for the referendum process — in the process building a more educated, engaged, and empowered city. WFP’S KENDRA BROOKS OFFICIALLY LAUNCHES RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN FOR PHILADELPHIA CITY COUNCIL In 2019, we made history in Philadelphia when we ousted one of two Republicans on the City Council and elected Kendra Brooks in their place on the Working Families Party ballot line — the first third-party city council member in generations. The victory broke a streak of nearly 100 years of Republican control over the seat, and proved everyone who counted her out wrong. Now, Kendra is gearing up to do it all over again, officially kicking off her re-election campaign last month at Ile Ife Park — a North Philly community garden filled with public art and youth programming that represents the enduring power of neighbors coming together: Photo from Kendra Brooks' re-election launch event at Ile Ife Park. Kendra stands at a podium overlooking a crowd of supporters.?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-wfp-july-newsletter-2&emailreferrer=email1988783&emailsubject=what-you-missed-last-month After running a groundbreaking campaign in 2019, we're thrilled Kendra is continuing her fight for working people in Philadelphia. NEW WFP ENDORSEMENTS TO SHARE In the Pacific Northwest, Regional Political Director Vanessa Clifford is leading the charge to build out a bigger statewide WFP effort in Washington. The first step of that effort is using this year to explore local elections in a few more medium sized cities, beyond the well-resourced progressive infrastructure of the Seattle metropolitan area. The first stop is Spokane — a pretty purple territory — where WFP brought together an endorsement committee jointly with FUSE Washington. We’ve released five new endorsements for local office in the area: Lisa Brown for Mayor of Spokane, Betsy Wilkerson for Council President, Lindsey Shaw and Paul Dillon for City Council in Districts 1 and 2, and Jaime Stacy for Mead School Board, just outside of Spokane. Spotlight on WFP member, activist, and Campaign Camper Merika Goolsby I’m 48 years old, born and raised in San Francisco. I grew up in a community that preached voting “blue no matter who” and for "the lesser of two evils.” That was until I decided that I would rather make an educated vote instead of a blind one straight down my party’s line. That’s what brought me to WFP. After being an active leader in grassroots organizing with ACCE around housing issues, I found that WFP offered the political education I was looking for — one that really empowered me, and gave me the space and ability to build on the work I was doing. Recently, I participated in WFP’s Campaign Camp program where I sought guidance, asked questions, and found my answers after deciding to run for City Council in Oakland. What I appreciated about WFP’s Campaign Camp program is that they’re trying to even the odds by equipping people like me with the skills, knowledge, and tools we need to win. I’m running a campaign to address the cost of living crisis that’s exacerbating our already dire housing crisis, and forcing thousands of people, not just in Oakland, but everywhere, to make difficult decisions about whether to buy food, pay their rent, or heat their homes. And now, after learning more with WFP on how to craft a clear campaign message, fundraise as effectively as possible, and just talk to people about issues I’m passionate about — I feel confident that I can win. UPCOMING EVENTS : Tomorrow, July 13th, join WFP members old and new for our monthly Welcome Gathering! On the call, you’ll have the chance to meet people who share your vision of a world where we can thrive, and not just survive — and learn how you can get involved in making that vision a reality. Collect petition signatures from Atlanta residents in support of the ballot initiative to stop Cop City, or help get out the vote for Mai Xiong for City Clerk in Warren, Michigan at our Tuesday Text Party on July 18th at 6PM ET! You can also join us on July 25th at 6PM ET as we text voters in Ohio to vote NO on Issue 1 to stop anti-abortion Republican lawmakers from taking power from voters, and get out the vote for Aaron Regunberg for Congress in Rhode Island. Whether you’re a first-time texter or an experienced pro, you can make a real difference by sharing our message with voters and let them know about the WFP champions and issues on their ballot. In July’s edition of the WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution, we’ll be discussing No Country for Eight-Spot Butterflies by Julian Aguon. As a group, we’ll talk about what the book means for our work and how we can apply its lessons to our own advocacy work. Thanks for catching up with us as we reflect on a busy month! But the work isn’t slowing down. To keep up the fight in July and beyond, we need support from people like you. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . **This is urgent:** Virginia’s legislative elections are just around the corner, **and Republicans need to flip just two senate seats to take full control of state government.**

We cannot afford to ignore this contest – if Republicans prevail, they could roll back all of our progress.
* Currently, Virginia is one of the only states in the South that still protects the right to choose. **If Republicans take control, they could ban abortion statewide.**
* In 2018, Virginia was ranked as one of the hardest states to exercise the right to vote – but thanks to robust reforms passed by Democrats, it became one of the easiest states to vote in by 2021. **If Republicans take control, they could once again impose strict voter suppression measures.**
* In 2020, Virginia voters approved a redistricting commission in an effort to secure fair maps. **But if Republicans take control, they could undermine the independence of the commission to enact gerrymandered districts.**

**Multi-millionnaire Governor Glenn Youngkin is _already_ investing in competitive districts. If we want to ensure that Democrats have the resources they need to win, we have no time to waste.

[_Quickly: Will you rush a donation now, even if it’s just a few dollars, so the NDRC can work to defend our democracy from MAGA extremists who seek to destroy our progress?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66407885/416235317/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230712_FR_7K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmOGMxZmYyLTA5MjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NQ5uykSn0p10hJMHz2hcb1sUnbsI6CLslgJreD8m1g4=)**

clean_body: | | = = This is urgent: Virginia’s legislative elections are just around the corner, and Republicans need to flip just two senate seats to take full control of state government. We cannot afford to ignore this contest – if Republicans prevail, they could roll back all of our progress. Currently, Virginia is one of the only states in the South that still protects the right to choose. If Republicans take control, they could ban abortion statewide. In 2018, Virginia was ranked as one of the hardest states to exercise the right to vote – but thanks to robust reforms passed by Democrats, it became one of the easiest states to vote in by 2021. If Republicans take control, they could once again impose strict voter suppression measures. In 2020, Virginia voters approved a redistricting commission in an effort to secure fair maps. But if Republicans take control, they could undermine the independence of the commission to enact gerrymandered districts. Multi-millionnaire Governor Glenn Youngkin is already investing in competitive districts. If we want to ensure that Democrats have the resources they need to win, we have no time to waste. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’re counting on you. – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. | | | It’s official, folks. The Supreme Court has gone off the rails. **And _we_ know a thing or two about staying on the rails** — that’s what we’ve been focusing on here in Alaska: defeating extremists, advocating for investments in our infrastructure, and keeping our state on the right track for the benefit of all Alaskans and as an example for the nation. The conservative majority of the U.S. Supreme Court has been on a roll lately, targeting women’s rights, voting rights, privacy, and diversity. **Now, by striking down the administration’s student debt relief plan, the Court is lashing out at working Americans** — folks saddled with crushing student debt as the labor market and economy shifted right underneath their feet.
Keep in mind, team: Justice Clarence Thomas’ billionaire friend paid for Thomas’ nephew to attend a private boarding school. Now, Thomas is set on preventing others from getting the financial assistance they need for their education.
Here in Alaska, when public figures become spiteful and cruel, we do everything we can to keep them out of power. _Just ask Sarah Palin and Kelly Tshibaka._ [**But we need continuing support to keep up with our mission and help deal with extremists at home and in D.C. Please, friend, make a contribution today to fuel our work →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66407927/416235444/1859846009?refcode=E3332-20230712-SCOTUSOffTheRails-SL-SCOTUS&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230712_scotus&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTUxOGI4Mi0wYTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hK7WiPflGbPKm-M14X0vHehGj2_tZrw_EWLRJxKFr40=&emci=03a11794-0521-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c1518b82-0a21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)
