clean_body: Here in Alaska, we know a thing or two about dealing with extremists. | | | | | | It’s official, folks. The Supreme Court has gone off the rails. And we know a thing or two about staying on the rails — that’s what we’ve been focusing on here in Alaska: defeating extremists, advocating for investments in our infrastructure, and keeping our state on the right track for the benefit of all Alaskans and as an example for the nation. | The conservative majority of the U.S. Supreme Court has been on a roll lately, targeting women’s rights, voting rights, privacy, and diversity. Now, by striking down the administration’s student debt relief plan, the Court is lashing out at working Americans — folks saddled with crushing student debt as the labor market and economy shifted right underneath their feet. Keep in mind, team: Justice Clarence Thomas’ billionaire friend paid for Thomas’ nephew to attend a private boarding school. Now, Thomas is set on preventing others from getting the financial assistance they need for their education. Here in Alaska, when public figures become spiteful and cruel, we do everything we can to keep them out of power. Just ask Sarah Palin and Kelly Tshibaka. | | | Thank you, Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund | | Help us continue to build Alaska's future by to support our work. | | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved. Contributions are not tax deductible. [**Sign our CRUCIAL petition to show us you oppose far-right attacks on school lunches! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14805?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230712-UrgentAlert-SchoolLunchesPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230712-UrgentAlert-SchoolLunchesPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=11309%2E9716520%2EsvyUgP)

The GOP has sunk to a new low, team: **House Republicans just called for ELIMINATING a measure that provides free school lunches to _millions_ of low-income students every year.**

This disgusting proposal would harm some of our country’s most vulnerable children -- and it serves as a clear reminder of where the GOP’s priorities are. **At a time when we should be _investing_ in our kids' education, Republicans would rather take away school lunches.**

We MUST stand against the GOP’s despicable plan. Show us that Democrats everywhere support our children’s well-being. **We’re trying to reach 1,000 signatures from Pennsylvania before midnight, so please:**

[**Sign our CRUCIAL petition to show us you oppose far-right attacks on school lunches! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14805?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230712-UrgentAlert-SchoolLunchesPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230712-UrgentAlert-SchoolLunchesPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=11309%2E9716520%2EsvyUgP)

Trump founded THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST. The President promptly invited YOU to become a Founding Member. At the bottom of this email, we’ve attached a copy of the President’s heartfelt appeal for YOU to join on the day he founded the TRUST. While Founding Membership enrollment closed, President Trump decided at the beginning of the new quarter to re-open enrollment ONLY for his most trusted DONORS like YOU. Now that it’s evident that the Democrats’ playbook is to launch endless witch hunts to try and take us down, YOUR Founding Membership has never been more critical. But, as of the last time we checked the roster, we didn’t see you had accepted your invitation yet: | Title: THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST Invitation for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Founding Member Acceptance: PENDING | | Thank you, Trump Member Services \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, Feb 22, 2023 Subject: You’re a loyal defender of our movement To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, Our country needs you. The Deep State will do everything in their power to destroy me and stop YOU from having a voice in your own country. Now that polls show we’d CRUSH Biden in a landslide, the Deep State is inciting more witch hunts to try and eliminate our campaign and end the America First movement. That’s why I’m inviting YOU – one of my most trusted supporters – to become a Founding Member of thePRESIDENT’S TRUST to defend our movement from the Deep State’s attacks. | | The Deep State has wanted to destroy me ever since I first vowed to fight for the American people. And now they see that our movement is stronger than ever before. We’re winning the Republican primary by double digits. We’re beating any and all possible Democrat nominees – including both Biden and Kamala. So now, they can only resort to abusing the system to try and sabotage the only political movement that promises to put power back in the hands of the people of our country. But I trust you won’t let them get away with it. We need to save America – and 2024 is our final chance. Thank you, | Donald J. We’re coming up on our first mid-month deadline of the quarter, folks — but **[before I ask you to chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66408194/416236600/-90626349?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmZjNzk5Yi0wZDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yiMmW2Mhqem2bDw2SdXsnIycIOJTmntT4gc-7u0SVsg=)** , let me explain what your support makes possible. Back in 2020, we flipped the Senate blue — and we expanded our Democratic Majority last year. As a result, we’ve brought forward once-in-a-generation legislation like the _American Rescue Plan_ to help our communities rebuild from the pandemic and the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to address the climate crisis and create millions of good-paying jobs over the next decade. **We can’t afford to let Republicans flip the two seats they need to take back the Senate Majority and roll back our progress.** That’s why it’s so important we meet each and every fundraising milestone to build the foundation to keep New Mexico blue and defend our majority. **[So, will you be one of the 35 supporters we need to chip in before midnight to stay on track to meet our mid-month goal?
